var getRotationBlockContent = function getRotationBlockContent(step) {

  var rotatedGroups = [ROTATION_GROUPS[(0 + groupOffset) % 3], ROTATION_GROUPS[(1 + groupOffset) % 3], ROTATION_GROUPS[(2 + groupOffset) % 3]];

  return Math.round((Number(value) || 0) * 10) / 10;

var getLegacyMonthlyMultiplierA = function getLegacyMonthlyMultiplierA(cfg, monthIdx) {
  var legacyValue = Number(cfg === null || cfg === void 0 ? void 0 : cfg["multA_".concat(monthIdx)]);
  return Number.isFinite(legacyValue) && legacyValue > 0 ? legacyValue : null;
};
var getAutoPriorityMultiplierA = function getAutoPriorityMultiplierA(cfg, monthIdx) {
  var segment = getAutoAProfileSegmentForMonth(monthIdx);
  var profileValue = Number(cfg === null || cfg === void 0 ? void 0 : cfg[segment.key]);
  if (Number.isFinite(profileValue) && profileValue > 0) return profileValue;
  var legacyValue = getLegacyMonthlyMultiplierA(cfg, monthIdx);
  if (legacyValue != null) return legacyValue;
  return segment.defaultValue;
};
var normalizeAutoAMultipliers = function normalizeAutoAMultipliers() {
  var cfg = arguments.length > 0 && arguments[0] !== undefined ? arguments[0] : {};
  var next = _objectSpread({}, cfg);
  AUTO_A_PROFILE_SEGMENTS.forEach(function (segment) {
    var currentValue = Number(next[segment.key]);
    if (Number.isFinite(currentValue) && currentValue > 0) {
      next[segment.key] = roundToOneDecimal(currentValue);
      return;
    }
    var legacyValues = segment.months.map(function (monthIdx) {
      return getLegacyMonthlyMultiplierA(next, monthIdx);
    }).filter(function (v) {
      return v != null;
    });
    var fallback = legacyValues.length > 0 ? legacyValues.reduce(function (sum, value) {
      return sum + value;
    }, 0) / legacyValues.length : segment.defaultValue;
    next[segment.key] = roundToOneDecimal(fallback);
  });
  for (var monthIdx = 0; monthIdx < 12; monthIdx++) {
    next["multA_".concat(monthIdx)] = roundToOneDecimal(getAutoPriorityMultiplierA(next, monthIdx));
  }
  next.rotationUnitSequence = normalizeRotationUnitSequence(next.rotationUnitSequence);
  return next;
};
var normalizeRotationUnitSequence = function normalizeRotationUnitSequence(sequence) {
  var incoming = Array.isArray(sequence) ? sequence : [];
  var valid = incoming.filter(function (unit) {
    return ALL_ROTATION_UNITS.includes(unit);
  });
  var unique = [];
  valid.forEach(function (unit) {
    if (!unique.includes(unit)) unique.push(unit);
  });
  DEFAULT_ROTATION_ASSIGNMENT_UNIT_SEQUENCE.forEach(function (unit) {
    if (!unique.includes(unit)) unique.push(unit);
  });
  return unique.slice(0, ALL_ROTATION_UNITS.length);
};
var buildRotationAssignmentSlots = function buildRotationAssignmentSlots(totalMte) {
  var unitSequence = arguments.length > 1 && arguments[1] !== undefined ? arguments[1] : DEFAULT_ROTATION_ASSIGNMENT_UNIT_SEQUENCE;

  var slots = [];
  if (normalizedTotal <= 0) return slots;

  var seatsPerUnit = Math.ceil(normalizedTotal / (13 * normalizedSequence.length));

      _step;

        var unit = _step.value;

            block: block,
            unit: unit,
            seat: seat,
            label: "Bloque ".concat(block, " \xC2\xB7 ").concat(unit, " \xC2\xB7 Puesto ").concat(seat)
          });

        }

      _iterator.e(err);
    } finally {
      _iterator.f();
    }
  }
  return slots;
};

var getRmDateForScenario = function getRmDateForScenario(year, vacationRow, pfaOpt) {
  if (!vacationRow || !pfaOpt) return null;
  var key = "".concat(vacationRow.id, "|").concat(pfaOpt.label);
  var parts = RM_DATE_BY_SCENARIO[key];
  if (!parts) return null;
  return new Date(year, parts.m, parts.d);
};

// --- 2. COMPONENTES GENÃ‰RICOS (UI) ---
var Modal = function Modal(_ref) {
  var title = _ref.title,
    onClose = _ref.onClose,
    children = _ref.children,
    _ref$maxWidth = _ref.maxWidth,
    maxWidth = _ref$maxWidth === void 0 ? "max-w-4xl" : _ref$maxWidth;
  return /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div", {
    className: "modal-overlay",
    onClick: onClose
  }, /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div", {
    className: "bg-white p-6 ".concat(maxWidth, " w-full rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto"),
    onClick: function onClick(e) {
      return e.stopPropagation();
    }
  }, /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div", {
    className: "flex justify-between items-center border-b border-gray-200 pb-3 mb-4"
  }, /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("h2", {
    className: "text-xl md:text-2xl font-black text-blue-900"
  }, title), /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("button", {
    onClick: onClose,
    className: "text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 font-black text-2xl transition-colors"
  }, "\xD7")), children, /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("button", {
    className: "mt-6 w-full py-3 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-bold rounded-xl transition-all shadow-md",
    onClick: onClose
  }, "Cerrar Panel")));
};

  var c = {

      l: 'bg-yellow-50/50',
      t: 'text-yellow-800',
      b: 'border-yellow-300/50',
      r: 'ring-yellow-400',
      g: 'from-yellow-500/90 to-yellow-600/90',
      tw: 'text-yellow-900',
      indicatorBg: 'bg-yellow-400/90',
      shadow: 'shadow-yellow-500/20',
      textMedium: 'text-yellow-50/90',
      textLight: 'text-yellow-50/80'
    },
    C: {

      l: 'bg-red-50/50',
      t: 'text-red-800',
      b: 'border-red-300/50',
      r: 'ring-red-400',
      g: 'from-red-600/90 to-red-700/90',
      tw: 'text-white',
      indicatorBg: 'bg-red-500/90',

  return c[g] || {
    p: 'bg-gray-600/90',
    l: 'bg-gray-50/50',
    t: 'text-gray-800',
    b: 'border-gray-300/50',
    r: 'ring-gray-400',

var getSubColor = function getSubColor(g, n) {
  var p = parseInt(n);
  if (g === 'A') return p === 1 ? 'bg-green-300/90 text-green-900 border-green-300' : p === 2 ? 'bg-green-400/90 text-green-900 border-green-400' : p === 3 ? 'bg-green-500/90 text-white border-green-500' : 'bg-green-600/90 text-white border-green-600';
  if (g === 'B') return p === 1 ? 'bg-yellow-200/90 text-yellow-900 border-yellow-200' : p === 2 ? 'bg-yellow-300/90 text-yellow-900 border-yellow-300' : p === 3 ? 'bg-yellow-400/90 text-yellow-900 border-yellow-400' : 'bg-yellow-500/90 text-white border-yellow-500';
  if (g === 'C') return p === 1 ? 'bg-red-300/90 text-white border-red-300' : p === 2 ? 'bg-red-400/90 text-white border-red-400' : p === 3 ? 'bg-red-500/90 text-white border-red-500' : 'bg-red-600/90 text-white border-red-600';
  return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600';
};
var getBaseQuota = function getBaseQuota(config, month, day, esSD, esF) {
  var baseLab, baseSD, baseFes;
  if (month === 5) {
    if (day <= 15) {
      baseLab = config.c_5q1_0;
      baseSD = config.c_5q1_1;
      baseFes = config.c_5q1_2;
    } else {
      baseLab = config.c_5q2_0;
      baseSD = config.c_5q2_1;
      baseFes = config.c_5q2_2;
    }
  } else {
    baseLab = config["c_".concat(month, "_0")];
    baseSD = config["c_".concat(month, "_1")];
    baseFes = config["c_".concat(month, "_2")];
  }
  return esSD ? baseSD : esF ? baseFes : baseLab;
};

var getEasterDate = function getEasterDate(year) {
  var a = year % 19;
  var b = Math.floor(year / 100);
  var c = year % 100;
  var d = Math.floor(b / 4);
  var e = b % 4;
  var f = Math.floor((b + 8) / 25);
  var g = Math.floor((b - f + 1) / 3);
  var h = (19 * a + b - d - g + 15) % 30;
  var i = Math.floor(c / 4);
  var k = c % 4;
  var l = (32 + 2 * e + 2 * i - h - k) % 7;
  var m = Math.floor((a + 11 * h + 22 * l) / 451);
  var month = Math.floor((h + l - 7 * m + 114) / 31) - 1;
  var day = (h + l - 7 * m + 114) % 31 + 1;
  return new Date(year, month, day);
};
var posMod = function posMod(n, m) {
  return (n % m + m) % m;
};
var buildFestivosSetForYear = function buildFestivosSetForYear(year) {
  var customHolidays = arguments.length > 1 && arguments[1] !== undefined ? arguments[1] : [];
  var fixed = ["0-1", "0-6", "4-1", "4-2", "4-15", "7-15", "9-12", "10-1", "10-9", "11-6", "11-8", "11-25"];
  var easter = getEasterDate(year);
  var juevesSanto = new Date(easter);
  juevesSanto.setDate(easter.getDate() - 3);
  var viernesSanto = new Date(easter);
  viernesSanto.setDate(easter.getDate() - 2);
  var all = [].concat(fixed, ["".concat(juevesSanto.getMonth(), "-").concat(juevesSanto.getDate()), "".concat(viernesSanto.getMonth(), "-").concat(viernesSanto.getDate())], _toConsumableArray(customHolidays || []));
  return new Set(all);
};
var isBaseRestForGroup = function isBaseRestForGroup(date, groupShift) {
  var dow = date.getDay();
  var diff = dow === 0 ? 6 : dow - 1;
  var mon = new Date(date);
  mon.setDate(date.getDate() - diff);
  mon.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  var wb = Math.round((mon - ANCHOR_MONDAY) / MS_PER_WEEK);
  var si = (wb - groupShift) % 4;
  if (si < 0) si += 4;
  return SEQUENCE[si].includes(dow);
};
var getAdjustedRmDateForScenario = function getAdjustedRmDateForScenario(year, vacationRow, pfaOpt, groupShift) {
  var restChecker = arguments.length > 4 && arguments[4] !== undefined ? arguments[4] : isBaseRestForGroup;
  var base = getRmDateForScenario(year, vacationRow, pfaOpt);
  if (!base) return null;
  var adjusted = new Date(base);
  adjusted.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  var safety = 0;
  while (restChecker(adjusted, groupShift) && safety < 31) {
    adjusted.setDate(adjusted.getDate() - 1);
    safety++;
  }
  return adjusted;
};
var getAdjustedPfaRangeForScenario = function getAdjustedPfaRangeForScenario(year, pfaOpt, targetGroupShift) {
  var originalStart = new Date(year, pfaOpt.start.m, pfaOpt.start.d);
  var actualStart = new Date(originalStart);
  var originalEnd = new Date(year, pfaOpt.end.m, pfaOpt.end.d);
  var durationMs = originalEnd.getTime() - originalStart.getTime();
  var isDecemberPfa11To31 = pfaOpt.start.m === 11 && pfaOpt.start.d === 11;
  var safety = 0;
  while (isBaseRestForGroup(actualStart, targetGroupShift) && safety < 10) {
    actualStart.setDate(actualStart.getDate() + (isDecemberPfa11To31 ? -1 : 1));
    safety++;
  }
  var pfaStart = actualStart.getTime();
  var pfaEnd = pfaStart + durationMs;
  if (isDecemberPfa11To31 && actualStart.getTime() < originalStart.getTime()) {
    pfaEnd = originalEnd.getTime();
  }
  return {
    pfaStart: pfaStart,
    pfaEnd: pfaEnd
  };
};
var getVacationRangesForScenario = function getVacationRangesForScenario(year, vacationRow, pfaOpt, groupShift) {
  var summerStart = new Date(year, vacationRow.summer.start.m, vacationRow.summer.start.d).getTime();
  var summerEnd = new Date(year, vacationRow.summer.end.m, vacationRow.summer.end.d).getTime();
  var pfaRange = getAdjustedPfaRangeForScenario(year, pfaOpt, groupShift);
  return {
    summerStart: summerStart,
    summerEnd: summerEnd,
    pfaStart: pfaRange.pfaStart,
    pfaEnd: pfaRange.pfaEnd
  };
};
var isVacationForScenario = function isVacationForScenario(date, ranges) {
  var t = date.getTime();
  return t >= ranges.summerStart && t <= ranges.summerEnd || t >= ranges.pfaStart && t <= ranges.pfaEnd;
};
var buildRedDaysSetBForScenario = function buildRedDaysSetBForScenario(year, groupShift, subGroupIdx) {
  var reds = new Set();
  var firstDayOfYear = new Date(year, 0, 1);
  var daysToFirstMonday = firstDayOfYear.getDay() === 1 ? 0 : firstDayOfYear.getDay() === 0 ? 1 : 8 - firstDayOfYear.getDay();
  var firstMonday = new Date(year, 0, 1 + daysToFirstMonday);
  firstMonday.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  for (var w = -4; w <= 56; w++) {
    var currentMonday = new Date(firstMonday);
    currentMonday.setDate(firstMonday.getDate() + w * 7);
    var weeksBetween = Math.round((currentMonday - ANCHOR_MONDAY) / MS_PER_WEEK);
    var groupWeek = posMod(weeksBetween - groupShift, 24);
    var phase = groupWeek % 4;
    var cycle = Math.floor(groupWeek / 4);
    var daysOffset = [];
    if (phase === 1) {
      daysOffset = subGroupIdx === posMod(cycle + 1, 6) ? [0, 1] : subGroupIdx === posMod(cycle + 3, 6) ? [3, 4] : [];
    } else if (phase === 2) {
      daysOffset = subGroupIdx === posMod(cycle + 5, 6) ? [2] : [];
    }
    for (var _i = 0, _daysOffset = daysOffset; _i < _daysOffset.length; _i++) {
      var offset = _daysOffset[_i];
      var targetDate = new Date(currentMonday);
      targetDate.setDate(currentMonday.getDate() + offset);
      if (targetDate.getFullYear() === year) {
        reds.add("".concat(targetDate.getMonth(), "-").concat(targetDate.getDate()));
      }
    }
  }
  return reds;
};
var buildCyclesForScenarioC = function buildCyclesForScenarioC(year, groupShift) {
  var rawList = [];
  var current = new Date(year, 0, 1);
  current.setDate(current.getDate() + (current.getDay() === 0 ? 1 : (8 - current.getDay()) % 7));
  while (current.getFullYear() <= year) {
    var weeksBetween = Math.round((current - ANCHOR_MONDAY) / MS_PER_WEEK);
    var seqIdx = (weeksBetween - groupShift) % 4;
    if (seqIdx < 0) seqIdx += 4;
    if (seqIdx === 0) {
      var start = new Date(current);
      var end = new Date(current);
      end.setDate(start.getDate() + 14);
      rawList.push({
        start: start,
        end: end
      });
    }
    current.setDate(current.getDate() + 7);
  }
  return rawList;
};
var computeAnnualBalance = function computeAnnualBalance(_ref2) {
  var year = _ref2.year,
    groupShift = _ref2.groupShift,
    targetDays = _ref2.targetDays,
    vacationRanges = _ref2.vacationRanges,
    _ref2$specificRestSet = _ref2.specificRestSet,
    specificRestSet = _ref2$specificRestSet === void 0 ? null : _ref2$specificRestSet,
    _ref2$specificCycle = _ref2.specificCycle,
    specificCycle = _ref2$specificCycle === void 0 ? null : _ref2$specificCycle,
    _ref2$workRule = _ref2.workRule,
    workRule = _ref2$workRule === void 0 ? 'classic' : _ref2$workRule,
    _ref2$includeVacation = _ref2.includeVacationOnWork,
    includeVacationOnWork = _ref2$includeVacation === void 0 ? false : _ref2$includeVacation,
    _ref2$rmDate = _ref2.rmDate,
    rmDate = _ref2$rmDate === void 0 ? null : _ref2$rmDate,
    _ref2$rmInside = _ref2.rmInside,
    rmInside = _ref2$rmInside === void 0 ? false : _ref2$rmInside;
  var workDays = 0;
  var baseRests = 0;
  var extraRests = 0;
  var vacPfaDays = 0;
  var vacOnWorkDays = 0;
  var rmDayId = rmDate ? "".concat(rmDate.getMonth(), "-").concat(rmDate.getDate()) : null;
  var start = new Date(year, 0, 1);
  var end = new Date(year, 11, 31);
  for (var d = new Date(start); d <= end; d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1)) {
    var dayId = "".concat(d.getMonth(), "-").concat(d.getDate());
    var isBase = isBaseRestForGroup(d, groupShift);
    var t = d.getTime();
    var isSpecific = specificRestSet ? specificRestSet.has(dayId) : specificCycle ? t >= specificCycle.start.getTime() && t <= specificCycle.end.getTime() : false;
    var isRmOutside = !rmInside && rmDayId === dayId;
    var isVac = vacationRanges ? isVacationForScenario(d, vacationRanges) : false;
    var isPotentialWork = !isBase && !isSpecific;
    var isVacationOnWorkDay = isPotentialWork && (isVac || isRmOutside);
    if (isVac) vacPfaDays++;
    if (isBase) baseRests++;else if (isSpecific) extraRests++;
    if (workRule === 'rest_and_specific_only') {
      if (isPotentialWork) {
        if (isVacationOnWorkDay && includeVacationOnWork) vacOnWorkDays++;else if (!isVacationOnWorkDay) workDays++;
      }
    } else if (isPotentialWork && !isVac && !isRmOutside) {
      workDays++;
    }
  }
  var diff = workDays - targetDays;
  return {
    workDays: workDays,
    baseRests: baseRests,
    extraRests: extraRests,
    vacPfaDays: vacPfaDays,
    vacOnWorkDays: vacOnWorkDays,
    creditDays: diff > 0 ? diff : 0,
    debitDays: diff < 0 ? Math.abs(diff) : 0,
    diff: diff
  };
};
var buildCCRFixedDaysSet = function buildCCRFixedDaysSet(year, groupShift, vacationRanges) {
  var maxDays = arguments.length > 3 && arguments[3] !== undefined ? arguments[3] : 10;
  var rmDate = arguments.length > 4 && arguments[4] !== undefined ? arguments[4] : null;
  var rmInside = arguments.length > 5 && arguments[5] !== undefined ? arguments[5] : false;
  var selected = new Set();
  var rmDayId = rmDate ? "".concat(rmDate.getMonth(), "-").concat(rmDate.getDate()) : null;
  var start = new Date(year, 0, 1);
  var end = new Date(year, 11, 31);
  for (var d = new Date(start); d <= end && selected.size < maxDays; d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1)) {
    var isBase = isBaseRestForGroup(d, groupShift);
    var isVac = isVacationForScenario(d, vacationRanges);
    var dayId = "".concat(d.getMonth(), "-").concat(d.getDate());
    var isRmRest = rmInside && rmDayId === dayId;
    if (isBase || isVac || isRmRest) continue;
    selected.add(dayId);
  }
  return selected;
};

// --- 3. MÃ“DULO DE AJUSTES GLOBALES ---
function Ajustes(_ref3) {
  var _config$creditosAutoA;
  var config = _ref3.config,
    setConfig = _ref3.setConfig,
    onBack = _ref3.onBack,
    onSaveConfig = _ref3.onSaveConfig;
  var _useState = useState(false),
    _useState2 = _slicedToArray(_useState, 2),
    showHelp = _useState2[0],
    setShowHelp = _useState2[1];
  var _useState3 = useState(""),
    _useState4 = _slicedToArray(_useState3, 2),
    saveStatus = _useState4[0],
    setSaveStatus = _useState4[1];
  var showStatus = useCallback(function (msg) {
    setSaveStatus(msg);
    setTimeout(function () {
      return setSaveStatus("");
    }, 2500);
  }, []);
  var handleChange = function handleChange(key, value) {
    return setConfig(function (prev) {
      return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, prev), {}, _defineProperty({}, key, Number(value))));
    });
  };
  var toPressureLevel = function toPressureLevel(pct) {
    return Math.round((Number(pct) || 0) / PRESSURE_LEVEL_UNIT * 10) / 10;
  };
  var handlePressureLevelChange = function handlePressureLevelChange(key, value) {
    var level = Number(value);
    if (Number.isNaN(level)) return;
    var pct = Math.round(level * PRESSURE_LEVEL_UNIT * 100) / 100;
    setConfig(function (prev) {
      return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, prev), {}, _defineProperty({}, key, pct)));
    });
  };
  var handleAutoProfileChange = function handleAutoProfileChange(key, value) {
    var parsed = Number(value);
    if (Number.isNaN(parsed)) return;
    setConfig(function (prev) {
      return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, prev), {}, _defineProperty({}, key, parsed)));
    });
  };
  var applyAutoProfileDefaults = function applyAutoProfileDefaults() {
    setConfig(function (prev) {
      return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, prev), AUTO_A_PROFILE_SEGMENTS.reduce(function (acc, segment) {
        return _objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, acc), {}, _defineProperty({}, segment.key, segment.defaultValue));
      }, {})));
    });
  };
  var handleRotationExcelImport = function handleRotationExcelImport(e) {
    var file = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    if (typeof XLSX === 'undefined') {
      showStatus('No se pudo cargar el lector de Excel');
      e.target.value = '';
      return;
    }
    var reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function () {
      try {
        var data = new Uint8Array(reader.result);
        var workbook = XLSX.read(data, {
          type: 'array'
        });
        var sheetName = workbook.SheetNames[0];
        if (!sheetName) throw new Error('sheet');
        var sheet = workbook.Sheets[sheetName];
        var rows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(sheet, {
          header: 1,
          raw: false,
          defval: ''
        });
        var dneList = rows.map(function (row) {
          var _row$;
          return Array.isArray(row) ? String((_row$ = row[0]) !== null && _row$ !== void 0 ? _row$ : '').trim() : '';
        }).filter(Boolean);
        if (dneList.length === 0) throw new Error('empty');
        setConfig(function (prev) {
          return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, prev), {}, {
            globalMTE: dneList.length,
            rotationDneList: dneList,
            rotationDneFileName: file.name
          }));
        });
        showStatus("Excel cargado (".concat(dneList.length, " DNE). Plantilla MTE ajustada a ").concat(dneList.length, "."));
      } catch (_) {
        showStatus('Error al leer Excel: usa una sola columna con un DNE por fila');
      }
    };
    reader.onerror = function () {
      return showStatus('Error al leer el Excel');
    };
    reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
    e.target.value = '';
  };
  var clearRotationExcel = function clearRotationExcel() {
    setConfig(function (prev) {
      return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, prev), {}, {
        rotationDneList: [],
        rotationDneFileName: ''
      }));
    });
    showStatus('Listado de DNE eliminado');
  };
  var moveRotationUnit = function moveRotationUnit(fromIdx, direction) {
    setConfig(function (prev) {
      var current = normalizeRotationUnitSequence(prev.rotationUnitSequence);
      var toIdx = fromIdx + direction;
      if (toIdx < 0 || toIdx >= current.length) return prev;
      var nextSeq = _toConsumableArray(current);
      var tmp = nextSeq[fromIdx];
      nextSeq[fromIdx] = nextSeq[toIdx];
      nextSeq[toIdx] = tmp;
      return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, prev), {}, {
        rotationUnitSequence: nextSeq
      }));
    });
  };
  var resetRotationUnitSequence = function resetRotationUnitSequence() {
    setConfig(function (prev) {
      return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, prev), {}, {
        rotationUnitSequence: DEFAULT_ROTATION_ASSIGNMENT_UNIT_SEQUENCE
      }));
    });
    showStatus('Secuencia de rotaciÃ³n restaurada');
  };
  var rotationUnitSequence = useMemo(function () {
    return normalizeRotationUnitSequence(config.rotationUnitSequence);
  }, [config.rotationUnitSequence]);
  var handleSave = function handleSave() {
    var saved = typeof onSaveConfig === 'function' ? onSaveConfig(config) : false;
    showStatus(saved ? "ConfiguraciÃ³n guardada" : "Error al guardar");
  };
  var handleExportTxt = function handleExportTxt() {
    try {
      var text = JSON.stringify(config, null, 2);
      var blob = new Blob([text], {
        type: 'text/plain;charset=utf-8'
      });
      var now = new Date();
      var stamp = "".concat(now.getFullYear()).concat(String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')).concat(String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0'), "_").concat(String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0')).concat(String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')).concat(String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0'));
      var a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      a.download = "scmm_ajustes_".concat(stamp, ".txt");
      document.body.appendChild(a);
      a.click();
      document.body.removeChild(a);
      URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
      showStatus("Ajustes exportados");
    } catch (err) {
      showStatus("Error al exportar");
    }
  };
  var handleImportTxt = function handleImportTxt(e) {
    var file = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    var reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function () {
      try {
        var raw = String(reader.result || '');
        var parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
        if (!parsed || _typeof(parsed) !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) throw new Error('invalid');
        setConfig(function (prev) {
          var next = _objectSpread({}, prev);
          Object.keys(prev).forEach(function (key) {
            if (!(key in parsed)) return;
            var incoming = parsed[key];
            var current = prev[key];
            if (typeof current === 'number') {
              var n = Number(incoming);
              next[key] = Number.isFinite(n) ? n : current;
            } else if (Array.isArray(current)) {
              next[key] = Array.isArray(incoming) ? incoming : current;
            } else {
              next[key] = incoming;
            }
          });
          return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(next);
        });
        showStatus("Ajustes importados");
      } catch (err) {
        showStatus("Error al importar: formato invÃ¡lido");
      }
    };
    reader.onerror = function () {
      return showStatus("Error al leer el archivo");
    };
    reader.readAsText(file, 'utf-8');
    e.target.value = '';
  };

// --- 4. COMPONENTE MES VISUAL (GRID) ---
function Month(_ref4) {
  var tipo = _ref4.tipo,
    monthIdx = _ref4.monthIdx,
    year = _ref4.year,
    groupShift = _ref4.groupShift,
    redDaysSet = _ref4.redDaysSet,
    getCupo = _ref4.getCupo,
    getCupoPAP = _ref4.getCupoPAP,
    selectedDays = _ref4.selectedDays,
    selectedPAPDays = _ref4.selectedPAPDays,
    papModeEnabled = _ref4.papModeEnabled,
    onDayClick = _ref4.onDayClick,
    onPapDayClick = _ref4.onPapDayClick,
    isConfirmed = _ref4.isConfirmed,
    festivos = _ref4.festivos,
    anchorMonday = _ref4.anchorMonday,
    sequence = _ref4.sequence,
    getVacationStatus = _ref4.getVacationStatus,
    getRMStatus = _ref4.getRMStatus,
    cyclesC = _ref4.cyclesC,
    selectedCycleC = _ref4.selectedCycleC;
  var daysInMonth = new Date(year, monthIdx + 1, 0).getDate();
  var firstDayDate = new Date(year, monthIdx, 1);
  var firstDayWeekday = firstDayDate.getDay();
  var firstDayIdx = firstDayWeekday === 0 ? 6 : firstDayWeekday - 1;
  var festivosSet = useMemo(function () {
    return new Set(festivos);
  }, [festivos]);
  var selectedDaysSet = useMemo(function () {
    return new Set(selectedDays);
  }, [selectedDays]);
  var selectedPAPDaysSet = useMemo(function () {
    return new Set(selectedPAPDays);
  }, [selectedPAPDays]);
  var effectivePapMode = tipo === 'C' ? true : papModeEnabled;
  var days = [];
  var _loop = function _loop() {
    var current = new Date(year, monthIdx, d);
    var dayOfWeek = current.getDay();
    var esSD = dayOfWeek === 0 || dayOfWeek === 6;
    var dayId = "".concat(monthIdx, "-").concat(d);
    var esF = festivosSet.has(dayId);
    var diffToMonday = dayOfWeek === 0 ? 6 : dayOfWeek - 1;
    var currentMonday = new Date(current);
    currentMonday.setDate(current.getDate() - diffToMonday);
    currentMonday.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    var weeksBetween = Math.round((currentMonday - anchorMonday) / MS_PER_WEEK);
    var seqIdx = (weeksBetween - groupShift) % 4;
    if (seqIdx < 0) seqIdx += 4;
    var isDescansoA = sequence[seqIdx].includes(dayOfWeek);
    var isDescansoB = tipo === 'B' && redDaysSet.has(dayId);
    var currentCycle = tipo === 'C' ? cyclesC.find(function (c) {
      return current >= c.start && current <= c.end;
    }) : null;
    var isCCRBase = tipo === 'C' ? seqIdx === 0 || seqIdx === 1 || seqIdx === 2 && dayOfWeek === 1 : false;
    var _getVacationStatus = getVacationStatus(current),
      isSummer = _getVacationStatus.isSummer,
      isPfa = _getVacationStatus.isPfa;
    var _ref5 = getRMStatus ? getRMStatus(current) : {
        isRMDay: false,
        isRMInside: false
      },
      isRMDay = _ref5.isRMDay,
      isRMInside = _ref5.isRMInside;
    var isVacation = isSummer || isPfa;
    var cupo = getCupo(monthIdx, d, esSD, esF);
    var isSelectedA = tipo === 'A' && selectedDaysSet.has(dayId);
    var isSelectedC = tipo === 'C' && selectedCycleC && current >= selectedCycleC.start && current <= selectedCycleC.end;
    var isSelectedPAP = selectedPAPDaysSet.has(dayId);
    var papCupoBase = getCupoPAP ? getCupoPAP(monthIdx, d, dayOfWeek) : 0;
    var papCupo = Math.max(0, papCupoBase - (isSelectedPAP ? 1 : 0));
    var papBlocked = isDescansoA || isDescansoB || isVacation || isSelectedA || isSelectedC || isRMDay && isRMInside;
    var baseClass = "cell-base";
    if (tipo === 'C') {
      if (isSelectedC) baseClass += " ccr-selected";else if (isDescansoA) baseClass += " descanso-yellow";else if (isCCRBase && currentCycle) {
        baseClass += currentCycle.isIncompatible ? " bg-red-50 text-red-300" : " ccr-".concat(currentCycle.availabilityLevel);
      }
    } else {
      if (isDescansoB) baseClass += " descanso-red";else if (isDescansoA) baseClass += " descanso-yellow";else if (isSelectedA) baseClass += isConfirmed ? " sel-confirmed" : " sel-selected";else if (cupo === 0 && tipo === 'A') baseClass += " bg-red-50";
    }
    if (isRMDay && isRMInside) baseClass += " rm-day-inside";else if (isRMDay && !isRMInside) baseClass += " rm-day-outside";
    if (isSelectedPAP && !isSelectedC) baseClass += " pap-selected";
    var isOpacity60 = false;
    if (isVacation && !isSelectedA && !isSelectedC) isOpacity60 = true;
    if (tipo === 'A' && cupo === 0 && !isSelectedA && !isDescansoA && !isDescansoB) isOpacity60 = true;
    if (isRMDay && isRMInside && !isSelectedA && !isSelectedC) isOpacity60 = true;
    var badgeClass = cupo === 0 ? "cupo-empty" : cupo <= 5 ? "cupo-low" : "cupo-ok";
    var papBadgeClass = papCupo === 0 ? "cupo-empty" : papCupo <= 10 ? "cupo-low" : "cupo-ok";
    days.push({
      d: d,
      dayId: dayId,
      dayOfWeek: dayOfWeek,
      isDescansoA: isDescansoA,
      isDescansoB: isDescansoB,
      isVacation: isVacation,
      isSummer: isSummer,
      isPfa: isPfa,
      isRMDay: isRMDay,
      isRMInside: isRMInside,
      cupo: cupo,
      badgeClass: badgeClass,
      papCupoBase: papCupoBase,
      papCupo: papCupo,
      papBadgeClass: papBadgeClass,
      papBlocked: papBlocked,
      baseClass: baseClass,
      isSelectedA: isSelectedA,
      isOpacity60: isOpacity60,
      esF: esF,
      esSD: esSD
    });
  };
  for (var d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
    _loop();
  }
  return /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div", {
    className: "bg-white/50 rounded-lg border border-white/60 p-2 md:p-3 shadow-sm flex flex-col min-h-[260px] relative z-10 backdrop-blur-md"
  }, /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("h3", {
    className: "text-[#2563eb] font-bold text-center text-xs md:text-sm capitalize mb-2 pb-1 border-b border-gray-100/50"
  }, MESES[monthIdx]), /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div", {
    className: "grid grid-cols-7 gap-px text-center text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1"
  }, ['L', 'M', 'X', 'J', 'V', 'S', 'D'].map(function (d) {
    return /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div", {
      key: d
    }, d);
  })), /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div", {
    className: "grid grid-cols-7 grid-rows-6 gap-[1px] flex-1"
  }, Array(firstDayIdx).fill(0).map(function (_, i) {
    return /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div", {
      key: "b-".concat(i)
    });
  }), days.map(function (day) {
    return /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div", {
      key: day.d,
      onClick: function onClick() {
        if (effectivePapMode) {
          onPapDayClick(monthIdx, day.d, day.dayOfWeek, day.papBlocked, day.papCupoBase);
          return;
        }
        if (tipo === 'B' || tipo === 'C' || day.isDescansoA || day.isDescansoB || day.isVacation && !day.isSelectedA || day.isRMDay && day.isRMInside) return;
        if (day.cupo > 0 || day.isSelectedA) onDayClick(monthIdx, day.d, day.esSD, day.esF, day.isDescansoA || day.isDescansoB, day.isVacation, day.isRMDay && day.isRMInside);
      },
      className: "".concat(day.baseClass, " ").concat(day.isOpacity60 ? 'cursor-not-allowed opacity-60' : '')
    }, /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("span", {
      className: "text-[11px] md:text-xs leading-none flex items-center justify-center ".concat(day.esF || day.esSD ? 'text-red-500 font-bold' : day.isDescansoB ? 'text-red-800 font-bold' : 'text-gray-800')
    }, day.d, day.isSummer && /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("span", {
      className: "icon-overlay"
    }, "\xE2\u02DC\u20AC\xEF\xB8\x8F"), day.isPfa && /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("span", {
      className: "icon-overlay"
    }, "\xE2\x9D\u201E\xEF\xB8\x8F"), day.isRMDay && !day.isRMInside && /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("span", {
      className: "icon-overlay"
    }, "\xF0\u0178\xA9\xBA")), effectivePapMode ? /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div", {
      className: "cupo-badge ".concat(day.papBadgeClass)
    }, day.papCupo) : tipo === 'A' && /*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div", {
      className: "cupo-badge ".concat(day.badgeClass)
    }, day.cupo));
  })));
}

function SimuladorEngine(_ref6) {
  var _config$maxPAPGlobal;

    config = _ref6.config,

    _useState0 = _slicedToArray(_useState9, 2),

  var _useState1 = useState(0),
    _useState10 = _slicedToArray(_useState1, 2),
    groupShift = _useState10[0],
    setGroupShift = _useState10[1];
  var _useState11 = useState(0),
    _useState12 = _slicedToArray(_useState11, 2),
    subGroupIdx = _useState12[0],
    setSubGroupIdx = _useState12[1];
  var _useState13 = useState(false),
    _useState14 = _slicedToArray(_useState13, 2),
    enableVacations = _useState14[0],

    _useState16 = _slicedToArray(_useState15, 2),
    vacationRowId = _useState16[0],
    setVacationRowId = _useState16[1];
  var _useState17 = useState(0),
    _useState18 = _slicedToArray(_useState17, 2),
    pfaIdx = _useState18[0],
    setPfaIdx = _useState18[1];
  var _useState19 = useState("fuera"),
    _useState20 = _slicedToArray(_useState19, 2),
    rmStatus = _useState20[0],
    setRmStatus = _useState20[1];
  var _useState21 = useState(true),
    _useState22 = _slicedToArray(_useState21, 2),
    creditsEnabled = _useState22[0],
    setCreditsEnabled = _useState22[1];
  var _useState23 = useState(DEFAULT_FLEX_DAYS_A),
    _useState24 = _slicedToArray(_useState23, 2),
    maxCredits = _useState24[0],
    setMaxCredits = _useState24[1];
  var _useState25 = useState([]),
    _useState26 = _slicedToArray(_useState25, 2),
    selectedDays = _useState26[0],
    setSelectedDays = _useState26[1];
  var _useState27 = useState([]),
    _useState28 = _slicedToArray(_useState27, 2),
    selectedPAPDays = _useState28[0],
    setSelectedPAPDays = _useState28[1];
  var _useState29 = useState(false),
    _useState30 = _slicedToArray(_useState29, 2),
    papModeEnabled = _useState30[0],
    setPapModeEnabled = _useState30[1];
  var _useState31 = useState(false),
    _useState32 = _slicedToArray(_useState31, 2),
    isConfirmed = _useState32[0],
    setIsConfirmed = _useState32[1];
  var _useState33 = useState(null),
    _useState34 = _slicedToArray(_useState33, 2),
    selectedCycleC = _useState34[0],
    setSelectedCycleC = _useState34[1];
  var _useState35 = useState(false),
    _useState36 = _slicedToArray(_useState35, 2),
    showLogica = _useState36[0],
    setShowLogica = _useState36[1];
  var _useState37 = useState(false),
    _useState38 = _slicedToArray(_useState37, 2),
    showHelp = _useState38[0],
    setShowHelp = _useState38[1];
  var appliedScenarioTokenRef = useRef(null);
  useEffect(function () {
    if (!initialScenario || initialScenario.tipo !== tipo) return;
    if (appliedScenarioTokenRef.current === initialScenario.token) return;
    var safeYear = Number(initialScenario.year);
    if (Number.isFinite(safeYear)) setYear(safeYear);
    var safeGroupShift = Number(initialScenario.groupShift);
    if (Number.isFinite(safeGroupShift) && safeGroupShift >= 0 && safeGroupShift <= 3) {
      setGroupShift(safeGroupShift);
    }
    var safeSubGroupIdx = Number(initialScenario.subGroupIdx);
    if (tipo === 'B' && Number.isFinite(safeSubGroupIdx) && safeSubGroupIdx >= 0 && safeSubGroupIdx <= 5) {
      setSubGroupIdx(safeSubGroupIdx);
    } else {
      setSubGroupIdx(0);
    }
    var vacIdNum = Number(initialScenario.vacationRowId);
    if (Number.isFinite(vacIdNum) && vacIdNum > 0) {
      setEnableVacations(true);
      setVacationRowId(String(vacIdNum));
      var vacRow = VACATION_DATA.find(function (v) {
        return v.id === vacIdNum;
      });
      var safePfaIdx = Number(initialScenario.pfaIdx);
      var maxPfa = vacRow ? Math.max(0, vacRow.pfa.length - 1) : 0;
      var nextPfaIdx = Number.isFinite(safePfaIdx) ? Math.min(maxPfa, Math.max(0, safePfaIdx)) : 0;
      setPfaIdx(nextPfaIdx);
    } else {
      setEnableVacations(false);
      setVacationRowId("");
      setPfaIdx(0);
    }
    if (initialScenario.rmStatus === 'dentro' || initialScenario.rmStatus === 'fuera') {
      setRmStatus(initialScenario.rmStatus);
    }
    setSelectedDays([]);
    setSelectedPAPDays([]);
    setSelectedCycleC(null);

  var isRestForGroup = useCallback(function (date, gShift) {
    var dow = date.getDay();
    var diff = dow === 0 ? 6 : dow - 1;
    var mon = new Date(date);
    mon.setDate(date.getDate() - diff);
    mon.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    var wb = Math.round((mon - ANCHOR_MONDAY) / MS_PER_WEEK);
    var si = (wb - gShift) % 4;
    if (si < 0) si += 4;
    return SEQUENCE[si].includes(dow);
  }, []);
  var getAdjustedPfaRange = useCallback(function (pfaOpt, targetGroupShift) {
    var originalStart = new Date(year, pfaOpt.start.m, pfaOpt.start.d);
    var actualStart = new Date(originalStart);
    var originalEnd = new Date(year, pfaOpt.end.m, pfaOpt.end.d);
    var durationMs = originalEnd.getTime() - originalStart.getTime();
    var isDecemberPfa11To31 = pfaOpt.start.m === 11 && pfaOpt.start.d === 11;
    var safety = 0;
    while (isRestForGroup(actualStart, targetGroupShift) && safety < 10) {
      actualStart.setDate(actualStart.getDate() + (isDecemberPfa11To31 ? -1 : 1));
      safety++;
    }
    var pfaStart = actualStart.getTime();
    var pfaEnd = pfaStart + durationMs;
    if (isDecemberPfa11To31 && actualStart.getTime() < originalStart.getTime()) {
      pfaEnd = originalEnd.getTime();
    }
    return {
      pfaStart: pfaStart,
      pfaEnd: pfaEnd
    };
  }, [year, isRestForGroup]);

  var semanaSantaRange = useMemo(function () {
    var easter = getEasterDate(year);

    start.setDate(easter.getDate() - 7);

  var festivosDelAno = useMemo(function () {
    var fixed = ["0-1", "0-6", "4-1", "4-2", "4-15", "7-15", "9-12", "10-1", "10-9", "11-6", "11-8", "11-25"];
    var easter = getEasterDate(year);

  var isBridgeDayA = useCallback(function (date) {
    var dow = date.getDay();
    if (dow === 0 || dow === 6 || isHolidayDateA(date)) return false;
    var prev = new Date(date);
    prev.setDate(date.getDate() - 1);
    prev.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    var next = new Date(date);
    next.setDate(date.getDate() + 1);
    next.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    var betweenTwoHolidays = isHolidayDateA(prev) && isHolidayDateA(next);
    var mondayOffset = dow === 0 ? 6 : dow - 1;
    var monday = new Date(date);
    monday.setDate(date.getDate() - mondayOffset);
    monday.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    var friday = new Date(monday);
    friday.setDate(monday.getDate() + 4);
    friday.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    var sameWeekLongWeekend = isHolidayDateA(monday) || isHolidayDateA(friday);
    return betweenTwoHolidays || sameWeekLongWeekend;
  }, [isHolidayDateA]);
  var getFactorPresionA = useCallback(function (m, d, esSD, esF) {
    var date = new Date(year, m, d);
    var t = date.getTime();
    var isSummerCore = m === 6 || m === 7;
    var isSummerShoulder = m === 5 && d >= 15 || m === 8 && d <= 15;
    var isWinter = m === 11 && d >= 20;
    var isSemanaSanta = t >= semanaSantaRange.start && t <= semanaSantaRange.end;
    var factor = config.presionLab;
    if (isSummerCore) factor = esSD ? config.presionAltaSD : config.presionAltaLab;else if (isSummerShoulder) factor = esSD ? config.presionAltaSD - 5 : config.presionAltaLab;else if (isSemanaSanta) factor = config.presionSemanaSanta;else if (isWinter) factor = esSD ? config.presionInviernoSD : config.presionInviernoLab;else if (esF) factor = config.presionFes;else if (esSD) factor = config.presionSD;
    if (!esSD && !esF) {
      if (isBridgeDayA(date)) factor = Math.max(factor, Number(config.presionPuentes) || 0);
      if (date.getDay() === 5) factor = Math.max(factor, Number(config.presionViernes) || 0);
      if (date.getDay() === 2) factor = Math.max(factor, Number(config.presionMartes) || 0);
    }
    return factor;
  }, [year, semanaSantaRange, config, isBridgeDayA]);
  var getMteDayBreakdown = useCallback(function (date) {
    var t = date.getTime();
    var mteActivo = 0;
    var mteDescanso = 0;
    var mteVacPfa = 0;
    var safeGroupBase = (config.globalMTE || 2100) / 4;
    var _loop2 = function _loop2() {
      if (isRestForGroup(date, g)) {
        mteDescanso += mtePorGrupo;
        return 1; // continue
      }
      var ausentesInGroup = 0;
      var grupoList = mtePersonasPorGrupo.get(g) || [];
      grupoList.forEach(function (p) {
        if (t >= p.summerStart && t <= p.summerEnd || t >= p.pfaStart && t <= p.pfaEnd) {
          ausentesInGroup += p.cohortMTE * (mtePorGrupo / safeGroupBase);
        }
      });
      var vacPfaInGroup = Math.min(mtePorGrupo, Math.max(0, ausentesInGroup));
      mteVacPfa += vacPfaInGroup;
      mteActivo += Math.max(0, mtePorGrupo - vacPfaInGroup);
    };
    for (var g = 0; g < 4; g++) {
      if (_loop2()) continue;
    }
    return {
      active: Math.max(0, mteActivo),
      rest: Math.max(0, mteDescanso),
      vacation: Math.max(0, mteVacPfa)
    };
  }, [config.globalMTE, isRestForGroup, mtePersonasPorGrupo, mtePorGrupo]);
  var getActiveMteForDate = useCallback(function (date) {

  var autoAssignmentA = useMemo(function () {
    var _config$creditosAutoA2;
    var emptyBreakdown = {
      lab: {
        total: 0,
        remaining: 0,
        consumed: 0
      },
      sd: {
        total: 0,
        remaining: 0,
        consumed: 0
      },
      fes: {
        total: 0,
        remaining: 0,
        consumed: 0
      }
    };
    if (tipo !== 'A') return {
      total: 0,
      remaining: 0,
      consumed: 0,
      byType: emptyBreakdown,
      byDay: new Map()
    };
    var dayRows = [];
    var byType = {
      lab: {
        total: 0,
        remaining: 0,
        consumed: 0
      },
      sd: {
        total: 0,
        remaining: 0,
        consumed: 0
      },
      fes: {
        total: 0,
        remaining: 0,
        consumed: 0
      }
    };
    var total = 0;
    for (var m = 0; m < 12; m++) {
      var daysInMonth = new Date(year, m + 1, 0).getDate();
      for (var d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
        var date = new Date(year, m, d);
        var esSD = date.getDay() === 0 || date.getDay() === 6;
        var esF = festivosSet.has("".concat(m, "-").concat(d));
        var dayId = "".concat(m, "-").concat(d);
        var base = getBaseQuotaA(m, d, esSD, esF);
        var factor = getFactorPresionA(m, d, esSD, esF);
        var priority = factor * getAutoPriorityForMonthA(m);
        var typeKey = esF ? 'fes' : esSD ? 'sd' : 'lab';
        var activeMte = getActiveMteForDate(date);
        var maxAuto = Math.max(0, Math.min(base, Math.floor(activeMte)));
        dayRows.push({
          dayId: dayId,
          month: m,
          typeKey: typeKey,
          base: base,
          priority: priority,
          maxAuto: maxAuto,
          consumed: 0
        });
        byType[typeKey].total += base;
        total += base;
      }
    }
    var allocateDemand = function allocateDemand(filterFn, demand) {
      var left = Math.max(0, Math.round(demand));
      var candidates = dayRows.filter(filterFn);
      var grouped = new Map();
      var _iterator3 = _createForOfIteratorHelper(candidates),
        _step3;
      try {
        for (_iterator3.s(); !(_step3 = _iterator3.n()).done;) {
          var row = _step3.value;
          var key = row.priority.toFixed(6);
          if (!grouped.has(key)) grouped.set(key, []);
          grouped.get(key).push(row);
        }
      } catch (err) {
        _iterator3.e(err);
      } finally {
        _iterator3.f();
      }
      var sortedKeys = Array.from(grouped.keys()).sort(function (a, b) {
        return Number(b) - Number(a);
      });
      var _iterator4 = _createForOfIteratorHelper(sortedKeys),
        _step4;
      try {
        var _loop3 = function _loop3() {
            var key = _step4.value;
            if (left <= 0) return 0; // break
            var rows = grouped.get(key) || [];
            var rooms = rows.map(function (r) {
              return Math.max(0, r.maxAuto - r.consumed);
            });
            var totalRoom = rooms.reduce(function (sum, n) {
              return sum + n;
            }, 0);
            if (totalRoom <= 0) return 1; // continue
            if (left >= totalRoom) {
              rows.forEach(function (r, idx) {
                r.consumed += rooms[idx];
              });
              left -= totalRoom;
              return 1; // continue
            }
            var provisional = rows.map(function (r, idx) {
              var room = rooms[idx];
              var exact = room * left / totalRoom;
              var take = Math.min(room, Math.floor(exact));
              return {
                r: r,
                room: room,
                take: take,
                remainder: exact - take
              };
            });
            var assigned = provisional.reduce(function (sum, p) {
              return sum + p.take;
            }, 0);
            var pending = Math.max(0, left - assigned);
            provisional.filter(function (p) {
              return p.room > p.take;
            }).sort(function (a, b) {
              return b.remainder - a.remainder || b.room - a.room;
            }).forEach(function (p) {
              if (pending <= 0) return;
              p.take += 1;
              pending -= 1;
            });
            provisional.forEach(function (p) {
              p.r.consumed += p.take;
            });
            left = 0;
          },
          _ret;
        for (_iterator4.s(); !(_step4 = _iterator4.n()).done;) {
          _ret = _loop3();
          if (_ret === 0) break;
          if (_ret === 1) continue;
        }
      } catch (err) {
        _iterator4.e(err);
      } finally {
        _iterator4.f();
      }
      return left;
    };
    var mteUnits = Math.max(0, Math.round(mtePrecedenteTotal));
    var autoCreditsPerMTE = Math.max(0, Math.round(Number((_config$creditosAutoA2 = config.creditosAutoA) !== null && _config$creditosAutoA2 !== void 0 ? _config$creditosAutoA2 : DEFAULT_FLEX_DAYS_A)));
    var demandLab = mteUnits * REQUIRED_LAB_DAYS_A;
    var demandFlex = mteUnits * autoCreditsPerMTE;
    var pendingLab = allocateDemand(function (row) {
      return row.typeKey === 'lab';
    }, demandLab);
    var _pendingFlex = allocateDemand(function () {
      return true;
    }, demandFlex + pendingLab);
    var byDay = new Map();
    for (var _i2 = 0, _dayRows = dayRows; _i2 < _dayRows.length; _i2++) {
      var row = _dayRows[_i2];
      byDay.set(row.dayId, row.consumed);
      byType[row.typeKey].consumed += row.consumed;
    }
    byType.lab.remaining = Math.max(0, byType.lab.total - byType.lab.consumed);
    byType.sd.remaining = Math.max(0, byType.sd.total - byType.sd.consumed);
    byType.fes.remaining = Math.max(0, byType.fes.total - byType.fes.consumed);
    var byMonth = Array.from({
      length: 12
    }, function (_, idx) {
      return {
        mes: MESES[idx],
        total: 0,
        consumed: 0,
        remaining: 0
      };
    });
    for (var _i3 = 0, _dayRows2 = dayRows; _i3 < _dayRows2.length; _i3++) {
      var _row = _dayRows2[_i3];
      byMonth[_row.month].total += _row.base;
      byMonth[_row.month].consumed += _row.consumed;
    }
    byMonth.forEach(function (m) {
      m.remaining = Math.max(0, m.total - m.consumed);
    });
    var consumed = byType.lab.consumed + byType.sd.consumed + byType.fes.consumed;
    var remaining = Math.max(0, total - consumed);
    return {
      total: total,
      remaining: remaining,
      consumed: consumed,
      byType: byType,
      byDay: byDay,
      byMonth: byMonth,
      mteUnits: mteUnits,
      autoCreditsPerMTE: autoCreditsPerMTE,
      demandLab: demandLab,
      demandFlex: demandFlex,
      pendingLab: pendingLab,
      pendingFlex: _pendingFlex
    };
  }, [tipo, year, festivosSet, config, getFactorPresionA, getActiveMteForDate, mtePrecedenteTotal, getBaseQuotaA, getAutoPriorityForMonthA]);

  var logicaPrecedentesA = useMemo(function () {
    if (tipo !== 'A') return [];

      length: 12
    }, function (_, m) {

  var vacationImpactA = useMemo(function () {
    var empty = {
      july: {
        vacPct: 0,
        restPct: 0,
        activePct: 0
      },
      august: {
        vacPct: 0,
        restPct: 0,
        activePct: 0
      },
      annual: {
        vacPct: 0,
        restPct: 0,
        activePct: 0
      }
    };
    if (tipo !== 'A' || mtePrecedenteTotal <= 0) return empty;
    var perMonth = Array.from({
      length: 12
    }, function () {
      return {
        vacPct: 0,
        restPct: 0,
        activePct: 0,
        days: 0
      };
    });
    for (var m = 0; m < 12; m++) {
      var daysInMonth = new Date(year, m + 1, 0).getDate();
      for (var d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
        var breakdown = getMteDayBreakdown(new Date(year, m, d));
        perMonth[m].vacPct += breakdown.vacation * 100 / mtePrecedenteTotal;
        perMonth[m].restPct += breakdown.rest * 100 / mtePrecedenteTotal;
        perMonth[m].activePct += breakdown.active * 100 / mtePrecedenteTotal;
        perMonth[m].days += 1;
      }
    }
    var normalized = perMonth.map(function (m) {
      var div = Math.max(1, m.days);
      return {
        vacPct: m.vacPct / div,
        restPct: m.restPct / div,
        activePct: m.activePct / div
      };
    });
    var annual = normalized.reduce(function (acc, m) {
      return {
        vacPct: acc.vacPct + m.vacPct,
        restPct: acc.restPct + m.restPct,
        activePct: acc.activePct + m.activePct
      };
    }, {
      vacPct: 0,
      restPct: 0,
      activePct: 0
    });
    return {
      july: normalized[6],
      august: normalized[7],
      annual: {
        vacPct: annual.vacPct / 12,
        restPct: annual.restPct / 12,
        activePct: annual.activePct / 12
      }
    };
  }, [tipo, year, mtePrecedenteTotal, getMteDayBreakdown]);
  var fragmentsC = useMemo(function () {
    if (tipo !== 'C') return [];
    var safeGroupBase = (config.globalMTE || 2100) / 4;
    return mtePersonas.filter(function (p) {
      return p.group === groupShift;
    }).map(function (p, idx) {

      bloque: Math.round(globalMTE / 13),
      subbloque: Math.round(globalMTE / 39),
      subsubbloque: Math.round(globalMTE / 156)
    };
  }, [globalMTE]);
  var activeScheme = getGroupColor(selectedId.charAt(0));
  var selectedGroupLabel = useMemo(function () {
    return selectedId.charAt(0);
  }, [selectedId]);
  var selectedSubPosition = useMemo(function () {
    var parsed = parseInt(String(selectedId || '').slice(1), 10);
    return Number.isFinite(parsed) && parsed >= 1 && parsed <= 4 ? parsed : 1;
  }, [selectedId]);
  var sequence = useMemo(function () {
    return buildRotationSequence(startPos);
  }, [startPos]);
  var activePosition = sequence[currentStep % 13];
  var maxConfigYear = useMemo(function () {
    return Math.max(13, Number(config === null || config === void 0 ? void 0 : config.proyeccionAnos) || 15);
  }, [config]);
  var rotationDneList = useMemo(function () {
    return Array.isArray(config === null || config === void 0 ? void 0 : config.rotationDneList) ? config.rotationDneList.filter(Boolean) : [];
  }, [config]);
  var rotationTemplateSize = useMemo(function () {
    var loaded = rotationDneList.length;
    return loaded > 0 ? loaded : Math.max(0, Number(globalMTE) || 0);
  }, [rotationDneList, globalMTE]);
  var normalizedOnceNumber = useMemo(function () {
    var digitsOnly = String(onceNumber || '').replace(/\D/g, '').slice(0, 5);
    var parsed = Number(digitsOnly || '0');
    return Math.max(0, Math.min(99999, parsed));
  }, [onceNumber]);
  var formattedOnceNumber = useMemo(function () {
    return String(normalizedOnceNumber).padStart(5, '0');
  }, [normalizedOnceNumber]);
  var rotationUnitSequence = useMemo(function () {
    return normalizeRotationUnitSequence(config === null || config === void 0 ? void 0 : config.rotationUnitSequence);
  }, [config]);
  var winningStartPosition = useMemo(function () {
    if (rotationTemplateSize <= 0) return 0;
    return Math.floor(normalizedOnceNumber * rotationTemplateSize / 100000) + 1;
  }, [normalizedOnceNumber, rotationTemplateSize]);
  var winningStartDne = useMemo(function () {
    if (rotationDneList.length === 0 || winningStartPosition <= 0) return '';
    var startIdx = Math.min(rotationDneList.length - 1, Math.max(0, winningStartPosition - 1));
    return rotationDneList[startIdx] || '';
  }, [rotationDneList, winningStartPosition]);
  var rotationAssignmentSlots = useMemo(function () {
    return buildRotationAssignmentSlots(rotationDneList.length, rotationUnitSequence);
  }, [rotationDneList.length, rotationUnitSequence]);
  var orderedRotationDneList = useMemo(function () {
    if (rotationDneList.length === 0 || winningStartPosition <= 0) return [];
    var startIdx = Math.min(rotationDneList.length - 1, Math.max(0, winningStartPosition - 1));
    return [].concat(_toConsumableArray(rotationDneList.slice(startIdx)), _toConsumableArray(rotationDneList.slice(0, startIdx)));
  }, [rotationDneList, winningStartPosition]);
  var generatedRotationOrder = useMemo(function () {
    if (orderedRotationDneList.length === 0) return [];
    return orderedRotationDneList.map(function (dne, idx) {
      var slot = rotationAssignmentSlots[idx] || null;
      return {
        order: idx + 1,
        dne: dne,
        isWinningStart: idx === 0,
        block: (slot === null || slot === void 0 ? void 0 : slot.block) || null,
        unit: (slot === null || slot === void 0 ? void 0 : slot.unit) || '-',
        seat: (slot === null || slot === void 0 ? void 0 : slot.seat) || null,
        slotLabel: (slot === null || slot === void 0 ? void 0 : slot.label) || 'Sin hueco asignado'
      };
    });
  }, [orderedRotationDneList, rotationAssignmentSlots]);
  var normalizedRotationSearch = useMemo(function () {
    return String(rotationSearchTerm || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  }, [rotationSearchTerm]);
  var filteredRotationOrder = useMemo(function () {
    if (!normalizedRotationSearch) return generatedRotationOrder;
    return generatedRotationOrder.filter(function (row) {
      return String(row.dne || '').toLowerCase().includes(normalizedRotationSearch);
    });
  }, [generatedRotationOrder, normalizedRotationSearch]);
  var searchedRotationRow = useMemo(function () {
    if (!normalizedRotationSearch) return null;
    var exact = generatedRotationOrder.find(function (row) {
      return String(row.dne || '').toLowerCase() === normalizedRotationSearch;
    });
    if (exact) return exact;
    return filteredRotationOrder[0] || null;
  }, [generatedRotationOrder, filteredRotationOrder, normalizedRotationSearch]);
  var searchedRotationSummary = useMemo(function () {
    if (!searchedRotationRow) return null;
    var ahead = Math.max(0, searchedRotationRow.order - 1);
    var behind = Math.max(0, generatedRotationOrder.length - searchedRotationRow.order);
    return _objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, searchedRotationRow), {}, {
      ahead: ahead,
      behind: behind
    });
  }, [searchedRotationRow, generatedRotationOrder.length]);
  var canUseSearchedVision = useMemo(function () {
    return !!(searchedRotationSummary !== null && searchedRotationSummary !== void 0 && searchedRotationSummary.unit && ALL_ROTATION_UNITS.includes(searchedRotationSummary.unit));
  }, [searchedRotationSummary]);
  var visionUnitId = useMemo(function () {
    if (generalVisionMode === 'dne' && canUseSearchedVision) return searchedRotationSummary.unit;
    return selectedId;
  }, [generalVisionMode, canUseSearchedVision, searchedRotationSummary, selectedId]);
  var visionScheme = useMemo(function () {
    return getGroupColor(visionUnitId.charAt(0));

    if (generalVisionMode === 'dne' && canUseSearchedVision) return searchedRotationSummary.dne;
    return visionUnitId;
  }, [generalVisionMode, canUseSearchedVision, searchedRotationSummary, visionUnitId]);
  var visionHelperText = useMemo(function () {
    if (generalVisionMode === 'dne' && canUseSearchedVision) {
      return "Proyecci\xC3\xB3n autom\xC3\xA1tica para el DNE buscado, siguiendo su asignaci\xC3\xB3n actual en ".concat(searchedRotationSummary.slotLabel, ".");
    }
    return 'ProyecciÃ³n automÃ¡tica de posiciÃ³n, subbloque, subsubbloque y MTE delante para la unidad seleccionada.';
  }, [generalVisionMode, canUseSearchedVision, searchedRotationSummary]);
  var currentContent = getRotationBlockContent(currentStep);
  useEffect(function () {
    var i;
    if (isPlaying) {
      i = setInterval(function () {
        setCurrentStep(function (p) {
          return p + 1;
        });
      }, 2000);
    }
    return function () {
      return clearInterval(i);
    };
  }, [isPlaying]);
  useEffect(function () {
    setCurrentStep(0);
  }, [startPos]);
  var allSubSubBlocks = ALL_ROTATION_UNITS;
  var subBlockRangeLabel = "".concat(ROTATION_GROUPS[0], "..").concat(ROTATION_GROUPS[ROTATION_GROUPS.length - 1]);
  var unitRangeLabel = allSubSubBlocks.length > 0 ? "".concat(allSubSubBlocks[0], "..").concat(allSubSubBlocks[allSubSubBlocks.length - 1]) : '-';
  var allPositions = [].concat(ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE).sort(function (a, b) {
    return a - b;
  });
  var sequenceYears = useMemo(function () {
    return Array.from({
      length: 13
    }, function (_, idx) {
      var step = idx;
      return {
        yearOffset: idx + 1,
        blockPos: sequence[idx % 13],
        content: getRotationBlockContent(step)
      };
    });
  }, [sequence]);
  var canonicalPositionOrderByPos = useMemo(function () {
    var map = {};
    ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE.forEach(function (pos, idx) {
      map[pos] = idx;
    });
    return map;
  }, []);
  var getGeneralSequenceCellData = useCallback(function (yearIdx, pos) {
    if (generalSequenceMode === 'unidad') {
      var yearData = sequenceYears[yearIdx];
      return {
        blockId: null,
        content: yearData && pos === yearData.blockPos ? yearData.content : null
      };
    }
    var posOrder = canonicalPositionOrderByPos[pos];
    if (typeof posOrder !== 'number') return {
      blockId: null,
      content: null
    };
    var cycleLen = ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE.length;
    var normalizedYear = (yearIdx % cycleLen + cycleLen) % cycleLen;
    var blockOrder = (posOrder - normalizedYear + cycleLen) % cycleLen;
    var blockId = ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE[blockOrder];
    var step = blockOrder + yearIdx;
    return {
      blockId: blockId,
      content: getRotationBlockContent(step)
    };
  }, [generalSequenceMode, sequenceYears, canonicalPositionOrderByPos]);
  var exportSequenceExcel = useCallback(function () {
    try {
      var stamp = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-');
      var modeSuffix = generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 'todos_bloques' : 'unidad';
      var groupExcelColors = {
        A: {
          bg: '#dcfce7',
          bd: '#86efac'
        },
        B: {
          bg: '#fef9c3',
          bd: '#fde047'
        },
        C: {
          bg: '#fee2e2',
          bd: '#fca5a5'
        }
      };
      var trackedGroup = selectedId.charAt(0);
      var trackedGroupBg = (groupExcelColors[trackedGroup] || {
        bg: '#eef2ff'
      }).bg;
      var headerYears = sequenceYears.map(function (y) {
        return generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? "<th>A\xC3\xB1o ".concat(y.yearOffset, "<br><span style=\"color:#1d4ed8;font-weight:700\">P").concat(y.blockPos, "</span></th>") : "<th>A\xC3\xB1o ".concat(y.yearOffset, "</th>");
      }).join('');
      var rowsHtml = allPositions.map(function (pos) {
        var cells = sequenceYears.map(function (_, yearIdx) {
          var cellData = getGeneralSequenceCellData(yearIdx, pos);
          var content = cellData.content;
          if (!content) {
            return '<td style="text-align:center;color:#9ca3af;">Â·</td>';
          }
          var blockTag = generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? "<span style=\"display:inline-block;font-size:9pt;font-weight:700;color:#1d4ed8;margin-bottom:2px;\">Bloque ".concat(cellData.blockId, "</span><br>") : '';
          var cellLines = content.map(function (group) {
            var c = groupExcelColors[group.label] || {
              bg: '#f3f4f6',
              bd: '#d1d5db'
            };
            return "<tr><td bgcolor=\"".concat(c.bg, "\" style=\"background:").concat(c.bg, ";color:#111827;border:1px solid ").concat(c.bd, ";padding:2px 4px;font-weight:700;\">").concat(group.label, ": ").concat(group.subs.map(function (num) {
              return "".concat(group.label).concat(num);
            }).join(' '), "</td></tr>");
          }).join('');
          var outerCellBg = generalSequenceMode === 'unidad' ? trackedGroupBg : '#ffffff';
          return "<td bgcolor=\"".concat(outerCellBg, "\" style=\"background:").concat(outerCellBg, ";\">").concat(blockTag, "<table role=\"presentation\" cellspacing=\"0\" cellpadding=\"0\" border=\"0\" style=\"width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;\"><tbody>").concat(cellLines, "</tbody></table></td>");
        }).join('');
        return "<tr><td><b>P".concat(pos, "</b></td>").concat(cells, "</tr>");
      }).join('');
      var html = "\n<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html>\n<head>\n<meta charset=\"utf-8\" />\n<style>\ntable { border-collapse: collapse; font-family: Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11pt; }\nth, td { border: 1px solid #d1d5db; padding: 6px 8px; vertical-align: top; }\nth { background: #f3f4f6; text-align: center; }\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n<h3>Secuencia General (13 a\xC3\xB1os)</h3>\n<p>Inicio: Posici\xC3\xB3n ".concat(startPos, "</p>\n<p>Modo: ").concat(generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 'Todos los bloques' : 'Seguimiento unidad', "</p>\n<table>\n<thead><tr><th>Posici\xC3\xB3n</th>").concat(headerYears, "</tr></thead>\n<tbody>").concat(rowsHtml, "</tbody>\n</table>\n</body>\n</html>");
      var blob = new Blob(["\uFEFF", html], {
        type: 'application/vnd.ms-excel;charset=utf-8;'
      });
      var a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      a.download = "secuencia_general_13a_".concat(modeSuffix, "_").concat(stamp, ".xls");
      document.body.appendChild(a);
      a.click();
      document.body.removeChild(a);
      URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
    } catch (_) {
      alert('No se pudo exportar Excel.');
    }
  }, [sequenceYears, allPositions, startPos, generalSequenceMode, getGeneralSequenceCellData, selectedId]);
  var exportSequenceImageHd = useCallback(function () {
    try {
      var stamp = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-');
      var modeSuffix = generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 'todos_bloques' : 'unidad';
      var firstColW = 120;
      var cellW = 180;
      var headerH = generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 70 : 50;
      var cellH = 110;
      var width = firstColW + sequenceYears.length * cellW;
      var height = headerH + allPositions.length * cellH;
      var scale = 2;
      var canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
      canvas.width = width * scale;
      canvas.height = height * scale;
      var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      if (!ctx) throw new Error('canvas');
      ctx.scale(scale, scale);
      var groupTextColor = {
        A: '#166534',
        B: '#854d0e',
        C: '#991b1b'
      };
      var groupBgColor = {
        A: '#dcfce7',
        B: '#fef9c3',
        C: '#fee2e2'
      };
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d1d5db';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      for (var c = 0; c <= sequenceYears.length; c++) {
        var x = firstColW + c * cellW;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x, 0);
        ctx.lineTo(x, height);
        ctx.stroke();
      }
      for (var r = 0; r <= allPositions.length; r++) {
        var y = headerH + r * cellH;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, y);
        ctx.lineTo(width, y);
        ctx.stroke();
      }
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
      ctx.lineTo(0, height);
      ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
      ctx.lineTo(width, 0);
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.fillStyle = '#374151';
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px Arial';
      ctx.textAlign = 'center';
      ctx.fillText('PosiciÃ³n', firstColW / 2, generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 28 : 30);
      sequenceYears.forEach(function (y, cIdx) {
        var x = firstColW + cIdx * cellW + cellW / 2;
        ctx.fillText("A\xC3\xB1o ".concat(y.yearOffset), x, generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 24 : 30);
        if (generalSequenceMode === 'todos') {
          ctx.fillStyle = '#1d4ed8';
          ctx.font = 'bold 11px Arial';
          ctx.fillText("P".concat(y.blockPos), x, 46);
          ctx.fillStyle = '#374151';
          ctx.font = 'bold 12px Arial';
        }
      });
      allPositions.forEach(function (pos, rIdx) {
        var rowY = headerH + rIdx * cellH;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#111827';
        ctx.font = 'bold 13px Arial';
        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
        ctx.fillText("P".concat(pos), firstColW / 2, rowY + 22);
        sequenceYears.forEach(function (yearData, cIdx) {
          var x = firstColW + cIdx * cellW;
          var y = rowY;
          var cellData = getGeneralSequenceCellData(cIdx, pos);
          var content = cellData.content;
          var hasContent = Array.isArray(content) && content.length > 0;
          var isYearBlockPos = pos === yearData.blockPos;
          var shouldHighlightCell = hasContent && (generalSequenceMode !== 'todos' || isYearBlockPos);
          if (shouldHighlightCell) {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#dbeafe';
            ctx.fillRect(x + 1, y + 1, cellW - 2, cellH - 2);
          }
          if (!hasContent) {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#d1d5db';
            ctx.font = 'bold 16px Arial';
            ctx.fillText('Â·', x + cellW / 2, y + cellH / 2);
            return;
          }
          var lineY = y + 18;
          if (generalSequenceMode === 'todos') {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#1d4ed8';
            ctx.font = 'bold 10px Arial';
            ctx.textAlign = 'left';
            ctx.fillText("Bloque ".concat(cellData.blockId), x + 10, lineY + 1);
            lineY += 18;
          }
          content.forEach(function (group) {
            var line = "".concat(group.label, ": ").concat(group.subs.map(function (num) {
              return "".concat(group.label).concat(num);
            }).join(' '));
            ctx.fillStyle = groupBgColor[group.label] || '#e5e7eb';
            ctx.fillRect(x + 6, lineY - 11, cellW - 12, 18);
            ctx.fillStyle = groupTextColor[group.label] || '#374151';
            ctx.font = 'bold 10px Arial';
            ctx.textAlign = 'left';
            ctx.fillText(line, x + 10, lineY + 2);
            lineY += 24;
          });
        });
      });
      var a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
      a.download = "secuencia_general_13a_hd_".concat(modeSuffix, "_").concat(stamp, ".png");
      document.body.appendChild(a);
      a.click();
      document.body.removeChild(a);
    } catch (_) {
      alert('No se pudo exportar imagen.');
    }
  }, [sequenceYears, allPositions, generalSequenceMode, getGeneralSequenceCellData]);

function SimuladorAnalisis(_ref8) {
  var _config$globalMTE;
  var config = _ref8.config,
    onBack = _ref8.onBack,
    onOpenScenario = _ref8.onOpenScenario;
  var _useState61 = useState(2027),
    _useState62 = _slicedToArray(_useState61, 2),
    year = _useState62[0],
    setYear = _useState62[1];
  var _useState63 = useState('fuera'),
    _useState64 = _slicedToArray(_useState63, 2),
    rmStatus = _useState64[0],
    setRmStatus = _useState64[1];
  var _useState65 = useState('todos'),
    _useState66 = _slicedToArray(_useState65, 2),
    calendarFilter = _useState66[0],
    setCalendarFilter = _useState66[1];
  var _useState67 = useState(function () {
      return new Set();
    }),
    _useState68 = _slicedToArray(_useState67, 2),
    expandedGroups = _useState68[0],
    setExpandedGroups = _useState68[1];
  var _useState69 = useState({}),
    _useState70 = _slicedToArray(_useState69, 2),
    detailSortByGroup = _useState70[0],
    setDetailSortByGroup = _useState70[1];
  var _useState71 = useState(false),
    _useState72 = _slicedToArray(_useState71, 2),
    periodAnalysisOpen = _useState72[0],
    setPeriodAnalysisOpen = _useState72[1];
  var autoLibranzasA = REQUIRED_LAB_DAYS_A;
  var totalMTE = Math.max(0, Number((_config$globalMTE = config === null || config === void 0 ? void 0 : config.globalMTE) !== null && _config$globalMTE !== void 0 ? _config$globalMTE : 2100));
  var mtePerGroup = totalMTE / 4;
  var allRows = useMemo(function () {
    var rows = [];
    var annualTargets = getAnnualTargets(rmStatus);
    VACATION_DATA.forEach(function (vac) {
      vac.pfa.forEach(function (pfa, pfaIndex) {
        for (var group = 0; group < 4; group++) {
          var ranges = getVacationRangesForScenario(year, vac, pfa, group);
          var rmDate = getAdjustedRmDateForScenario(year, vac, pfa, group, isBaseRestForGroup);
          var scenarioTargetDays = annualTargets.workDays;
          var rmBaseDate = getRmDateForScenario(year, vac, pfa);
          if (rmBaseDate) rmBaseDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
          var rmDayId = rmDate ? "".concat(rmDate.getMonth(), "-").concat(rmDate.getDate()) : null;
          var pfaOriginalStart = new Date(year, pfa.start.m, pfa.start.d);
          pfaOriginalStart.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
          var pfaAdjustedStart = new Date(ranges.pfaStart);
          pfaAdjustedStart.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
          var pfaStartShiftDays = Math.round((pfaAdjustedStart.getTime() - pfaOriginalStart.getTime()) / MS_PER_DAY);
          var rmShiftDays = rmDate && rmBaseDate ? Math.round((rmDate.getTime() - rmBaseDate.getTime()) / MS_PER_DAY) : 0;
          var commonScenarioInfo = {
            rmDayTs: rmDate ? rmDate.getTime() : null,
            rmBaseDayTs: rmBaseDate ? rmBaseDate.getTime() : null,
            rmShiftDays: rmShiftDays,
            pfaStartOriginalTs: pfaOriginalStart.getTime(),
            pfaStartAdjustedTs: pfaAdjustedStart.getTime(),
            pfaStartShifted: pfaStartShiftDays !== 0,
            pfaStartShiftDays: pfaStartShiftDays
          };
          var scenarioMTEBase = mtePerGroup * (Number(pfa.weight) || 0);
          var scenarioPeriodMTE = scenarioMTEBase * 4;
          var libranzasA = buildCCRFixedDaysSet(year, group, ranges, autoLibranzasA, rmDate, rmStatus === 'dentro');
          var statsA = computeAnnualBalance({
            year: year,
            groupShift: group,
            targetDays: scenarioTargetDays,
            vacationRanges: ranges,
            specificRestSet: libranzasA,
            workRule: 'rest_and_specific_only',
            includeVacationOnWork: true,
            rmDate: rmDate,
            rmInside: rmStatus === 'dentro'
          });
          rows.push(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({
            id: "A-".concat(vac.id, "-").concat(pfaIndex, "-").concat(group),
            calendario: 'A',
            grupo: "G".concat(group + 1),
            subgrupo: '-',
            ccr: '-',
            periodoC: '-',
            vacaciones: vac.label,
            pfa: pfa.label,
            compatible: true,
            overlapDays: 0,
            scenarioMTE: scenarioMTEBase,
            scenarioPeriodMTE: scenarioPeriodMTE,
            scenarioVacId: vac.id,
            scenarioPfaIdx: pfaIndex,
            scenarioGroupShift: group,
            scenarioSubGroupIdx: 0,
            rmCoincideDescanso: !!(rmDayId && rmDate && (isBaseRestForGroup(rmDate, group) || libranzasA.has(rmDayId)))
          }, commonScenarioInfo), statsA));
          for (var sub = 0; sub < 6; sub++) {
            var redSet = buildRedDaysSetBForScenario(year, group, sub);
            var statsB = computeAnnualBalance({
              year: year,
              groupShift: group,
              targetDays: scenarioTargetDays,
              vacationRanges: ranges,
              specificRestSet: redSet,
              workRule: 'rest_and_specific_only',
              includeVacationOnWork: true,
              rmDate: rmDate,
              rmInside: rmStatus === 'dentro'
            });
            rows.push(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({
              id: "B-".concat(vac.id, "-").concat(pfaIndex, "-").concat(group, "-").concat(sub),
              calendario: 'B',
              grupo: "G".concat(group + 1),
              subgrupo: "S".concat(sub + 1),
              ccr: '-',
              periodoC: '-',
              vacaciones: vac.label,
              pfa: pfa.label,
              compatible: true,
              overlapDays: 0,
              scenarioMTE: scenarioMTEBase / 6,
              scenarioPeriodMTE: scenarioPeriodMTE,
              scenarioVacId: vac.id,
              scenarioPfaIdx: pfaIndex,
              scenarioGroupShift: group,
              scenarioSubGroupIdx: sub,
