            }, commonScenarioInfo), statsB));
          }
          var ccrFixedSet = buildCCRFixedDaysSet(year, group, ranges, 10, rmDate, rmStatus === 'dentro');
          var statsC = computeAnnualBalance({
            year: year,
            groupShift: group,
            targetDays: scenarioTargetDays,
            vacationRanges: ranges,
            specificRestSet: ccrFixedSet,
            workRule: 'rest_and_specific_only',
            includeVacationOnWork: true,
            rmDate: rmDate,
            rmInside: rmStatus === 'dentro'
          });
          rows.push(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({
            id: "C-".concat(vac.id, "-").concat(pfaIndex, "-").concat(group),
            calendario: 'C',
            grupo: "G".concat(group + 1),
            subgrupo: '-',
            ccr: '-',
            periodoC: '-',
            vacaciones: vac.label,
            pfa: pfa.label,
            compatible: true,
            overlapDays: 0,
            scenarioMTE: scenarioMTEBase,
            scenarioPeriodMTE: scenarioPeriodMTE,
            scenarioVacId: vac.id,
            scenarioPfaIdx: pfaIndex,
            scenarioGroupShift: group,
            scenarioSubGroupIdx: 0,
            rmCoincideDescanso: !!(rmDayId && rmDate && (isBaseRestForGroup(rmDate, group) || ccrFixedSet.has(rmDayId)))
          }, commonScenarioInfo), statsC));
        }
      });
    });
    return rows;
  }, [year, autoLibranzasA, mtePerGroup, rmStatus]);
  var rows = useMemo(function () {
    if (calendarFilter === 'todos') return allRows;
    return allRows.filter(function (r) {
      return r.calendario === calendarFilter;
    });
  }, [allRows, calendarFilter]);
  useEffect(function () {
    setExpandedGroups(new Set());
    setDetailSortByGroup({});
    setPeriodAnalysisOpen(false);
  }, [year, rmStatus, calendarFilter]);
  var groupedRows = useMemo(function () {
    var grouped = new Map();
    rows.forEach(function (r) {
      var tipo = r.debitDays > 0 ? 'debito' : r.creditDays > 0 ? 'credito' : 'equilibrio';
      var valor = tipo === 'debito' ? r.debitDays : tipo === 'credito' ? r.creditDays : 0;
      var key = "".concat(r.calendario, "-").concat(tipo, "-").concat(valor);
      if (!grouped.has(key)) {
        grouped.set(key, {
          key: key,
          calendario: r.calendario,
          tipo: tipo,
          valor: valor,
          items: []
        });
      }
      grouped.get(key).items.push(r);
    });
    var typeOrder = {
      debito: 0,
      credito: 1,
      equilibrio: 2
    };
    return Array.from(grouped.values()).map(function (g) {
      return _objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, g), {}, {
        coincidencias: g.items.length
      });
    }).sort(function (a, b) {
      if (a.calendario !== b.calendario) return a.calendario.localeCompare(b.calendario);
      if (typeOrder[a.tipo] !== typeOrder[b.tipo]) return typeOrder[a.tipo] - typeOrder[b.tipo];
      if (a.tipo === 'equilibrio') return 0;
      return b.valor - a.valor;
    });
  }, [rows]);
  var toggleGroup = useCallback(function (groupKey) {
    setExpandedGroups(function (prev) {
      var next = new Set(prev);
      if (next.has(groupKey)) next["delete"](groupKey);else next.add(groupKey);
      return next;
    });
  }, []);
  var getGroupSortMode = useCallback(function (group) {
    if (detailSortByGroup[group.key]) return detailSortByGroup[group.key];
    return 'grupo_asc';
  }, [detailSortByGroup]);
  var getSortedGroupItems = useCallback(function (group) {
    var mode = getGroupSortMode(group);
    var sorted = _toConsumableArray(group.items);
    sorted.sort(function (a, b) {
      if (mode === 'subgrupo_asc') {
        return String(a.subgrupo).localeCompare(String(b.subgrupo), 'es', {
          numeric: true
        });
      }
      if (mode === 'vacaciones_asc') {
        return String(a.vacaciones).localeCompare(String(b.vacaciones), 'es', {
          numeric: true
        });
      }
      if (mode === 'pfa_asc') {
        return String(a.pfa).localeCompare(String(b.pfa), 'es', {
          numeric: true
        });
      }
      return String(a.grupo).localeCompare(String(b.grupo), 'es', {
        numeric: true
      });
    });
    return sorted;
  }, [getGroupSortMode]);
  var handleOpenFromDetail = useCallback(function (r) {
    if (typeof onOpenScenario !== 'function') return;
    onOpenScenario({
      token: "".concat(Date.now(), "-").concat(r.id),
      tipo: r.calendario,
      year: year,
      groupShift: r.scenarioGroupShift,
      subGroupIdx: r.calendario === 'B' ? r.scenarioSubGroupIdx : 0,
      vacationRowId: r.scenarioVacId,
      pfaIdx: r.scenarioPfaIdx,
      rmStatus: rmStatus
    });
  }, [onOpenScenario, year, rmStatus]);
  var resumen = useMemo(function () {
    var byCal = {
      A: {
        escenarios: 0,
        credito: 0,
        debito: 0,
        posiblesCredito: 0,
        posiblesDebito: 0,
        posiblesEquilibrio: 0,
        posiblesMteCredito: 0,
        posiblesMteDebito: 0,
        weightedCredito: 0,
        weightedDebito: 0,
        weightedGeneral: 0,
        totalMteEscenarios: 0,
        mediaCreditoEscenario: 0,
        mediaDebitoEscenario: 0,
        mediaGeneralEscenario: 0,
        mediaCreditoMte: 0,
        mediaDebitoMte: 0,
        mediaGeneralMte: 0
      },
      B: {
        escenarios: 0,
        credito: 0,
        debito: 0,
        posiblesCredito: 0,
        posiblesDebito: 0,
        posiblesEquilibrio: 0,
        posiblesMteCredito: 0,
        posiblesMteDebito: 0,
        weightedCredito: 0,
        weightedDebito: 0,
        weightedGeneral: 0,
        totalMteEscenarios: 0,
        mediaCreditoEscenario: 0,
        mediaDebitoEscenario: 0,
        mediaGeneralEscenario: 0,
        mediaCreditoMte: 0,
        mediaDebitoMte: 0,
        mediaGeneralMte: 0
      },
      C: {
        escenarios: 0,
        credito: 0,
        debito: 0,
        posiblesCredito: 0,
        posiblesDebito: 0,
        posiblesEquilibrio: 0,
        posiblesMteCredito: 0,
        posiblesMteDebito: 0,
        weightedCredito: 0,
        weightedDebito: 0,
        weightedGeneral: 0,
        totalMteEscenarios: 0,
        mediaCreditoEscenario: 0,
        mediaDebitoEscenario: 0,
        mediaGeneralEscenario: 0,
        mediaCreditoMte: 0,
        mediaDebitoMte: 0,
        mediaGeneralMte: 0
      }
    };
    allRows.forEach(function (r) {
      var scenarioMTE = r.scenarioMTE || 0;
      var totalDias = (r.creditDays || 0) + (r.debitDays || 0);
      byCal[r.calendario].escenarios += 1;
      byCal[r.calendario].credito += r.creditDays;
      byCal[r.calendario].debito += r.debitDays;
      byCal[r.calendario].totalMteEscenarios += scenarioMTE;
      byCal[r.calendario].weightedGeneral += totalDias * scenarioMTE;
      if (r.creditDays > 0) {
        byCal[r.calendario].posiblesCredito += 1;
        byCal[r.calendario].posiblesMteCredito += scenarioMTE;
        byCal[r.calendario].weightedCredito += (r.creditDays || 0) * scenarioMTE;
      }
      if (r.debitDays > 0) {
        byCal[r.calendario].posiblesDebito += 1;
        byCal[r.calendario].posiblesMteDebito += scenarioMTE;
        byCal[r.calendario].weightedDebito += (r.debitDays || 0) * scenarioMTE;
      }
      if (r.creditDays === 0 && r.debitDays === 0) {
        byCal[r.calendario].posiblesEquilibrio += 1;
      }
    });
    Object.values(byCal).forEach(function (c) {
      c.mediaCreditoEscenario = c.escenarios > 0 ? c.credito / c.escenarios : 0;
      c.mediaDebitoEscenario = c.escenarios > 0 ? c.debito / c.escenarios : 0;
      c.mediaGeneralEscenario = c.escenarios > 0 ? (c.credito + c.debito) / c.escenarios : 0;
      c.mediaCreditoMte = c.posiblesMteCredito > 0 ? c.weightedCredito / c.posiblesMteCredito : 0;
      c.mediaDebitoMte = c.posiblesMteDebito > 0 ? c.weightedDebito / c.posiblesMteDebito : 0;
      c.mediaGeneralMte = c.totalMteEscenarios > 0 ? c.weightedGeneral / c.totalMteEscenarios : 0;
    });
    return byCal;
  }, [allRows]);
  var donutStyleFor = useCallback(function (cal) {
    var total = Math.max(1, cal.escenarios || 0);
    var pCred = cal.posiblesCredito / total * 100;
    var pDeb = cal.posiblesDebito / total * 100;
    var pEq = Math.max(0, 100 - pCred - pDeb);
    return {
      background: "conic-gradient(#16a34a 0 ".concat(pCred, "%, #dc2626 ").concat(pCred, "% ").concat(pCred + pDeb, "%, #9ca3af ").concat(pCred + pDeb, "% 100%)"),
      pCred: pCred,
      pDeb: pDeb,
      pEq: pEq
    };
  }, []);
  var periodMteRows = useMemo(function () {
    var byPeriod = new Map();
    rows.forEach(function (r) {
      var key = "".concat(r.calendario, "|").concat(r.scenarioVacId, "|").concat(r.scenarioPfaIdx);
      if (byPeriod.has(key)) return;
      byPeriod.set(key, {
        key: key,
        calendario: r.calendario,
        vacaciones: r.vacaciones,
        pfa: r.pfa,
        mtePeriodo: Number(r.scenarioPeriodMTE) || 0
      });
    });
    return Array.from(byPeriod.values()).sort(function (a, b) {
      if (a.calendario !== b.calendario) return a.calendario.localeCompare(b.calendario);
      var byVac = String(a.vacaciones).localeCompare(String(b.vacaciones), 'es', {
        numeric: true
      });
      if (byVac !== 0) return byVac;
      return String(a.pfa).localeCompare(String(b.pfa), 'es', {
        numeric: true
      });
    });
  }, [rows]);
  var formatDayMonth = function formatDayMonth(ts) {
    if (ts == null) return '-';
    return new Date(ts).toLocaleDateString('es-ES', {
      day: '2-digit',
      month: '2-digit'
    });
  };
  var formatShiftDays = function formatShiftDays(days) {
    return "".concat(days > 0 ? '+' : '').concat(days, "d");
  };

<script type="text/babel">
const { useState, useMemo, useCallback, useEffect, useRef } = React;

// --- 1. CONSTANTES Y DATOS BASE ---
const ANCHOR_MONDAY = new Date(2021, 0, 4); 
const MS_PER_DAY = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
const MS_PER_WEEK = 7 * MS_PER_DAY;
const PRESSURE_LEVEL_UNIT = 2.5;
const REQUIRED_LAB_DAYS_A = 7;
const DEFAULT_FLEX_DAYS_A = 5;
const CONFIG_STORAGE_KEY = "scmm_portal_config_v1";
const ANNUAL_TARGETS = {
    dentro: { workDays: 202, vacOnWorkDays: 36, restDays: 127 },
    fuera: { workDays: 201, vacOnWorkDays: 37, restDays: 127 }
};
const getAnnualTargets = (rmStatus) => (rmStatus === 'dentro' ? ANNUAL_TARGETS.dentro : ANNUAL_TARGETS.fuera);
const lockJanuaryQuotaA = (cfg = {}) => ({ ...cfg, c_0_0: 0, c_0_1: 0, c_0_2: 0 });
const SEQUENCE = [[1, 6, 0], [6, 0], [4, 5], [2, 3]];
const SUBBLOQUES = ["A1","A2","A3","A4","B1","B2","B3","B4","C1","C2","C3","C4"];
const ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE = [1, 13, 2, 12, 3, 11, 4, 10, 5, 9, 6, 8, 7];
const ROTATION_GROUPS = ['A', 'B', 'C'];
const ROTATION_SUBS = [1, 2, 3, 4];
const ALL_ROTATION_UNITS = ROTATION_GROUPS.flatMap(g => ROTATION_SUBS.map(n => `${g}${n}`));
const DEFAULT_ROTATION_ASSIGNMENT_UNIT_SEQUENCE = ['A1', 'B1', 'C1', 'A2', 'B2', 'C2', 'A3', 'B3', 'C3', 'A4', 'B4', 'C4'];
const buildRotationSequence = (startPos = 1) => {
    const idx = ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE.indexOf(Number(startPos));
    if (idx === -1) return ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE;
    return [...ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE.slice(idx), ...ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE.slice(0, idx)];
};
const getRotationBlockContent = (step) => {
    const groupOffset = step % 3;
    const rotatedGroups = [
        ROTATION_GROUPS[(0 + groupOffset) % 3],
        ROTATION_GROUPS[(1 + groupOffset) % 3],
        ROTATION_GROUPS[(2 + groupOffset) % 3]
    ];
    const subOffset = step % 4;
    const getSub = (val) => ((val - 1 + subOffset) % 4) + 1;
    return rotatedGroups.map(group => ({ label: group, subs: [getSub(1), getSub(2), getSub(3), getSub(4)] }));
};
const MESES = ["Enero", "Febrero", "Marzo", "Abril", "Mayo", "Junio", "Julio", "Agosto", "Septiembre", "Octubre", "Noviembre", "Diciembre"];
const AUTO_A_PROFILE_SEGMENTS = [
    { key: 'multAInvierno', label: 'Invierno / cierre', months: [0, 11], defaultValue: 3 },
    { key: 'multABaja', label: 'Meses bajos', months: [1, 9, 10], defaultValue: 1 },
    { key: 'multAMedia', label: 'Meses medios', months: [2, 3, 4], defaultValue: 1.8 },
    { key: 'multAVerano', label: 'Junio / septiembre', months: [5, 8], defaultValue: 3 },
    { key: 'multAPico', label: 'Julio / agosto', months: [6, 7], defaultValue: 5 }
];
const roundToOneDecimal = (value) => Math.round((Number(value) || 0) * 10) / 10;
const getAutoAProfileSegmentForMonth = (monthIdx) => AUTO_A_PROFILE_SEGMENTS.find(segment => segment.months.includes(monthIdx)) || AUTO_A_PROFILE_SEGMENTS[1];
const getLegacyMonthlyMultiplierA = (cfg, monthIdx) => {
    const legacyValue = Number(cfg?.[`multA_${monthIdx}`]);
    return Number.isFinite(legacyValue) && legacyValue > 0 ? legacyValue : null;
};
const getAutoPriorityMultiplierA = (cfg, monthIdx) => {
    const segment = getAutoAProfileSegmentForMonth(monthIdx);
    const profileValue = Number(cfg?.[segment.key]);
    if (Number.isFinite(profileValue) && profileValue > 0) return profileValue;
    const legacyValue = getLegacyMonthlyMultiplierA(cfg, monthIdx);
    if (legacyValue != null) return legacyValue;
    return segment.defaultValue;
};
const normalizeAutoAMultipliers = (cfg = {}) => {
    const next = { ...cfg };
    AUTO_A_PROFILE_SEGMENTS.forEach(segment => {
        const currentValue = Number(next[segment.key]);
        if (Number.isFinite(currentValue) && currentValue > 0) {
            next[segment.key] = roundToOneDecimal(currentValue);
            return;
        }
        const legacyValues = segment.months.map(monthIdx => getLegacyMonthlyMultiplierA(next, monthIdx)).filter(v => v != null);
        const fallback = legacyValues.length > 0 ? (legacyValues.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0) / legacyValues.length) : segment.defaultValue;
        next[segment.key] = roundToOneDecimal(fallback);
    });
    for (let monthIdx = 0; monthIdx < 12; monthIdx++) {
        next[`multA_${monthIdx}`] = roundToOneDecimal(getAutoPriorityMultiplierA(next, monthIdx));
    }
    next.rotationUnitSequence = normalizeRotationUnitSequence(next.rotationUnitSequence);
    return next;
};
const normalizeRotationUnitSequence = (sequence) => {
    const incoming = Array.isArray(sequence) ? sequence : [];
    const valid = incoming.filter(unit => ALL_ROTATION_UNITS.includes(unit));
    const unique = [];
    valid.forEach(unit => {
        if (!unique.includes(unit)) unique.push(unit);
    });
    DEFAULT_ROTATION_ASSIGNMENT_UNIT_SEQUENCE.forEach(unit => {
        if (!unique.includes(unit)) unique.push(unit);
    });
    return unique.slice(0, ALL_ROTATION_UNITS.length);
};
const buildRotationAssignmentSlots = (totalMte, unitSequence = DEFAULT_ROTATION_ASSIGNMENT_UNIT_SEQUENCE) => {
    const normalizedTotal = Math.max(0, Number(totalMte) || 0);
    const slots = [];
    if (normalizedTotal <= 0) return slots;
    const normalizedSequence = normalizeRotationUnitSequence(unitSequence);
    const seatsPerUnit = Math.ceil(normalizedTotal / (13 * normalizedSequence.length));
    for (let seat = 1; seat <= seatsPerUnit; seat++) {
        for (const unit of normalizedSequence) {
            for (let block = 1; block <= 13; block++) {
                slots.push({
                    block,
                    unit,
                    seat,
                    label: `Bloque ${block} Â· ${unit} Â· Puesto ${seat}`
                });
                if (slots.length >= normalizedTotal) return slots;
            }
        }
    }
    return slots;
};

const getRmDateForScenario = (year, vacationRow, pfaOpt) => {
    if (!vacationRow || !pfaOpt) return null;
    const key = `${vacationRow.id}|${pfaOpt.label}`;
    const parts = RM_DATE_BY_SCENARIO[key];
    if (!parts) return null;
    return new Date(year, parts.m, parts.d);
};

const Modal = ({ title, onClose, children, maxWidth = "max-w-4xl" }) => (
    <div className="modal-overlay" onClick={onClose}>
        <div className={`bg-white p-6 ${maxWidth} w-full rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto`} onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-gray-200 pb-3 mb-4">
                <h2 className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-black text-blue-900">{title}</h2>
                <button onClick={onClose} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 font-black text-2xl transition-colors">&times;</button>
            </div>
            {children}
            <button className="mt-6 w-full py-3 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-bold rounded-xl transition-all shadow-md" onClick={onClose}>Cerrar Panel</button>
        </div>
    </div>
);

const getGroupColor = (g) => {
    const c = { 
        A: { 
            p: 'bg-green-600/90', l: 'bg-green-50/50', t: 'text-green-800', b: 'border-green-300/50', r: 'ring-green-400',
            g: 'from-green-600/90 to-green-700/90', tw: 'text-white',
            indicatorBg: 'bg-green-500/90', shadow: 'shadow-green-500/20', textMedium: 'text-white/90', textLight: 'text-white/80'
        }, 
        B: { 
            p: 'bg-yellow-500/90', l: 'bg-yellow-50/50', t: 'text-yellow-800', b: 'border-yellow-300/50', r: 'ring-yellow-400',
            g: 'from-yellow-500/90 to-yellow-600/90', tw: 'text-yellow-900',
            indicatorBg: 'bg-yellow-400/90', shadow: 'shadow-yellow-500/20', textMedium: 'text-yellow-50/90', textLight: 'text-yellow-50/80'
        }, 
        C: { 
            p: 'bg-red-600/90', l: 'bg-red-50/50', t: 'text-red-800', b: 'border-red-300/50', r: 'ring-red-400',
            g: 'from-red-600/90 to-red-700/90', tw: 'text-white',
            indicatorBg: 'bg-red-500/90', shadow: 'shadow-red-500/20', textMedium: 'text-white/90', textLight: 'text-white/80'
        }, 
        D: { 
            p: 'bg-purple-600/90', l: 'bg-purple-50/50', t: 'text-purple-800', b: 'border-purple-300/50', r: 'ring-purple-400',
            g: 'from-purple-600/90 to-purple-700/90', tw: 'text-white',
            indicatorBg: 'bg-purple-500/90', shadow: 'shadow-purple-500/20', textMedium: 'text-white/90', textLight: 'text-white/80'
        } 
    };
    return c[g] || { 
        p: 'bg-gray-600/90', l: 'bg-gray-50/50', t: 'text-gray-800', b: 'border-gray-300/50', r: 'ring-gray-400',
        g: 'from-gray-600/90 to-gray-700/90', tw: 'text-white',
        indicatorBg: 'bg-gray-500/90', shadow: 'shadow-gray-500/20', textMedium: 'text-white/90', textLight: 'text-white/80'
    };
};

const getSubColor = (g, n) => {
    const p = parseInt(n);
    if(g==='A') return p===1?'bg-green-300/90 text-green-900 border-green-300':(p===2?'bg-green-400/90 text-green-900 border-green-400':(p===3?'bg-green-500/90 text-white border-green-500':'bg-green-600/90 text-white border-green-600'));
    if(g==='B') return p===1?'bg-yellow-200/90 text-yellow-900 border-yellow-200':(p===2?'bg-yellow-300/90 text-yellow-900 border-yellow-300':(p===3?'bg-yellow-400/90 text-yellow-900 border-yellow-400':'bg-yellow-500/90 text-white border-yellow-500'));
    if(g==='C') return p===1?'bg-red-300/90 text-white border-red-300':(p===2?'bg-red-400/90 text-white border-red-400':(p===3?'bg-red-500/90 text-white border-red-500':'bg-red-600/90 text-white border-red-600'));
    return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600';
};

const getBaseQuota = (config, month, day, esSD, esF) => {
    let baseLab, baseSD, baseFes;
    if (month === 5) {
        if (day <= 15) { baseLab = config.c_5q1_0; baseSD = config.c_5q1_1; baseFes = config.c_5q1_2; }
        else { baseLab = config.c_5q2_0; baseSD = config.c_5q2_1; baseFes = config.c_5q2_2; }
    } else {
        baseLab = config[`c_${month}_0`];
        baseSD = config[`c_${month}_1`];
        baseFes = config[`c_${month}_2`];
    }
    return esSD ? baseSD : (esF ? baseFes : baseLab);
};

    septiembre: { lab: 'pap_septiembre_lab', sab: 'pap_septiembre_sab', dom: 'pap_septiembre_dom' }
};

const getEasterDate = (year) => {
    const a = year % 19;
    const b = Math.floor(year / 100);
    const c = year % 100;
    const d = Math.floor(b / 4);
    const e = b % 4;
    const f = Math.floor((b + 8) / 25);
    const g = Math.floor((b - f + 1) / 3);
    const h = (19 * a + b - d - g + 15) % 30;
    const i = Math.floor(c / 4);
    const k = c % 4;
    const l = (32 + 2 * e + 2 * i - h - k) % 7;
    const m = Math.floor((a + 11 * h + 22 * l) / 451);
    const month = Math.floor((h + l - 7 * m + 114) / 31) - 1;
    const day = ((h + l - 7 * m + 114) % 31) + 1;
    return new Date(year, month, day);
};

const posMod = (n, m) => ((n % m) + m) % m;

const buildFestivosSetForYear = (year, customHolidays = []) => {
    const fixed = ["0-1", "0-6", "4-1", "4-2", "4-15", "7-15", "9-12", "10-1", "10-9", "11-6", "11-8", "11-25"];
    const easter = getEasterDate(year);
    const juevesSanto = new Date(easter);
    juevesSanto.setDate(easter.getDate() - 3);
    const viernesSanto = new Date(easter);
    viernesSanto.setDate(easter.getDate() - 2);
    const all = [...fixed, `${juevesSanto.getMonth()}-${juevesSanto.getDate()}`, `${viernesSanto.getMonth()}-${viernesSanto.getDate()}`, ...(customHolidays || [])];
    return new Set(all);
};

const isBaseRestForGroup = (date, groupShift) => {
    const dow = date.getDay();
    const diff = dow === 0 ? 6 : dow - 1;
    const mon = new Date(date);
    mon.setDate(date.getDate() - diff);
    mon.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    const wb = Math.round((mon - ANCHOR_MONDAY) / MS_PER_WEEK);
    let si = (wb - groupShift) % 4;
    if (si < 0) si += 4;
    return SEQUENCE[si].includes(dow);
};

const getAdjustedRmDateForScenario = (year, vacationRow, pfaOpt, groupShift, restChecker = isBaseRestForGroup) => {
    const base = getRmDateForScenario(year, vacationRow, pfaOpt);
    if (!base) return null;
    const adjusted = new Date(base);
    adjusted.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    let safety = 0;
    while (restChecker(adjusted, groupShift) && safety < 31) {
        adjusted.setDate(adjusted.getDate() - 1);
        safety++;
    }
    return adjusted;
};

const getAdjustedPfaRangeForScenario = (year, pfaOpt, targetGroupShift) => {
    const originalStart = new Date(year, pfaOpt.start.m, pfaOpt.start.d);
    let actualStart = new Date(originalStart);
    const originalEnd = new Date(year, pfaOpt.end.m, pfaOpt.end.d);
    const durationMs = originalEnd.getTime() - originalStart.getTime();
    const isDecemberPfa11To31 = pfaOpt.start.m === 11 && pfaOpt.start.d === 11;
    let safety = 0;
    while (isBaseRestForGroup(actualStart, targetGroupShift) && safety < 10) {
        actualStart.setDate(actualStart.getDate() + (isDecemberPfa11To31 ? -1 : 1));
        safety++;
    }
    const pfaStart = actualStart.getTime();
    let pfaEnd = pfaStart + durationMs;
    if (isDecemberPfa11To31 && actualStart.getTime() < originalStart.getTime()) {
        pfaEnd = originalEnd.getTime();
    }
    return { pfaStart, pfaEnd };
};

const getVacationRangesForScenario = (year, vacationRow, pfaOpt, groupShift) => {
    const summerStart = new Date(year, vacationRow.summer.start.m, vacationRow.summer.start.d).getTime();
    const summerEnd = new Date(year, vacationRow.summer.end.m, vacationRow.summer.end.d).getTime();
    const pfaRange = getAdjustedPfaRangeForScenario(year, pfaOpt, groupShift);
    return { summerStart, summerEnd, pfaStart: pfaRange.pfaStart, pfaEnd: pfaRange.pfaEnd };
};

const isVacationForScenario = (date, ranges) => {
    const t = date.getTime();
    return (t >= ranges.summerStart && t <= ranges.summerEnd) || (t >= ranges.pfaStart && t <= ranges.pfaEnd);
};

const buildRedDaysSetBForScenario = (year, groupShift, subGroupIdx) => {
    const reds = new Set();
    const firstDayOfYear = new Date(year, 0, 1);
    const daysToFirstMonday = firstDayOfYear.getDay() === 1 ? 0 : (firstDayOfYear.getDay() === 0 ? 1 : 8 - firstDayOfYear.getDay());
    const firstMonday = new Date(year, 0, 1 + daysToFirstMonday);
    firstMonday.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);

    for (let w = -4; w <= 56; w++) {
        const currentMonday = new Date(firstMonday);
        currentMonday.setDate(firstMonday.getDate() + w * 7);
        const weeksBetween = Math.round((currentMonday - ANCHOR_MONDAY) / MS_PER_WEEK);
        const groupWeek = posMod(weeksBetween - groupShift, 24);
        const phase = groupWeek % 4;
        const cycle = Math.floor(groupWeek / 4);
        let daysOffset = [];
        if (phase === 1) {
            daysOffset = (subGroupIdx === posMod(cycle + 1, 6)) ? [0, 1] : ((subGroupIdx === posMod(cycle + 3, 6)) ? [3, 4] : []);
        } else if (phase === 2) {
            daysOffset = (subGroupIdx === posMod(cycle + 5, 6)) ? [2] : [];
        }
        for (const offset of daysOffset) {
            const targetDate = new Date(currentMonday);
            targetDate.setDate(currentMonday.getDate() + offset);
            if (targetDate.getFullYear() === year) {
                reds.add(`${targetDate.getMonth()}-${targetDate.getDate()}`);
            }
        }
    }
    return reds;
};

const buildCyclesForScenarioC = (year, groupShift) => {
    const rawList = [];
    let current = new Date(year, 0, 1);
    current.setDate(current.getDate() + (current.getDay() === 0 ? 1 : (8 - current.getDay()) % 7));
    while (current.getFullYear() <= year) {
        const weeksBetween = Math.round((current - ANCHOR_MONDAY) / MS_PER_WEEK);
        let seqIdx = (weeksBetween - groupShift) % 4;
        if (seqIdx < 0) seqIdx += 4;
        if (seqIdx === 0) {
            const start = new Date(current);
            const end = new Date(current);
            end.setDate(start.getDate() + 14);
            rawList.push({ start, end });
        }
        current.setDate(current.getDate() + 7);
    }
    return rawList;
};

const computeAnnualBalance = ({ year, groupShift, targetDays, vacationRanges, specificRestSet = null, specificCycle = null, workRule = 'classic', includeVacationOnWork = false, rmDate = null, rmInside = false }) => {
    let workDays = 0;
    let baseRests = 0;
    let extraRests = 0;
    let vacPfaDays = 0;
    let vacOnWorkDays = 0;
    const rmDayId = rmDate ? `${rmDate.getMonth()}-${rmDate.getDate()}` : null;
    const start = new Date(year, 0, 1);
    const end = new Date(year, 11, 31);
    for (let d = new Date(start); d <= end; d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1)) {
        const dayId = `${d.getMonth()}-${d.getDate()}`;
        const isBase = isBaseRestForGroup(d, groupShift);
        const t = d.getTime();
        const isSpecific = specificRestSet ? specificRestSet.has(dayId) : (specificCycle ? (t >= specificCycle.start.getTime() && t <= specificCycle.end.getTime()) : false);
        const isRmOutside = !rmInside && rmDayId === dayId;
        const isVac = vacationRanges ? isVacationForScenario(d, vacationRanges) : false;
        const isPotentialWork = !isBase && !isSpecific;
        const isVacationOnWorkDay = isPotentialWork && (isVac || isRmOutside);
        if (isVac) vacPfaDays++;
        if (isBase) baseRests++;
        else if (isSpecific) extraRests++;

        if (workRule === 'rest_and_specific_only') {
            if (isPotentialWork) {
                if (isVacationOnWorkDay && includeVacationOnWork) vacOnWorkDays++;
                else if (!isVacationOnWorkDay) workDays++;
            }
        } else if (isPotentialWork && !isVac && !isRmOutside) {
            workDays++;
        }
    }
    const diff = workDays - targetDays;
    return {
        workDays,
        baseRests,
        extraRests,
        vacPfaDays,
        vacOnWorkDays,
        creditDays: diff > 0 ? diff : 0,
        debitDays: diff < 0 ? Math.abs(diff) : 0,
        diff
    };
};

const buildCCRFixedDaysSet = (year, groupShift, vacationRanges, maxDays = 10, rmDate = null, rmInside = false) => {
    const selected = new Set();
    const rmDayId = rmDate ? `${rmDate.getMonth()}-${rmDate.getDate()}` : null;
    const start = new Date(year, 0, 1);
    const end = new Date(year, 11, 31);
    for (let d = new Date(start); d <= end && selected.size < maxDays; d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1)) {
        const isBase = isBaseRestForGroup(d, groupShift);
        const isVac = isVacationForScenario(d, vacationRanges);
        const dayId = `${d.getMonth()}-${d.getDate()}`;
        const isRmRest = rmInside && rmDayId === dayId;
        if (isBase || isVac || isRmRest) continue;
        selected.add(dayId);
    }
    return selected;
};

// --- 3. MÃ“DULO DE AJUSTES GLOBALES ---
function Ajustes({ config, setConfig, onBack, onSaveConfig }) {
    const [showHelp, setShowHelp] = useState(false);
    const [saveStatus, setSaveStatus] = useState("");
    const showStatus = useCallback((msg) => {
        setSaveStatus(msg);
        setTimeout(() => setSaveStatus(""), 2500);
    }, []);
    const handleChange = (key, value) => setConfig(prev => normalizeAutoAMultipliers({ ...prev, [key]: Number(value) }));
    const toPressureLevel = (pct) => Math.round(((Number(pct) || 0) / PRESSURE_LEVEL_UNIT) * 10) / 10;
    const handlePressureLevelChange = (key, value) => {
        const level = Number(value);
        if (Number.isNaN(level)) return;
        const pct = Math.round((level * PRESSURE_LEVEL_UNIT) * 100) / 100;
        setConfig(prev => normalizeAutoAMultipliers({ ...prev, [key]: pct }));
    };
    const handleAutoProfileChange = (key, value) => {
        const parsed = Number(value);
        if (Number.isNaN(parsed)) return;
        setConfig(prev => normalizeAutoAMultipliers({ ...prev, [key]: parsed }));
    };
    const applyAutoProfileDefaults = () => {
        setConfig(prev => normalizeAutoAMultipliers({
            ...prev,
            ...AUTO_A_PROFILE_SEGMENTS.reduce((acc, segment) => ({ ...acc, [segment.key]: segment.defaultValue }), {})
        }));
    };
    const handleRotationExcelImport = (e) => {
        const file = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];
        if (!file) return;
        if (typeof XLSX === 'undefined') {
            showStatus('No se pudo cargar el lector de Excel');
            e.target.value = '';
            return;
        }
        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = () => {
            try {
                const data = new Uint8Array(reader.result);
                const workbook = XLSX.read(data, { type: 'array' });
                const sheetName = workbook.SheetNames[0];
                if (!sheetName) throw new Error('sheet');
                const sheet = workbook.Sheets[sheetName];
                const rows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(sheet, { header: 1, raw: false, defval: '' });
                const dneList = rows
                    .map(row => Array.isArray(row) ? String(row[0] ?? '').trim() : '')
                    .filter(Boolean);
                if (dneList.length === 0) throw new Error('empty');
                setConfig(prev => normalizeAutoAMultipliers({
                    ...prev,
                    globalMTE: dneList.length,
                    rotationDneList: dneList,
                    rotationDneFileName: file.name
                }));
                showStatus(`Excel cargado (${dneList.length} DNE). Plantilla MTE ajustada a ${dneList.length}.`);
            } catch (_) {
                showStatus('Error al leer Excel: usa una sola columna con un DNE por fila');
            }
        };
        reader.onerror = () => showStatus('Error al leer el Excel');
        reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
        e.target.value = '';
    };
    const clearRotationExcel = () => {
        setConfig(prev => normalizeAutoAMultipliers({
            ...prev,
            rotationDneList: [],
            rotationDneFileName: ''
        }));
        showStatus('Listado de DNE eliminado');
    };
    const moveRotationUnit = (fromIdx, direction) => {
        setConfig(prev => {
            const current = normalizeRotationUnitSequence(prev.rotationUnitSequence);
            const toIdx = fromIdx + direction;
            if (toIdx < 0 || toIdx >= current.length) return prev;
            const nextSeq = [...current];
            const tmp = nextSeq[fromIdx];
            nextSeq[fromIdx] = nextSeq[toIdx];
            nextSeq[toIdx] = tmp;
            return normalizeAutoAMultipliers({ ...prev, rotationUnitSequence: nextSeq });
        });
    };
    const resetRotationUnitSequence = () => {
        setConfig(prev => normalizeAutoAMultipliers({ ...prev, rotationUnitSequence: DEFAULT_ROTATION_ASSIGNMENT_UNIT_SEQUENCE }));
        showStatus('Secuencia de rotaciÃ³n restaurada');
    };
    const rotationUnitSequence = useMemo(() => normalizeRotationUnitSequence(config.rotationUnitSequence), [config.rotationUnitSequence]);
    const handleSave = () => {
        const saved = typeof onSaveConfig === 'function' ? onSaveConfig(config) : false;
        showStatus(saved ? "ConfiguraciÃ³n guardada" : "Error al guardar");
    };
    const handleExportTxt = () => {
        try {
            const text = JSON.stringify(config, null, 2);
            const blob = new Blob([text], { type: 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' });
            const now = new Date();
            const stamp = `${now.getFullYear()}${String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}${String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')}_${String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0')}${String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')}${String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0')}`;
            const a = document.createElement('a');
            a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            a.download = `scmm_ajustes_${stamp}.txt`;
            document.body.appendChild(a);
            a.click();
            document.body.removeChild(a);
            URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
            showStatus("Ajustes exportados");
        } catch (err) {
            showStatus("Error al exportar");
        }
    };
    const handleImportTxt = (e) => {
        const file = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];
        if (!file) return;
        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = () => {
            try {
                const raw = String(reader.result || '');
                const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
                if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) throw new Error('invalid');
                setConfig(prev => {
                    const next = { ...prev };
                    Object.keys(prev).forEach((key) => {
                        if (!(key in parsed)) return;
                        const incoming = parsed[key];
                        const current = prev[key];
                        if (typeof current === 'number') {
                            const n = Number(incoming);
                            next[key] = Number.isFinite(n) ? n : current;
                        } else if (Array.isArray(current)) {
                            next[key] = Array.isArray(incoming) ? incoming : current;
                        } else {
                            next[key] = incoming;
                        }
                    });
                    return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(next);
                });
                showStatus("Ajustes importados");
            } catch (err) {
                showStatus("Error al importar: formato invÃ¡lido");
            }
        };
        reader.onerror = () => showStatus("Error al leer el archivo");
        reader.readAsText(file, 'utf-8');
        e.target.value = '';
    };
    
    return (
        <div className="min-h-screen p-4 md:p-8 flex flex-col relative z-10 w-full max-w-6xl mx-auto">
            {showHelp && (
                <Modal title="â“ Ayuda: Panel de Ajustes" onClose={() => setShowHelp(false)}>
                    <div className="space-y-4 text-gray-700 text-sm">
                        <p>Este panel es el <b>cerebro de la aplicaciÃ³n</b>. Modificar valores aquÃ­ cambia en tiempo real el comportamiento de todos los simuladores de la suite.</p>
                        <div className="bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-xl">
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-blue-900 mb-1">1. Datos Generales</h4>
                            <p>El <b>MTE Total</b> (Plantilla) alimenta la rotaciÃ³n y la capacidad de las quincenas. El lÃ­mite de solapamiento dicta cuÃ¡ndo una persona no puede pedir un periodo de 15 dÃ­as en el Cal. C porque "choca" con sus vacaciones base.</p>
                        </div>
                        <div className="bg-orange-50 p-4 rounded-xl">
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-orange-900 mb-1">2. PresiÃ³n Base (Calendario A)</h4>
                            <p>Los dÃ­as laborables sufren menos presiÃ³n de peticiÃ³n que los festivos. AdemÃ¡s de la estacionalidad, ahora puedes reforzar <b>puentes</b>, <b>viernes</b> y <b>martes</b> para afinar mejor cÃ³mo se agotan los cupos de dÃ­as sueltos.</p>
                        </div>
	                        <div className="bg-purple-50 p-4 rounded-xl">
	                            <h4 className="font-bold text-purple-900 mb-1">3. Cupos y Preferencias Mensuales</h4>
	                            <p>AquÃ­ inyectas los cupos reales del aÃ±o actual. El <b>Peso (C)</b> permite jugar con la cascada. La <b>Preferencia Auto (A)</b> ahora se ajusta por tramos estacionales, para evitar tocar 12 meses uno a uno.</p>
	                        </div>
	                    </div>
	                </Modal>
	            )}

            <div className="panel p-4 flex justify-between items-center mb-6 shrink-0 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <button onClick={onBack} className="p-2 bg-blue-100 hover:bg-blue-200 text-blue-800 rounded-full transition-colors"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-6 w-6" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18" /></svg></button>
                    <h1 className="text-2xl font-black text-blue-900 flex items-center gap-2">âš™ï¸ Ajustes del Motor de SimulaciÃ³n</h1>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    {saveStatus && <span className={`text-[11px] font-bold ${saveStatus.includes('Error') ? 'text-red-700' : 'text-green-700'}`}>{saveStatus}</span>}
                    <input id="importConfigTxt" type="file" accept=".txt,.json,text/plain,application/json" className="hidden" onChange={handleImportTxt} />
                    <button onClick={handleExportTxt} className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-bold shadow-md transition-colors">â¬‡ï¸ Exportar Ajustes</button>
                    <button onClick={() => document.getElementById('importConfigTxt').click()} className="px-4 py-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-bold shadow-md transition-colors">â¬†ï¸ Importar Ajustes</button>
                    <button onClick={handleSave} className="px-4 py-2 bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-bold shadow-md transition-colors">ðŸ’¾ Guardar</button>
                    <button onClick={() => setShowHelp(true)} className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-bold shadow-md">â“ Ayuda</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 overflow-y-auto pb-10">
                <div className="flex flex-col gap-6">
	                    <div className="panel p-5 bg-white/60 border-gray-200">
	                        <h3 className="font-black text-blue-800 border-b border-blue-200 pb-2 mb-4 uppercase text-xs tracking-widest">ðŸ‘¥ Datos Generales</h3>
		                            <div className="space-y-4">
                            <div><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 block mb-1">PLANTILLA MTE TOTAL</label><input type="number" className="custom-select font-black text-blue-700 text-lg py-2" value={config.globalMTE} onChange={e => handleChange('globalMTE', e.target.value)} /></div>
                            <div className="bg-purple-50 p-3 rounded-lg border border-purple-200">
                                <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-purple-800 block mb-1">CAPACIDAD CAL. C (Por Grupo)</label>
                                <div className="text-xl font-black text-purple-900">{Math.max(1, Math.round((config.globalMTE || 2100) / 52))} plazas</div>
                                <p className="text-[9px] text-purple-600 mt-1 leading-tight">FÃ³rmula AutomÃ¡tica: MTE / 4 Grupos / 13 Periodos</p>
                            </div>
                            <div><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 block mb-1">MÃX. SOLAPAMIENTO PERMITIDO (DÃ­as)</label><input type="number" className="custom-select" value={config.maxSolapamiento} onChange={e => handleChange('maxSolapamiento', e.target.value)} /></div>
                            <div><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 block mb-1">CRÃ‰DITOS AUTO POR MTE (CAL. A)</label><input type="number" min="0" step="1" className="custom-select" value={config.creditosAutoA ?? DEFAULT_FLEX_DAYS_A} onChange={e => handleChange('creditosAutoA', e.target.value)} /></div>
	                        </div>
	                    </div>

	                    <div className="panel p-5 bg-slate-50/70 border-slate-200">
	                        <h3 className="font-black text-slate-800 border-b border-slate-200 pb-2 mb-4 uppercase text-xs tracking-widest">ðŸ“¥ Sorteo RotaciÃ³n</h3>
	                        <div className="space-y-3">
	                            <input id="rotationExcelInput" type="file" accept=".xlsx,.xls" className="hidden" onChange={handleRotationExcelImport} />
                            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-600">Sube un Excel con <b>una sola columna</b> y <b>un DNE por fila</b>. Ese listado se usarÃ¡ luego para generar el orden de rotaciÃ³n con el nÃºmero ONCE y <b>ajustarÃ¡ automÃ¡ticamente la plantilla MTE total</b> al nÃºmero de registros leÃ­dos.</p>
	                            <div className="bg-white/80 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-3 space-y-2">
	                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
	                                    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase">Fichero actual</span>
	                                    <span className="text-[11px] font-black text-slate-800">{config.rotationDneFileName || 'Sin cargar'}</span>
	                                </div>
	                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
	                                    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase">DNE leÃ­dos</span>
	                                    <span className="text-[11px] font-black text-blue-700">{Array.isArray(config.rotationDneList) ? config.rotationDneList.length : 0}</span>
	                                </div>
	                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
	                                    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase">Plantilla MTE</span>
	                                    <span className="text-[11px] font-black text-purple-700">{config.globalMTE}</span>
	                                </div>
	                            </div>
	                            <div className="flex gap-2">
	                                <button onClick={() => document.getElementById('rotationExcelInput').click()} className="flex-1 px-3 py-2 bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-xl text-[10px] font-bold shadow-sm transition-colors">Subir Excel DNE</button>
	                                <button onClick={clearRotationExcel} disabled={!Array.isArray(config.rotationDneList) || config.rotationDneList.length === 0} className={`px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-bold shadow-sm transition-colors ${Array.isArray(config.rotationDneList) && config.rotationDneList.length > 0 ? 'bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 hover:bg-rose-200 border border-rose-300' : 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-500 border border-gray-200'}`}>Limpiar</button>
	                            </div>
	                            <div className="pt-2 border-t border-slate-200">
	                                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
	                                    <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase">Secuencia unidades del sorteo</label>
	                                    <button onClick={resetRotationUnitSequence} className="px-2 py-1 bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors">Restaurar</button>
	                                </div>
	                                <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-2">El orden por defecto queda `A1 -> B1 -> C1 -> A2 ...`. Puedes mover cada unidad para ajustar la secuencia real.</p>
	                                <div className="space-y-1.5 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto pr-1">
	                                    {rotationUnitSequence.map((unit, idx) => (
	                                        <div key={`${unit}-${idx}`} className="flex items-center justify-between bg-white/80 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5">
	                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
	                                                <span className="w-6 text-center text-[10px] font-black text-slate-500">{idx + 1}</span>
	                                                <span className="text-[11px] font-black text-slate-800">{unit}</span>
	                                            </div>
	                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
	                                                <button onClick={() => moveRotationUnit(idx, -1)} disabled={idx === 0} className={`px-2 py-1 rounded text-[10px] font-black ${idx === 0 ? 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-400' : 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-200 border border-slate-300'}`}>â†‘</button>
	                                                <button onClick={() => moveRotationUnit(idx, 1)} disabled={idx === rotationUnitSequence.length - 1} className={`px-2 py-1 rounded text-[10px] font-black ${idx === rotationUnitSequence.length - 1 ? 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-400' : 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-200 border border-slate-300'}`}>â†“</button>
	                                            </div>
	                                        </div>
	                                    ))}
	                                </div>
	                            </div>
	                        </div>
	                    </div>

	                    <div className="panel p-5 bg-orange-50/60 border-orange-200">
                        <h3 className="font-black text-orange-800 border-b border-orange-200 pb-2 mb-4 uppercase text-xs tracking-widest">ðŸŒ¡ï¸ Nivel de PresiÃ³n (Cal. A)</h3>
                        <div className="space-y-3">
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-700">Lab. Normales</span><div className="flex items-center gap-1 w-28"><input type="number" step="0.1" className="custom-select text-right" value={toPressureLevel(config.presionLab)} onChange={e => handlePressureLevelChange('presionLab', e.target.value)}/><span className="text-[10px] font-bold">Niv.</span></div></div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-700">F.S. Normales</span><div className="flex items-center gap-1 w-28"><input type="number" step="0.1" className="custom-select text-right" value={toPressureLevel(config.presionSD)} onChange={e => handlePressureLevelChange('presionSD', e.target.value)}/><span className="text-[10px] font-bold">Niv.</span></div></div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-700">Festivos</span><div className="flex items-center gap-1 w-28"><input type="number" step="0.1" className="custom-select text-right" value={toPressureLevel(config.presionFes)} onChange={e => handlePressureLevelChange('presionFes', e.target.value)}/><span className="text-[10px] font-bold">Niv.</span></div></div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-red-700">Lab. Verano (Jun-Sep)</span><div className="flex items-center gap-1 w-28"><input type="number" step="0.1" className="custom-select text-right border-red-300 text-red-700" value={toPressureLevel(config.presionAltaLab)} onChange={e => handlePressureLevelChange('presionAltaLab', e.target.value)}/><span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-red-700">Niv.</span></div></div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-red-700">F.S. Verano</span><div className="flex items-center gap-1 w-28"><input type="number" step="0.1" className="custom-select text-right border-red-300 text-red-700" value={toPressureLevel(config.presionAltaSD)} onChange={e => handlePressureLevelChange('presionAltaSD', e.target.value)}/><span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-red-700">Niv.</span></div></div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-cyan-700">Lab. Invierno</span><div className="flex items-center gap-1 w-28"><input type="number" step="0.1" className="custom-select text-right border-cyan-300 text-cyan-700" value={toPressureLevel(config.presionInviernoLab)} onChange={e => handlePressureLevelChange('presionInviernoLab', e.target.value)}/><span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-cyan-700">Niv.</span></div></div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-cyan-700">F.S. Invierno</span><div className="flex items-center gap-1 w-28"><input type="number" step="0.1" className="custom-select text-right border-cyan-300 text-cyan-700" value={toPressureLevel(config.presionInviernoSD)} onChange={e => handlePressureLevelChange('presionInviernoSD', e.target.value)}/><span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-cyan-700">Niv.</span></div></div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-violet-700">Semana Santa</span><div className="flex items-center gap-1 w-28"><input type="number" step="0.1" className="custom-select text-right border-violet-300 text-violet-700" value={toPressureLevel(config.presionSemanaSanta)} onChange={e => handlePressureLevelChange('presionSemanaSanta', e.target.value)}/><span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-violet-700">Niv.</span></div></div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-amber-700">Puentes</span><div className="flex items-center gap-1 w-28"><input type="number" step="0.1" className="custom-select text-right border-amber-300 text-amber-700" value={toPressureLevel(config.presionPuentes)} onChange={e => handlePressureLevelChange('presionPuentes', e.target.value)}/><span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-amber-700">Niv.</span></div></div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-sky-700">Viernes</span><div className="flex items-center gap-1 w-28"><input type="number" step="0.1" className="custom-select text-right border-sky-300 text-sky-700" value={toPressureLevel(config.presionViernes)} onChange={e => handlePressureLevelChange('presionViernes', e.target.value)}/><span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-sky-700">Niv.</span></div></div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-indigo-700">Martes</span><div className="flex items-center gap-1 w-28"><input type="number" step="0.1" className="custom-select text-right border-indigo-300 text-indigo-700" value={toPressureLevel(config.presionMartes)} onChange={e => handlePressureLevelChange('presionMartes', e.target.value)}/><span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-indigo-700">Niv.</span></div></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="panel p-5 bg-indigo-50/60 border-indigo-200">
                        <h3 className="font-black text-indigo-800 border-b border-indigo-200 pb-2 mb-4 uppercase text-xs tracking-widest">ðŸ§  ParÃ¡metros LÃ³gicos y Festivos</h3>
                        <div className="space-y-4">
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-indigo-100 pb-3">
                                <span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-700">AÃ±os ProyecciÃ³n (RotaciÃ³n)</span>
                                <input type="number" className="custom-select w-20 text-center" value={config.proyeccionAnos} onChange={e => handleChange('proyeccionAnos', e.target.value)} />
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-indigo-900 block mb-2">FESTIVOS LOCALES (Mes-DÃ­a)</label>
                                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-2">
                                    {(config.customHolidays || []).map((h, i) => {
                                        const [m, d] = h.split('-');
                                        return (
                                            <span key={i} className="text-[10px] bg-indigo-200 text-indigo-800 px-2 py-1 rounded flex items-center gap-1 font-bold">
                                                {d}/{parseInt(m)+1}
                                                <button onClick={() => setConfig(p => ({...p, customHolidays: p.customHolidays.filter((_, idx) => idx !== i)}))} className="text-indigo-500 hover:text-red-500 ml-1">&times;</button>
                                            </span>
                                        );
                                    })}
                                </div>
                                <div className="flex gap-2">
                                    <select id="newHolMonth" className="custom-select w-1/2">
                                        {MESES.map((m, i) => <option key={i} value={i}>{m}</option>)}
                                    </select>
                                    <input type="number" id="newHolDay" placeholder="DÃ­a" className="custom-select w-1/3 text-center" min="1" max="31" />
                                    <button onClick={() => {
                                        const d = document.getElementById('newHolDay').value;
                                        const m = document.getElementById('newHolMonth').value;
                                        if(d && m) setConfig(p => ({...p, customHolidays: [...(p.customHolidays||[]), `${m}-${d}`]}));
                                    }} className="bg-indigo-600 text-white rounded px-3 text-xs font-bold hover:bg-indigo-700">+</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="panel p-5 bg-teal-50/60 border-teal-200">
                        <h3 className="font-black text-teal-800 border-b border-teal-200 pb-2 mb-4 uppercase text-xs tracking-widest">ðŸ§© GestiÃ³n de PAP</h3>
                        <div className="space-y-4">
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                                <span className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-700">DÃ­as PAP por MTE</span>
                                <input type="number" className="custom-select w-20 text-center font-bold text-teal-700" value={config.maxPAPGlobal} onChange={e => handleChange('maxPAPGlobal', e.target.value)} />
                            </div>
                            <div className="bg-white/60 p-3 rounded-lg border border-teal-100 space-y-3">
                                <h4 className="text-[9px] font-bold text-teal-900 uppercase">Motor de AsignaciÃ³n AutomÃ¡tica</h4>
                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 font-medium">Habilitar IA AsignaciÃ³n</span>
                                    <button onClick={() => handleChange('autoAssignPAP', config.autoAssignPAP ? 0 : 1)} className={`toggle-btn ${config.autoAssignPAP ? 'bg-teal-500 text-white' : 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-500'}`}>
                                        {config.autoAssignPAP ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 font-medium">Prioridad (Peso) vs Vacaciones</span>
                                    <input type="number" className="custom-select w-20 text-center" value={config.prioridadPAP} onChange={e => handleChange('prioridadPAP', e.target.value)} disabled={!config.autoAssignPAP} />
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div className="bg-white/60 p-3 rounded-lg border border-teal-100 space-y-2">
                                <h4 className="text-[9px] font-bold text-teal-900 uppercase">Cupos PAP Actuales (Lab / SÃ¡b / Dom)</h4>
                                <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                                    <table className="w-full text-[10px]">
                                        <thead>
                                            <tr className="text-gray-600 uppercase">
                                                <th className="text-left py-1 pr-2">Temporada</th>
                                                <th className="text-center py-1 px-1">Lab</th>
                                                <th className="text-center py-1 px-1">SÃ¡b</th>
                                                <th className="text-center py-1 px-1">Dom</th>
                                            </tr>
                                        </thead>
                                        <tbody className="text-gray-700">
                                            <tr>
                                                <td className="py-1 pr-2 font-bold">Invierno</td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_invierno_lab} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_invierno_lab', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_invierno_sab} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_invierno_sab', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_invierno_dom} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_invierno_dom', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                            </tr>
                                            <tr>
                                                <td className="py-1 pr-2 font-bold">Junio (16-30)</td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_junioQ2_lab} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_junioQ2_lab', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_junioQ2_sab} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_junioQ2_sab', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_junioQ2_dom} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_junioQ2_dom', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                            </tr>
                                            <tr>
                                                <td className="py-1 pr-2 font-bold">Julio</td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_julio_lab} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_julio_lab', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_julio_sab} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_julio_sab', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_julio_dom} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_julio_dom', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                            </tr>
                                            <tr>
                                                <td className="py-1 pr-2 font-bold">Agosto</td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_agosto_lab} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_agosto_lab', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_agosto_sab} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_agosto_sab', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_agosto_dom} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_agosto_dom', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                            </tr>
                                            <tr>
                                                <td className="py-1 pr-2 font-bold">Septiembre</td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_septiembre_lab} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_septiembre_lab', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_septiembre_sab} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_septiembre_sab', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                <td className="px-1"><input type="number" min="0" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.pap_septiembre_dom} onChange={e => handleChange('pap_septiembre_dom', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                            </tr>
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                {/* TABLA PRINCIPAL DE CUPOS */}
	                <div className="lg:col-span-2 flex flex-col gap-6">
	                    <div className="panel p-5 bg-orange-50/70 border-orange-200">
	                        <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-start md:justify-between gap-3 mb-4">
	                            <div>
	                                <h3 className="font-black text-orange-800 border-b border-orange-200 pb-2 mb-2 uppercase text-sm tracking-widest">ðŸŽ¯ Preferencia Auto Simplificada (Cal. A)</h3>
	                                <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-600 max-w-2xl">La prioridad automÃ¡tica de agotamiento de cupos en A ya no se ajusta mes a mes. Ahora usamos 5 tramos claros y el sistema reparte el mismo valor a los meses de cada tramo.</p>
	                            </div>
	                            <button onClick={applyAutoProfileDefaults} className="px-3 py-2 bg-white text-orange-700 border border-orange-300 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-bold shadow-sm hover:bg-orange-100 transition-colors">Restaurar perfil base</button>
	                        </div>
	                        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-3">
	                            {AUTO_A_PROFILE_SEGMENTS.map(segment => (
	                                <div key={segment.key} className="bg-white/80 border border-orange-200 rounded-xl p-3 shadow-sm">
	                                    <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-orange-900 uppercase tracking-wider block mb-1">{segment.label}</label>
	                                    <input type="number" step="0.1" min="0" className="custom-select text-center font-black text-orange-700" value={config[segment.key]} onChange={e => handleAutoProfileChange(segment.key, e.target.value)} />
	                                    <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-500 mt-2">{segment.months.map(monthIdx => MESES[monthIdx].slice(0, 3)).join(' Â· ')}</p>
	                                </div>
	                            ))}
	                        </div>
	                    </div>
	                    <div className="panel p-5 bg-white/80 border-blue-200">
	                        <h3 className="font-black text-blue-900 border-b border-blue-200 pb-2 mb-4 uppercase text-sm tracking-widest">ðŸ“… Cupos FÃ­sicos y Preferencias Mensuales</h3>
	                        <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-600 mb-4">Ajusta los huecos reales del calendario (Lab / S/D / Festivos). El <b className="text-purple-700">Peso (C)</b> define en quÃ© orden se llenan las quincenas. La columna <b className="text-orange-600">Auto (A)</b> es una previsualizaciÃ³n del perfil simplificado aplicado a cada mes.</p>
	                        
	                        <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm">
	                            <table className="w-full text-left bg-white">
	                                <thead>
                                    <tr className="bg-gray-100 text-[9px] uppercase text-gray-600">
                                        <th className="p-2 font-black border-r border-gray-200">Mes</th>
                                        <th className="p-2 font-black text-center text-blue-800 bg-blue-50/50">Lab</th>
                                        <th className="p-2 font-black text-center text-blue-800 bg-blue-50/50">S/D</th>
                                        <th className="p-2 font-black text-center text-blue-800 bg-blue-50/50 border-r border-gray-200">Fes</th>
                                        <th className="p-2 font-black text-purple-700 text-center border-r border-gray-200">Peso (C)</th>
	                                        <th className="p-2 font-black text-orange-600 text-center">Auto (A)</th>
	                                    </tr>
	                                </thead>
	                                <tbody className="text-xs">
	                                    {MESES.map((mes, i) => (
                                        <React.Fragment key={i}>
                                            {i === 0 ? (
                                                <tr className="border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/80">
                                                    <td className="p-2 font-bold text-gray-700 border-r border-gray-100">{mes} (sin cupo A)</td>
                                                    <td className="p-1"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center bg-gray-100 text-gray-500" value={0} disabled /></td>
                                                    <td className="p-1"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center bg-gray-100 text-gray-500" value={0} disabled /></td>
                                                    <td className="p-1 border-r border-gray-100"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center bg-gray-100 text-gray-500" value={0} disabled /></td>
                                                    <td className="p-1 border-r border-gray-100"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center font-bold text-purple-700 bg-purple-50/50" value={config[`pesoC_${i}`]} onChange={e => handleChange(`pesoC_${i}`, e.target.value)} /></td>
	                                                    <td className="p-1"><div className="custom-select text-center font-black text-orange-700 bg-orange-50/70 border-orange-200">{getAutoPriorityMultiplierA(config, i).toFixed(1)}</div></td>
	                                                </tr>
	                                            ) : i === 5 ? (
	                                                <>
	                                                    <tr className="border-b border-gray-100 bg-blue-50/20">
                                                        <td className="p-2 font-bold text-gray-700 text-[10px] border-r border-gray-100">Junio (1-15)</td>
                                                        <td className="p-1"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.c_5q1_0} onChange={e => handleChange('c_5q1_0', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                        <td className="p-1"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.c_5q1_1} onChange={e => handleChange('c_5q1_1', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                        <td className="p-1 border-r border-gray-100"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.c_5q1_2} onChange={e => handleChange('c_5q1_2', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                        <td className="p-1 border-r border-gray-100" rowSpan="2"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center font-bold text-purple-700 h-12 bg-purple-50/50" value={config[`pesoC_${i}`]} onChange={e => handleChange(`pesoC_${i}`, e.target.value)} /></td>
	                                                        <td className="p-1" rowSpan="2"><div className="custom-select text-center font-black text-orange-700 h-12 flex items-center justify-center bg-orange-50/70 border-orange-200">{getAutoPriorityMultiplierA(config, i).toFixed(1)}</div></td>
	                                                    </tr>
	                                                    <tr className="border-b border-gray-200 bg-blue-50/20">
	                                                        <td className="p-2 font-bold text-gray-700 text-[10px] border-r border-gray-100">Junio (16-30)</td>
                                                        <td className="p-1"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.c_5q2_0} onChange={e => handleChange('c_5q2_0', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                        <td className="p-1"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.c_5q2_1} onChange={e => handleChange('c_5q2_1', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                        <td className="p-1 border-r border-gray-100"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center" value={config.c_5q2_2} onChange={e => handleChange('c_5q2_2', e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                    </tr>
                                                </>
                                            ) : (
                                                <tr className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50">
                                                    <td className="p-2 font-bold text-gray-700 border-r border-gray-100">{mes}</td>
                                                    <td className="p-1"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center" value={config[`c_${i}_0`]} onChange={e => handleChange(`c_${i}_0`, e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                    <td className="p-1"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center" value={config[`c_${i}_1`]} onChange={e => handleChange(`c_${i}_1`, e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                    <td className="p-1 border-r border-gray-100"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center" value={config[`c_${i}_2`]} onChange={e => handleChange(`c_${i}_2`, e.target.value)} /></td>
                                                    <td className="p-1 border-r border-gray-100"><input type="number" className="custom-select text-center font-bold text-purple-700 bg-purple-50/50" value={config[`pesoC_${i}`]} onChange={e => handleChange(`pesoC_${i}`, e.target.value)} /></td>
	                                                    <td className="p-1"><div className="custom-select text-center font-black text-orange-700 bg-orange-50/70 border-orange-200">{getAutoPriorityMultiplierA(config, i).toFixed(1)}</div></td>
	                                                </tr>
	                                            )}
	                                        </React.Fragment>
	                                    ))}
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
}

// --- 4. COMPONENTE MES VISUAL (GRID) ---
function Month({ tipo, monthIdx, year, groupShift, redDaysSet, getCupo, getCupoPAP, selectedDays, selectedPAPDays, papModeEnabled, onDayClick, onPapDayClick, isConfirmed, festivos, anchorMonday, sequence, getVacationStatus, getRMStatus, cyclesC, selectedCycleC }) {
    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, monthIdx + 1, 0).getDate();
    const firstDayDate = new Date(year, monthIdx, 1);
    const firstDayWeekday = firstDayDate.getDay();
    const firstDayIdx = firstDayWeekday === 0 ? 6 : firstDayWeekday - 1; 
    const festivosSet = useMemo(() => new Set(festivos), [festivos]);
    const selectedDaysSet = useMemo(() => new Set(selectedDays), [selectedDays]);
    const selectedPAPDaysSet = useMemo(() => new Set(selectedPAPDays), [selectedPAPDays]);
    const effectivePapMode = tipo === 'C' ? true : papModeEnabled;
    const days = [];

    for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
        const current = new Date(year, monthIdx, d);
        const dayOfWeek = current.getDay();
        const esSD = (dayOfWeek === 0 || dayOfWeek === 6);
        const dayId = `${monthIdx}-${d}`;
        const esF = festivosSet.has(dayId);
        
        const diffToMonday = dayOfWeek === 0 ? 6 : dayOfWeek - 1;
        const currentMonday = new Date(current); currentMonday.setDate(current.getDate() - diffToMonday); currentMonday.setHours(0,0,0,0);
        const weeksBetween = Math.round((currentMonday - anchorMonday) / MS_PER_WEEK);
        let seqIdx = (weeksBetween - groupShift) % 4; if (seqIdx < 0) seqIdx += 4;
        
        const isDescansoA = sequence[seqIdx].includes(dayOfWeek);
        const isDescansoB = tipo === 'B' && redDaysSet.has(dayId);
        const currentCycle = tipo === 'C' ? cyclesC.find(c => current >= c.start && current <= c.end) : null;
        const isCCRBase = tipo === 'C' ? (seqIdx === 0 || seqIdx === 1 || (seqIdx === 2 && dayOfWeek === 1)) : false;
        const { isSummer, isPfa } = getVacationStatus(current);
        const { isRMDay, isRMInside } = getRMStatus ? getRMStatus(current) : { isRMDay: false, isRMInside: false };
        const isVacation = isSummer || isPfa;
        
        const cupo = getCupo(monthIdx, d, esSD, esF);
        const isSelectedA = tipo === 'A' && selectedDaysSet.has(dayId);
        const isSelectedC = tipo === 'C' && selectedCycleC && (current >= selectedCycleC.start && current <= selectedCycleC.end);
        const isSelectedPAP = selectedPAPDaysSet.has(dayId);
        const papCupoBase = getCupoPAP ? getCupoPAP(monthIdx, d, dayOfWeek) : 0;
        const papCupo = Math.max(0, papCupoBase - (isSelectedPAP ? 1 : 0));
        const papBlocked = isDescansoA || isDescansoB || isVacation || isSelectedA || isSelectedC || (isRMDay && isRMInside);

        let baseClass = "cell-base";
        if (tipo === 'C') {
            if (isSelectedC) baseClass += " ccr-selected";
            else if (isDescansoA) baseClass += " descanso-yellow";
            else if (isCCRBase && currentCycle) {
                baseClass += currentCycle.isIncompatible ? " bg-red-50 text-red-300" : ` ccr-${currentCycle.availabilityLevel}`;
            }
        } else {
            if (isDescansoB) baseClass += " descanso-red";
            else if (isDescansoA) baseClass += " descanso-yellow";
            else if (isSelectedA) baseClass += isConfirmed ? " sel-confirmed" : " sel-selected";
            else if (cupo === 0 && tipo === 'A') baseClass += " bg-red-50"; 
        }
        if (isRMDay && isRMInside) baseClass += " rm-day-inside";
        else if (isRMDay && !isRMInside) baseClass += " rm-day-outside";
        if (isSelectedPAP && !isSelectedC) baseClass += " pap-selected";

        let isOpacity60 = false;
        if (isVacation && !isSelectedA && !isSelectedC) isOpacity60 = true;
        if (tipo === 'A' && cupo === 0 && !isSelectedA && !isDescansoA && !isDescansoB) isOpacity60 = true;
        if (isRMDay && isRMInside && !isSelectedA && !isSelectedC) isOpacity60 = true;

        let badgeClass = cupo === 0 ? "cupo-empty" : (cupo <= 5 ? "cupo-low" : "cupo-ok");
        let papBadgeClass = papCupo === 0 ? "cupo-empty" : (papCupo <= 10 ? "cupo-low" : "cupo-ok");

        days.push({ d, dayId, dayOfWeek, isDescansoA, isDescansoB, isVacation, isSummer, isPfa, isRMDay, isRMInside, cupo, badgeClass, papCupoBase, papCupo, papBadgeClass, papBlocked, baseClass, isSelectedA, isOpacity60, esF, esSD });
    }

    return (
        <div className="bg-white/50 rounded-lg border border-white/60 p-2 md:p-3 shadow-sm flex flex-col min-h-[260px] relative z-10 backdrop-blur-md">
            <h3 className="text-[#2563eb] font-bold text-center text-xs md:text-sm capitalize mb-2 pb-1 border-b border-gray-100/50">{MESES[monthIdx]}</h3>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-px text-center text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1">{['L','M','X','J','V','S','D'].map(d => <div key={d}>{d}</div>)}</div>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-7 grid-rows-6 gap-[1px] flex-1">
                {Array(firstDayIdx).fill(0).map((_, i) => <div key={`b-${i}`}></div>)}
                {days.map((day) => (
                    <div key={day.d} onClick={() => {
                        if (effectivePapMode) {
                            onPapDayClick(monthIdx, day.d, day.dayOfWeek, day.papBlocked, day.papCupoBase);
                            return;
                        }
                        if (tipo === 'B' || tipo === 'C' || day.isDescansoA || day.isDescansoB || (day.isVacation && !day.isSelectedA) || (day.isRMDay && day.isRMInside)) return; 
                        if (day.cupo > 0 || day.isSelectedA) onDayClick(monthIdx, day.d, day.esSD, day.esF, day.isDescansoA || day.isDescansoB, day.isVacation, day.isRMDay && day.isRMInside);
                    }} className={`${day.baseClass} ${day.isOpacity60 ? 'cursor-not-allowed opacity-60' : ''}`}>
                        <span className={`text-[11px] md:text-xs leading-none flex items-center justify-center ${day.esF || day.esSD ? 'text-red-500 font-bold' : (day.isDescansoB ? 'text-red-800 font-bold' : 'text-gray-800')}`}>
                            {day.d}{day.isSummer && <span className="icon-overlay">â˜€ï¸</span>}{day.isPfa && <span className="icon-overlay">â„ï¸</span>}{day.isRMDay && !day.isRMInside && <span className="icon-overlay">ðŸ©º</span>}
