	        const parsed = parseInt(String(selectedId || '').slice(1), 10);
	        return Number.isFinite(parsed) && parsed >= 1 && parsed <= 4 ? parsed : 1;
	    }, [selectedId]);
	    const sequence = useMemo(() => buildRotationSequence(startPos), [startPos]);
	    const activePosition = sequence[currentStep % 13];
	    const maxConfigYear = useMemo(() => Math.max(13, Number(config?.proyeccionAnos) || 15), [config]);
	    const rotationDneList = useMemo(() => (Array.isArray(config?.rotationDneList) ? config.rotationDneList.filter(Boolean) : []), [config]);
    const rotationTemplateSize = useMemo(() => {
        const loaded = rotationDneList.length;
        return loaded > 0 ? loaded : Math.max(0, Number(globalMTE) || 0);
    }, [rotationDneList, globalMTE]);
    const normalizedOnceNumber = useMemo(() => {
        const digitsOnly = String(onceNumber || '').replace(/\D/g, '').slice(0, 5);
        const parsed = Number(digitsOnly || '0');
        return Math.max(0, Math.min(99999, parsed));
    }, [onceNumber]);
    const formattedOnceNumber = useMemo(() => String(normalizedOnceNumber).padStart(5, '0'), [normalizedOnceNumber]);
    const rotationUnitSequence = useMemo(() => normalizeRotationUnitSequence(config?.rotationUnitSequence), [config]);
    const winningStartPosition = useMemo(() => {
        if (rotationTemplateSize <= 0) return 0;
        return Math.floor((normalizedOnceNumber * rotationTemplateSize) / 100000) + 1;
    }, [normalizedOnceNumber, rotationTemplateSize]);
    const winningStartDne = useMemo(() => {
        if (rotationDneList.length === 0 || winningStartPosition <= 0) return '';
        const startIdx = Math.min(rotationDneList.length - 1, Math.max(0, winningStartPosition - 1));
        return rotationDneList[startIdx] || '';
    }, [rotationDneList, winningStartPosition]);
    const rotationAssignmentSlots = useMemo(() => buildRotationAssignmentSlots(rotationDneList.length, rotationUnitSequence), [rotationDneList.length, rotationUnitSequence]);
    const orderedRotationDneList = useMemo(() => {
        if (rotationDneList.length === 0 || winningStartPosition <= 0) return [];
        const startIdx = Math.min(rotationDneList.length - 1, Math.max(0, winningStartPosition - 1));
        return [...rotationDneList.slice(startIdx), ...rotationDneList.slice(0, startIdx)];
    }, [rotationDneList, winningStartPosition]);
    const generatedRotationOrder = useMemo(() => {
        if (orderedRotationDneList.length === 0) return [];
        return orderedRotationDneList.map((dne, idx) => {
            const slot = rotationAssignmentSlots[idx] || null;
            return {
                order: idx + 1,
                dne,
                isWinningStart: idx === 0,
                block: slot?.block || null,
                unit: slot?.unit || '-',
                seat: slot?.seat || null,
                slotLabel: slot?.label || 'Sin hueco asignado'
            };
        });
    }, [orderedRotationDneList, rotationAssignmentSlots]);
    const normalizedRotationSearch = useMemo(() => String(rotationSearchTerm || '').trim().toLowerCase(), [rotationSearchTerm]);
    const filteredRotationOrder = useMemo(() => {
        if (!normalizedRotationSearch) return generatedRotationOrder;
        return generatedRotationOrder.filter(row => String(row.dne || '').toLowerCase().includes(normalizedRotationSearch));
    }, [generatedRotationOrder, normalizedRotationSearch]);
    const searchedRotationRow = useMemo(() => {
        if (!normalizedRotationSearch) return null;
        const exact = generatedRotationOrder.find(row => String(row.dne || '').toLowerCase() === normalizedRotationSearch);
        if (exact) return exact;
        return filteredRotationOrder[0] || null;
    }, [generatedRotationOrder, filteredRotationOrder, normalizedRotationSearch]);
	    const searchedRotationSummary = useMemo(() => {
	        if (!searchedRotationRow) return null;
	        const ahead = Math.max(0, searchedRotationRow.order - 1);
	        const behind = Math.max(0, generatedRotationOrder.length - searchedRotationRow.order);
	        return {
            ...searchedRotationRow,
            ahead,
            behind
	        };
	    }, [searchedRotationRow, generatedRotationOrder.length]);
	    const canUseSearchedVision = useMemo(() => {
	        return !!(searchedRotationSummary?.unit && ALL_ROTATION_UNITS.includes(searchedRotationSummary.unit));
	    }, [searchedRotationSummary]);
	    const visionUnitId = useMemo(() => {
	        if (generalVisionMode === 'dne' && canUseSearchedVision) return searchedRotationSummary.unit;
	        return selectedId;
	    }, [generalVisionMode, canUseSearchedVision, searchedRotationSummary, selectedId]);
	    const visionScheme = useMemo(() => getGroupColor(visionUnitId.charAt(0)), [visionUnitId]);
	    const visionBadgeLabel = useMemo(() => {
	        if (generalVisionMode === 'dne' && canUseSearchedVision) return searchedRotationSummary.dne;
	        return visionUnitId;
	    }, [generalVisionMode, canUseSearchedVision, searchedRotationSummary, visionUnitId]);
	    const visionHelperText = useMemo(() => {
	        if (generalVisionMode === 'dne' && canUseSearchedVision) {
	            return `ProyecciÃ³n automÃ¡tica para el DNE buscado, siguiendo su asignaciÃ³n actual en ${searchedRotationSummary.slotLabel}.`;
	        }
	        return 'ProyecciÃ³n automÃ¡tica de posiciÃ³n, subbloque, subsubbloque y MTE delante para la unidad seleccionada.';
	    }, [generalVisionMode, canUseSearchedVision, searchedRotationSummary]);

	    const currentContent = getRotationBlockContent(currentStep);

    useEffect(() => { let i; if (isPlaying) { i = setInterval(() => { setCurrentStep(p => p + 1); }, 2000); } return () => clearInterval(i); }, [isPlaying]);
    useEffect(() => { setCurrentStep(0); }, [startPos]);

    const allSubSubBlocks = ALL_ROTATION_UNITS;
    const subBlockRangeLabel = `${ROTATION_GROUPS[0]}..${ROTATION_GROUPS[ROTATION_GROUPS.length - 1]}`;
    const unitRangeLabel = allSubSubBlocks.length > 0
        ? `${allSubSubBlocks[0]}..${allSubSubBlocks[allSubSubBlocks.length - 1]}`
        : '-';
    const allPositions = [...ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE].sort((a,b) => a-b);
    const sequenceYears = useMemo(() => (
        Array.from({ length: 13 }, (_, idx) => {
            const step = idx;
            return {
                yearOffset: idx + 1,
                blockPos: sequence[idx % 13],
                content: getRotationBlockContent(step)
            };
        })
    ), [sequence]);
    const canonicalPositionOrderByPos = useMemo(() => {
        const map = {};
        ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE.forEach((pos, idx) => { map[pos] = idx; });
        return map;
    }, []);
    const getGeneralSequenceCellData = useCallback((yearIdx, pos) => {
        if (generalSequenceMode === 'unidad') {
            const yearData = sequenceYears[yearIdx];
            return {
                blockId: null,
                content: (yearData && pos === yearData.blockPos) ? yearData.content : null
            };
        }
        const posOrder = canonicalPositionOrderByPos[pos];
        if (typeof posOrder !== 'number') return { blockId: null, content: null };
        const cycleLen = ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE.length;
        const normalizedYear = ((yearIdx % cycleLen) + cycleLen) % cycleLen;
        const blockOrder = (posOrder - normalizedYear + cycleLen) % cycleLen;
        const blockId = ROTATION_BASE_SEQUENCE[blockOrder];
        const step = blockOrder + yearIdx;
        return {
            blockId,
            content: getRotationBlockContent(step)
        };
    }, [generalSequenceMode, sequenceYears, canonicalPositionOrderByPos]);
    const exportSequenceExcel = useCallback(() => {
        try {
            const stamp = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-');
            const modeSuffix = generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 'todos_bloques' : 'unidad';
            const groupExcelColors = {
                A: { bg: '#dcfce7', bd: '#86efac' },
                B: { bg: '#fef9c3', bd: '#fde047' },
                C: { bg: '#fee2e2', bd: '#fca5a5' }
            };
            const trackedGroup = selectedId.charAt(0);
            const trackedGroupBg = (groupExcelColors[trackedGroup] || { bg: '#eef2ff' }).bg;
            const headerYears = sequenceYears.map(y => (
                generalSequenceMode === 'todos'
                    ? `<th>AÃ±o ${y.yearOffset}<br><span style="color:#1d4ed8;font-weight:700">P${y.blockPos}</span></th>`
                    : `<th>AÃ±o ${y.yearOffset}</th>`
            )).join('');
            const rowsHtml = allPositions.map(pos => {
                const cells = sequenceYears.map((_, yearIdx) => {
                    const cellData = getGeneralSequenceCellData(yearIdx, pos);
                    const content = cellData.content;
                    if (!content) {
                        return '<td style="text-align:center;color:#9ca3af;">Â·</td>';
                    }
                    const blockTag = generalSequenceMode === 'todos'
                        ? `<span style="display:inline-block;font-size:9pt;font-weight:700;color:#1d4ed8;margin-bottom:2px;">Bloque ${cellData.blockId}</span><br>`
                        : '';
                    const cellLines = content
                        .map(group => {
                            const c = groupExcelColors[group.label] || { bg: '#f3f4f6', bd: '#d1d5db' };
                            return `<tr><td bgcolor="${c.bg}" style="background:${c.bg};color:#111827;border:1px solid ${c.bd};padding:2px 4px;font-weight:700;">${group.label}: ${group.subs.map(num => `${group.label}${num}`).join(' ')}</td></tr>`;
                        })
                        .join('');
                    const outerCellBg = generalSequenceMode === 'unidad' ? trackedGroupBg : '#ffffff';
                    return `<td bgcolor="${outerCellBg}" style="background:${outerCellBg};">${blockTag}<table role="presentation" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;"><tbody>${cellLines}</tbody></table></td>`;
                }).join('');
                return `<tr><td><b>P${pos}</b></td>${cells}</tr>`;
            }).join('');
            const html = `
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<style>
table { border-collapse: collapse; font-family: Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11pt; }
th, td { border: 1px solid #d1d5db; padding: 6px 8px; vertical-align: top; }
th { background: #f3f4f6; text-align: center; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<h3>Secuencia General (13 aÃ±os)</h3>
<p>Inicio: PosiciÃ³n ${startPos}</p>
<p>Modo: ${generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 'Todos los bloques' : 'Seguimiento unidad'}</p>
<table>
<thead><tr><th>PosiciÃ³n</th>${headerYears}</tr></thead>
<tbody>${rowsHtml}</tbody>
</table>
</body>
</html>`;
            const blob = new Blob(["\ufeff", html], { type: 'application/vnd.ms-excel;charset=utf-8;' });
            const a = document.createElement('a');
            a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            a.download = `secuencia_general_13a_${modeSuffix}_${stamp}.xls`;
            document.body.appendChild(a);
            a.click();
            document.body.removeChild(a);
            URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
        } catch (_) {
            alert('No se pudo exportar Excel.');
        }
    }, [sequenceYears, allPositions, startPos, generalSequenceMode, getGeneralSequenceCellData, selectedId]);
    const exportSequenceImageHd = useCallback(() => {
        try {
            const stamp = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-');
            const modeSuffix = generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 'todos_bloques' : 'unidad';
            const firstColW = 120;
            const cellW = 180;
            const headerH = generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 70 : 50;
            const cellH = 110;
            const width = firstColW + (sequenceYears.length * cellW);
            const height = headerH + (allPositions.length * cellH);
            const scale = 2;
            const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            canvas.width = width * scale;
            canvas.height = height * scale;
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            if (!ctx) throw new Error('canvas');
            ctx.scale(scale, scale);

            const groupTextColor = { A: '#166534', B: '#854d0e', C: '#991b1b' };
            const groupBgColor = { A: '#dcfce7', B: '#fef9c3', C: '#fee2e2' };

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#d1d5db';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            for (let c = 0; c <= sequenceYears.length; c++) {
                const x = firstColW + (c * cellW);
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(x, 0);
                ctx.lineTo(x, height);
                ctx.stroke();
            }
            for (let r = 0; r <= allPositions.length; r++) {
                const y = headerH + (r * cellH);
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(0, y);
                ctx.lineTo(width, y);
                ctx.stroke();
            }
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
            ctx.lineTo(0, height);
            ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
            ctx.lineTo(width, 0);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.fillStyle = '#374151';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Arial';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('PosiciÃ³n', firstColW / 2, generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 28 : 30);
            sequenceYears.forEach((y, cIdx) => {
                const x = firstColW + (cIdx * cellW) + (cellW / 2);
                ctx.fillText(`AÃ±o ${y.yearOffset}`, x, generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 24 : 30);
                if (generalSequenceMode === 'todos') {
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#1d4ed8';
                    ctx.font = 'bold 11px Arial';
                    ctx.fillText(`P${y.blockPos}`, x, 46);
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#374151';
                    ctx.font = 'bold 12px Arial';
                }
            });

            allPositions.forEach((pos, rIdx) => {
                const rowY = headerH + (rIdx * cellH);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#111827';
                ctx.font = 'bold 13px Arial';
                ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                ctx.fillText(`P${pos}`, firstColW / 2, rowY + 22);

                sequenceYears.forEach((yearData, cIdx) => {
                    const x = firstColW + (cIdx * cellW);
                    const y = rowY;
                    const cellData = getGeneralSequenceCellData(cIdx, pos);
                    const content = cellData.content;
                    const hasContent = Array.isArray(content) && content.length > 0;
                    const isYearBlockPos = pos === yearData.blockPos;
                    const shouldHighlightCell = hasContent && (generalSequenceMode !== 'todos' || isYearBlockPos);
                    if (shouldHighlightCell) {
                        ctx.fillStyle = '#dbeafe';
                        ctx.fillRect(x + 1, y + 1, cellW - 2, cellH - 2);
                    }
                    if (!hasContent) {
                        ctx.fillStyle = '#d1d5db';
                        ctx.font = 'bold 16px Arial';
                        ctx.fillText('Â·', x + (cellW / 2), y + (cellH / 2));
                        return;
                    }
                    let lineY = y + 18;
                    if (generalSequenceMode === 'todos') {
                        ctx.fillStyle = '#1d4ed8';
                        ctx.font = 'bold 10px Arial';
                        ctx.textAlign = 'left';
                        ctx.fillText(`Bloque ${cellData.blockId}`, x + 10, lineY + 1);
                        lineY += 18;
                    }
                    content.forEach(group => {
                        const line = `${group.label}: ${group.subs.map(num => `${group.label}${num}`).join(' ')}`;
                        ctx.fillStyle = groupBgColor[group.label] || '#e5e7eb';
                        ctx.fillRect(x + 6, lineY - 11, cellW - 12, 18);
                        ctx.fillStyle = groupTextColor[group.label] || '#374151';
                        ctx.font = 'bold 10px Arial';
                        ctx.textAlign = 'left';
                        ctx.fillText(line, x + 10, lineY + 2);
                        lineY += 24;
                    });
                });
            });

            const a = document.createElement('a');
            a.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
            a.download = `secuencia_general_13a_hd_${modeSuffix}_${stamp}.png`;
            document.body.appendChild(a);
            a.click();
            document.body.removeChild(a);
        } catch (_) {
            alert('No se pudo exportar imagen.');
        }
    }, [sequenceYears, allPositions, generalSequenceMode, getGeneralSequenceCellData]);

    return (
        <div className="w-full h-full relative z-10 no-print">
            {showHelp && (
                <Modal title="â“ Ayuda: MÃ³dulo de RotaciÃ³n" onClose={() => setShowHelp(false)}>
	                    <div className="space-y-4 text-gray-700 text-sm">
	                        <p>Esta es tu bola de cristal laboral. Te permite ver exactamente dÃ³nde caerÃ¡ tu unidad en el futuro y generar el orden de rotaciÃ³n real a partir del sorteo.</p>
	                        <div className="bg-indigo-50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-indigo-200">
	                            <h4 className="font-bold text-indigo-900 mb-1">ðŸ† Ventaja EstratÃ©gica</h4>
	                            <p><b>PlanificaciÃ³n vital a largo plazo.</b> Sabiendo que el ciclo de posiciones es pendular (1, 13, 2, 12...), revisa la <b>VisiÃ³n General</b> fija en la parte inferior para averiguar en quÃ© aÃ±o estarÃ¡s en las posiciones Top (P1, P2...) y cuÃ¡ndo te tocarÃ¡ aguantar en las posiciones bajas.</p>
	                        </div>
	                        <div className="bg-slate-50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200">
	                            <h4 className="font-bold text-slate-900 mb-1">ðŸŽ² Orden por sorteo</h4>
	                            <p>Carga antes el Excel en <b>Configurar</b>. Luego introduce el nÃºmero ONCE y el sistema calcularÃ¡ el primer DNE usando la fÃ³rmula del sorteo para repartir la plantilla por <b>Bloque / Unidad / Puesto</b>.</p>
	                        </div>
	                    </div>
	                </Modal>
	            )}
            {showGeneralSequence && (
                <Modal title="ðŸ§© Secuencia General (13 aÃ±os)" onClose={() => setShowGeneralSequence(false)} maxWidth="max-w-[96vw]">
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                        <div className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-600">
                            Tabla tipo Excel: bloque (P), subbloque (SB) y subsubbloque (SSB) por unidad y aÃ±o. Inicio actual: PosiciÃ³n {startPos}. Vista: {generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? 'Todos los bloques' : 'Seguimiento unidad'}.
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                            <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase">Vista</label>
                            <select className="custom-select border-gray-300/60 py-1.5 text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-700 shadow-sm" value={generalSequenceMode} onChange={(e) => setGeneralSequenceMode(e.target.value)}>
                                <option value="unidad">Seguimiento unidad</option>
                                <option value="todos">Todos los bloques</option>
                            </select>
                            <button type="button" onClick={exportSequenceExcel} className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold shadow-md transition-colors">â¬‡ Excel (.xls)</button>
                            <button type="button" onClick={exportSequenceImageHd} className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold shadow-md transition-colors">â¬‡ Imagen HD (.png)</button>
                        </div>
                        <div className="overflow-auto border border-gray-200 rounded-lg">
                            <table className="w-full text-left text-[11px] border-collapse min-w-[2200px]">
                                <thead className="bg-gray-100 sticky top-0 z-10">
                                    <tr className="uppercase text-gray-600">
                                        <th className="p-2 border-r border-gray-200 text-center">PosiciÃ³n</th>
                                        {sequenceYears.map((yearData) => (
                                            <th key={yearData.yearOffset} className="p-2 border-r border-gray-200 text-center">
                                                <div>AÃ±o {yearData.yearOffset}</div>
                                                {generalSequenceMode === 'todos' && (
                                                    <div className="text-[10px] font-black text-blue-700 mt-0.5">P{yearData.blockPos}</div>
                                                )}
                                            </th>
                                        ))}
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody>
                                    {allPositions.map((pos, idx) => {
                                        return (
                                            <tr key={pos} className={idx % 2 === 0 ? 'bg-white' : 'bg-gray-50'}>
                                                <td className="p-2 border-r border-gray-200 font-black text-center">
                                                    P{pos}
                                                </td>
                                                {sequenceYears.map((yearData, yearIdx) => {
                                                    const cellData = getGeneralSequenceCellData(yearIdx, pos);
                                                    const cellContent = cellData.content;
                                                    const hasContent = Array.isArray(cellContent) && cellContent.length > 0;
                                                    const isYearBlockPos = pos === yearData.blockPos;
                                                    return (
                                                        <td key={`${pos}-${yearData.yearOffset}`} className={`p-1.5 border-r border-gray-200 align-top ${hasContent ? (generalSequenceMode === 'todos' ? (isYearBlockPos ? 'bg-blue-50/80' : 'bg-white') : 'bg-blue-50/60') : 'bg-gray-50/40'}`}>
                                                            {!hasContent && (
                                                                <div className="h-[72px] flex items-center justify-center text-gray-300 font-black">Â·</div>
                                                            )}
                                                            {hasContent && (
                                                                <div className="space-y-1 min-h-[72px]">
                                                                    {generalSequenceMode === 'todos' && (
                                                                        <div className="text-[9px] font-black text-blue-700">Bloque {cellData.blockId}</div>
                                                                    )}
                                                                    {generalSequenceMode === 'todos' && isYearBlockPos && (
                                                                        <div className="text-[9px] font-black text-sky-700">PosiciÃ³n de la unidad en este aÃ±o</div>
                                                                    )}
                                                                    {cellContent.map((group) => {
                                                                        const groupColorObj = getGroupColor(group.label);
                                                                        return (
                                                                            <div key={`${yearData.yearOffset}-${pos}-${group.label}`} className="flex items-center gap-1">
                                                                                <span className={`px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-[9px] font-black border ${groupColorObj.p} ${groupColorObj.b} ${groupColorObj.tw}`}>
                                                                                    {group.label}
                                                                                </span>
                                                                                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
                                                                                    {group.subs.map((num) => (
                                                                                        <span key={`${yearData.yearOffset}-${pos}-${group.label}${num}`} className={`px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-[9px] font-black border ${getSubColor(group.label, num)}`}>
                                                                                            {group.label}{num}
                                                                                        </span>
                                                                                    ))}
                                                                                </div>
                                                                            </div>
                                                                        );
                                                                    })}
                                                                </div>
                                                            )}
                                                        </td>
                                                    );
                                                })}
                                            </tr>
                                        );
                                    })}
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </Modal>
            )}

            <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row min-h-screen lg:min-h-[calc(100vh-0.75rem)] w-full max-w-[1800px] mx-auto p-2 lg:p-3 gap-3 box-border bg-transparent lg:overflow-hidden">
                <div className="w-full lg:w-[24rem] xl:w-[26rem] flex flex-col panel shrink-0 order-1 lg:order-2 min-h-0 max-h-[42vh] lg:max-h-none lg:h-full overflow-hidden">
                    <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-y-auto custom-scroll flex flex-col pr-1">
                        <div className="p-5 border-b border-gray-100/50 bg-gray-50/30 shrink-0">
	                            <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm mb-4 uppercase tracking-wider">ConfiguraciÃ³n</h4>
	                            <div className="space-y-4">
	                                <div><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase block mb-1.5">1. AÃ±o visualizado</label><select className="custom-select border-gray-300/60 py-2 text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 shadow-sm" value={currentStep + 1} onChange={(e) => setCurrentStep(Math.max(0, Number(e.target.value || 1) - 1))}>{Array.from({ length: maxConfigYear }, (_, idx) => idx + 1).map(yearOption => <option key={yearOption} value={yearOption}>AÃ±o {yearOption}</option>)}</select></div>
	                                <div><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase block mb-1.5">2. PosiciÃ³n dentro del subbloque</label><select className="custom-select border-gray-300/60 py-2 text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 shadow-sm" value={selectedSubPosition} onChange={(e) => setSelectedId(`${selectedGroupLabel}${Number(e.target.value)}`)}>{ROTATION_SUBS.map(num => <option key={num} value={num}>Puesto {num} ({selectedGroupLabel}{num})</option>)}</select></div>
	                                <div><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase block mb-1.5">3. PosiciÃ³n Inicio (AÃ±o 1)</label><select className="custom-select border-gray-300/60 py-2 text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 shadow-sm" value={startPos} onChange={(e) => setStartPos(Number(e.target.value))}>{allPositions.map(p => <option key={p} value={p}>PosiciÃ³n {p}</option>)}</select></div>
	                                <div><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase block mb-1.5">4. Unidad a Seguir</label><select className={`custom-select py-2 text-sm font-bold shadow-sm ${activeScheme.b} ${activeScheme.l} ${activeScheme.t}`} value={selectedId} onChange={(e) => setSelectedId(e.target.value)}>{allSubSubBlocks.map(id => <option key={id} value={id}>Unidad {id}</option>)}</select></div>
	                                <div>
	                                    <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase block mb-1.5">5. NÃºmero ONCE ganador</label>
	                                    <input type="text" inputMode="numeric" maxLength="5" placeholder="00000" className="custom-select border-gray-300/60 py-2 text-sm font-black text-gray-700 shadow-sm tracking-[0.25em] text-center" value={onceNumber} onChange={(e) => setOnceNumber(String(e.target.value || '').replace(/\D/g, '').slice(0, 5))} />
	                                    <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-1">Formato admitido: `00000` a `99999`</div>
	                                </div>
	                                <div className="bg-white/60 p-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-200/50 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm space-y-2">
	                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
	                                        <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 font-bold uppercase">DNE cargados</span>
	                                        <span className="text-[11px] font-black text-slate-800">{rotationDneList.length}</span>
	                                    </div>
	                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
	                                        <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 font-bold uppercase">Plantilla usada</span>
	                                        <span className="text-[11px] font-black text-blue-700">{rotationTemplateSize}</span>
	                                    </div>
                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                                        <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 font-bold uppercase">Primer MTE del sorteo</span>
                                        <span className="text-[11px] font-black text-emerald-700">{winningStartPosition || '-'}</span>
                                    </div>
	                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-start gap-3">
	                                        <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 font-bold uppercase">DNE correspondiente</span>
	                                        <span className="text-[11px] font-black text-emerald-700 text-right rotation-wrap max-w-[60%]">{winningStartDne || '-'}</span>
	                                    </div>
                                    <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 leading-tight">
                                        Formula aplicada: <b>({formattedOnceNumber} x {rotationTemplateSize} / 100000) + 1</b>
                                    </div>
                                    {!!winningStartDne && (
                                        <div className="text-[10px] text-emerald-700 font-bold leading-tight">
                                            El primer MTE calculado apunta al DNE <b>{winningStartDne}</b> del listado Excel.
                                        </div>
                                    )}
                                    {rotationDneList.length > 0 && rotationDneList.length !== Number(globalMTE) && (
                                        <div className="text-[10px] text-amber-700 font-bold leading-tight">
                                            Aviso: el Excel tiene {rotationDneList.length} DNE y la plantilla MTE es {globalMTE}. Para el orden se usa la plantilla cargada en el Excel.
                                        </div>
                                    )}
	                                    {rotationDneList.length === 0 && (
	                                        <div className="text-[10px] text-rose-700 font-bold leading-tight">
	                                            Sube antes el Excel de DNE en Configurar para generar el orden.
	                                        </div>
	                                    )}
	                                </div>
	                                <div className="pt-3 border-t border-gray-200/50">
	                                    <div className="bg-white/60 p-2.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-200/50 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm">
	                                        <div className="text-[9px] font-black text-blue-800 uppercase mb-1.5 border-b border-blue-100 pb-1">Desglose de Plantilla (Total: {globalMTE})</div>
                                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-1"><span className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 font-bold">Por Bloque (P1..P13):</span><span className="text-[11px] font-black text-blue-700">{mteDesglose.bloque}</span></div>
                                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-1"><span className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 font-bold">Por Subbloque ({subBlockRangeLabel}):</span><span className="text-[11px] font-black text-blue-700">{mteDesglose.subbloque}</span></div>
                                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><span className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 font-bold">Por Unidad ({unitRangeLabel}):</span><span className="text-[11px] font-black text-blue-700">{mteDesglose.subsubbloque}</span></div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="p-5 border-b border-gray-100/50 bg-white/40 shrink-0">
                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                                <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase m-0">Control de Tiempo</p>
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-blue-50/60 border border-blue-200/60 rounded-lg px-2 py-1 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm">
                                    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-blue-800 uppercase">AÃ‘O</span><input type="number" min="1" className="w-12 bg-transparent text-center font-black text-blue-900 outline-none" value={currentStep + 1} onChange={(e) => { const val = parseInt(e.target.value); if (!isNaN(val) && val > 0) { setCurrentStep(val - 1); } else if (e.target.value === '') { setCurrentStep(0); } }} />
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex justify-center items-center gap-3">
                                <button onClick={() => setCurrentStep(p => Math.max(0, p - 1))} className="p-2.5 bg-gray-50/80 border border-gray-300/60 hover:bg-gray-100/90 rounded-xl transition-colors text-gray-700 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm">â—€</button>
                                <button onClick={() => setIsPlaying(!isPlaying)} className={`flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold uppercase text-xs transition-all shadow-sm backdrop-blur-md ${isPlaying ? 'bg-red-50/90 text-red-700 border border-red-300 hover:bg-red-100' : `${activeScheme.p} text-white border ${activeScheme.b} hover:opacity-90`}`}>{isPlaying ? 'PAUSAR' : 'REPRODUCIR'}</button>
                                <button onClick={() => setCurrentStep(p => p + 1)} className="p-2.5 bg-gray-50/80 border border-gray-300/60 hover:bg-gray-100/90 rounded-xl transition-colors text-gray-700 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm">â–¶</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

	                <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 min-h-0 panel overflow-hidden bg-white/10 order-2 lg:order-1 lg:h-full">
	                    <div className="px-4 md:px-5 py-4 border-b border-gray-100/50 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3 shrink-0 bg-white/40">
	                        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 min-w-0">
                            <button onClick={onBack} className="p-1.5 text-gray-500 hover:text-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-100/50 rounded-full transition-colors"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18" /></svg></button>
                            <div className="logo-img h-6 w-6 hidden sm:block mr-1"></div>

                            <button onClick={() => setShowGeneralSequence(true)} className="px-3 py-1 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold shadow-md transition-colors">ðŸ§© Secuencia 13A</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>

	                    <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 p-4 md:p-6 lg:p-8 overflow-y-auto custom-scroll flex flex-col gap-6 lg:gap-8 bg-transparent">
                        <div className="bg-white/50 rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-5 border border-white/60 shadow-sm relative backdrop-blur-md">
                            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:justify-between sm:items-center gap-3 mb-4 md:mb-6">
                                <h2 className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-2"><span className={`w-2 h-2 ${activeScheme.p} rounded-full`}></span> Tablero Anual</h2>
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500">
                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5"><div className={`w-3 h-3 ${activeScheme.p} rounded`}></div> ACTUAL</div>
                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5"><div className={`w-3 h-3 ${activeScheme.indicatorBg} rounded border border-white/50 ring-1 ${activeScheme.r}`}></div> {selectedId}</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
			                            <div className="overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden w-full pb-2 custom-scroll">
			                                <div className="min-w-[560px] grid grid-cols-13 rotation-board-grid gap-1.5 md:gap-2 items-stretch auto-rows-fr min-h-[132px] md:min-h-[148px]">
			                                    {[...Array(13)].map((_, i) => {
			                                        const pos = i + 1; const active = activePosition === pos;
			                                        return (
		                                            <div key={i} className="flex flex-col items-center justify-end gap-2 h-full">
