			                                                    {active && (<div className="flex flex-col p-1.5 gap-1 h-full w-full">{currentContent.map((g, idx) => { const isGroupSelected = selectedId.startsWith(g.label); const groupColorObj = getGroupColor(g.label); return (<div key={idx} className={`flex-1 rounded flex items-center justify-center gap-1 text-[8px] md:text-[9px] font-black transition-all duration-500 border px-1 ${groupColorObj.p} ${groupColorObj.b} ${groupColorObj.tw} ${isGroupSelected ? `ring-2 ${groupColorObj.r} ring-offset-1 scale-105 z-10 shadow-md` : 'opacity-80'}`}><span className="shrink-0">{g.label}</span><div className="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-1">{g.subs.map(num => { const fullId = `${g.label}${num}`; const isSelected = selectedId === fullId; return (<button key={fullId} type="button" onClick={() => setSelectedId(fullId)} className={`min-w-[1.45rem] rounded px-1 py-0.5 border text-[8px] font-black transition-all ${getSubColor(g.label, num)} ${isSelected ? `ring-2 ${groupColorObj.r} ring-offset-1 scale-105 shadow-md` : 'hover:opacity-100'}`}>{num}</button>); })}</div></div>); })}</div>)}
			                                                </div>
                                                <div className={`text-[10px] font-black ${active ? activeScheme.t : 'text-gray-500'}`}>P{pos}</div>
                                            </div>
                                        );
			                                    })}
			                                </div>
			                            </div>
			                            <div className="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-gray-200/70">
			                                <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between gap-3 mb-3">
			                                    <div>
			                                        <div className="text-[10px] font-black text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">ComposiciÃ³n integrada</div>
			                                        <div className="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-700 mt-1">AÃ±o {currentStep + 1} Â· Bloque activo P{activePosition} Â· Puesto {selectedSubPosition}</div>
			                                    </div>
			                                    <div className={`self-start px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-black border shadow-sm ${activeScheme.l} ${activeScheme.b} ${activeScheme.t}`}>
			                                        Referencia actual: {selectedId}
			                                    </div>
			                                </div>
			                                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
			                                    {currentContent.map((group, idx) => {
			                                        const groupColorObj = getGroupColor(group.label);
			                                        const groupSelected = selectedGroupLabel === group.label;
			                                        return (
			                                            <div key={`${activePosition}-${group.label}-${idx}`} className={`rounded-xl border p-3 shadow-sm transition-all ${groupColorObj.l} ${groupColorObj.b} ${groupSelected ? `ring-2 ${groupColorObj.r} ring-offset-1` : ''}`}>
			                                                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 mb-3">
			                                                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setSelectedId(`${group.label}${selectedSubPosition}`)} className={`px-2.5 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs font-black border transition-colors ${groupColorObj.p} ${groupColorObj.b} ${groupColorObj.tw}`}>
			                                                        Subbloque {group.label}
			                                                    </button>
			                                                    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase">PosiciÃ³n {idx + 1}</span>
			                                                </div>
			                                                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
			                                                    {group.subs.map(num => {
			                                                        const fullId = `${group.label}${num}`;
			                                                        const isSelected = selectedId === fullId;
			                                                        return (
			                                                            <button key={fullId} type="button" onClick={() => setSelectedId(fullId)} className={`px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg border text-[11px] font-black transition-all ${getSubColor(group.label, num)} ${isSelected ? `ring-2 ${groupColorObj.r} ring-offset-1 scale-105 shadow-md` : 'hover:opacity-100'}`}>
			                                                                {fullId}
			                                                            </button>
			                                                        );
			                                                    })}
			                                                </div>
			                                            </div>
			                                        );
			                                    })}
			                                </div>
			                            </div>
		                        </div>

	                        <div className="bg-white/50 rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-5 border border-white/60 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden w-full backdrop-blur-md mt-auto lg:mt-0">
	                            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:justify-between sm:items-center gap-2 mb-4">
	                                <div>
	                                    <h3 className="text-xs font-black text-slate-800 uppercase tracking-widest">ðŸŽ² Orden Sorteo RotaciÃ³n</h3>
	                                    <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-600 mt-1">AsignaciÃ³n circular de DNE al orden de rotaciÃ³n: Bloque 1..13, luego siguiente unidad, y despuÃ©s siguiente puesto interno.</p>
	                                </div>
	                                <button onClick={() => setShowRotationOrderPanel(prev => !prev)} className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold shadow-md transition-colors">
	                                    {showRotationOrderPanel ? 'Plegar' : 'Desplegar'}
	                                </button>
	                            </div>
			                            <div className="rotation-auto-grid mb-4">
		                                <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-3">
		                                    <div className="text-[9px] font-black text-gray-500 uppercase">Fichero DNE</div>
		                                    <div className="text-[11px] font-black text-slate-800 mt-1 rotation-wrap">{config.rotationDneFileName || 'Sin cargar'}</div>
		                                </div>
		                                <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-3">
		                                    <div className="text-[9px] font-black text-gray-500 uppercase">DNE inicial</div>
		                                    <div className="text-[11px] font-black text-emerald-700 mt-1 rotation-wrap">{generatedRotationOrder[0]?.dne || '-'}</div>
		                                </div>
		                                <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-3">
		                                    <div className="text-[9px] font-black text-gray-500 uppercase">Primer hueco</div>
		                                    <div className="text-[11px] font-black text-blue-700 mt-1 rotation-wrap">{generatedRotationOrder[0]?.slotLabel || '-'}</div>
		                                </div>
		                            </div>
		                            <div className="mb-4 bg-white/60 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-3">
		                                <div className="text-[9px] font-black text-gray-500 uppercase mb-1">Secuencia activa de unidades</div>
		                                <div className="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-700 rotation-wrap">{rotationUnitSequence.join(' -> ')}</div>
		                            </div>
	                            {generatedRotationOrder.length === 0 ? (
	                                <div className="rounded-xl border border-dashed border-gray-300 bg-white/40 p-6 text-center text-sm font-bold text-gray-500">
	                                    Carga el Excel de DNE en Configurar e introduce el nÃºmero ONCE para ver el orden.
	                                </div>
	                            ) : !showRotationOrderPanel ? (
	                                <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white/50 px-4 py-3 text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-600">
	                                    Cuadro plegado. Pulsa `Desplegar` para ver la lista y buscar por DNE.
	                                </div>
	                            ) : (
	                                <>
		                                    <div className="rotation-search-grid mb-4">
		                                        <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-3">
		                                            <label className="text-[9px] font-black text-gray-500 uppercase block mb-2">Buscar por DNE</label>
		                                            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-2">
		                                                <input type="text" className="custom-select py-2 text-sm font-bold text-gray-700" value={rotationSearchTerm} onChange={(e) => setRotationSearchTerm(e.target.value)} placeholder="Escribe un DNE..." />
		                                                <button onClick={() => setRotationSearchTerm('')} disabled={!rotationSearchTerm} className={`px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold transition-colors ${rotationSearchTerm ? 'bg-gray-800 text-white hover:bg-gray-900' : 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-400'}`}>Limpiar</button>
	                                            </div>
	                                            <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-2">
	                                                {normalizedRotationSearch ? `Coincidencias: ${filteredRotationOrder.length}` : `Total registros: ${generatedRotationOrder.length}`}
	                                            </div>
	                                        </div>
	                                        <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-3">
	                                            <div className="text-[9px] font-black text-gray-500 uppercase mb-2">Resultado buscador</div>
	                                            {!searchedRotationSummary ? (
	                                                <div className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-500">Introduce un DNE para ver su posiciÃ³n, bloque, unidad y los MTE delante/detrÃ¡s.</div>
	                                            ) : (
		                                                <div className="space-y-1.5 rotation-wrap">
		                                                    <div className="text-sm font-black text-emerald-700 rotation-wrap">{searchedRotationSummary.dne}</div>
	                                                    <div className="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-700">Orden: {searchedRotationSummary.order}</div>
	                                                    <div className="text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-700">PosiciÃ³n: Bloque {searchedRotationSummary.block} Â· {searchedRotationSummary.unit} Â· Puesto {searchedRotationSummary.seat}</div>
	                                                    <div className="text-[11px] font-bold text-blue-700">MTE delante: {searchedRotationSummary.ahead}</div>
	                                                    <div className="text-[11px] font-bold text-violet-700">MTE detrÃ¡s: {searchedRotationSummary.behind}</div>
	                                                </div>
	                                            )}
	                                        </div>
	                                    </div>
			                                    <div className="overflow-auto custom-scroll rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white/60 max-h-[70vh]">
			                                    <table className="rotation-table w-full text-left text-[11px] border-collapse">
		                                        <thead className="bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 uppercase sticky top-0 z-10">
	                                            <tr>
		                                                <th className="p-2 w-16">Orden</th>
		                                                <th className="p-2 w-28">DNE</th>
		                                                <th className="p-2 w-24">Bloque</th>
		                                                <th className="p-2 w-24">Unidad</th>
		                                                <th className="p-2 w-24">Puesto</th>
	                                                <th className="p-2">AsignaciÃ³n</th>
		                                                <th className="p-2 w-20 text-right">Delante</th>
	                                                <th className="p-2 text-right">DetrÃ¡s</th>
	                                            </tr>
	                                        </thead>
	                                        <tbody>
	                                            {filteredRotationOrder.map((row, idx) => {
	                                                const ahead = Math.max(0, row.order - 1);
	                                                const behind = Math.max(0, generatedRotationOrder.length - row.order);
	                                                const isSearchMatch = !!normalizedRotationSearch && searchedRotationSummary?.dne === row.dne && searchedRotationSummary?.order === row.order;
	                                                return (
	                                                <tr key={`${row.order}-${row.dne}-${idx}`} className={`${idx % 2 === 0 ? 'bg-white' : 'bg-gray-50'} ${row.isWinningStart ? 'ring-1 ring-emerald-300 bg-emerald-50/60' : ''} ${isSearchMatch ? 'bg-amber-50/80 ring-1 ring-amber-300' : ''}`}>
		                                                    <td className="p-2 align-top font-black text-slate-800">{row.order}</td>
		                                                    <td className="p-2 align-top font-black text-emerald-700 rotation-wrap">{row.dne}</td>
		                                                    <td className="p-2 align-top">Bloque {row.block}</td>
		                                                    <td className="p-2 align-top">{row.unit}</td>
		                                                    <td className="p-2 align-top">Puesto {row.seat}</td>
		                                                    <td className="p-2 align-top text-gray-700 rotation-wrap">{row.slotLabel}{row.isWinningStart ? ' (Inicio sorteo)' : ''}</td>
		                                                    <td className="p-2 align-top text-right font-bold text-blue-700">{ahead}</td>
		                                                    <td className="p-2 align-top text-right font-bold text-violet-700">{behind}</td>
	                                                </tr>
	                                            )})}
	                                            {filteredRotationOrder.length === 0 && (
	                                                <tr>
	                                                    <td colSpan="8" className="p-4 text-center font-bold text-gray-500">No hay coincidencias para ese DNE.</td>
	                                                </tr>
	                                            )}
	                                        </tbody>
	                                    </table>
	                                </div>
	                                </>
	                            )}
	                        </div>

	                        <div className="bg-white/50 rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-5 border border-white/60 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden w-full backdrop-blur-md mt-auto lg:mt-0">
		                            <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row lg:justify-between lg:items-start gap-3 mb-3">
	                                <h3 className="text-xs font-black text-indigo-800 uppercase tracking-widest">ðŸ‘ï¸ VisiÃ³n General ({config.proyeccionAnos || 15} aÃ±os)</h3>
		                                <div className="flex flex-col items-start lg:items-end gap-2">
		                                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
		                                        <button type="button" onClick={() => setGeneralVisionMode('unidad')} className={`toggle-btn ${generalVisionMode === 'unidad' ? 'toggle-on' : 'toggle-off'}`}>Unidad seleccionada</button>
		                                        <button type="button" onClick={() => { if (canUseSearchedVision) setGeneralVisionMode('dne'); }} disabled={!canUseSearchedVision} className={`toggle-btn ${generalVisionMode === 'dne' && canUseSearchedVision ? 'toggle-on' : 'toggle-off'} ${!canUseSearchedVision ? 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`}>DNE buscado</button>
		                                    </div>
			                                <span className={`font-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] ${visionScheme.p} text-white rotation-wrap max-w-full`}>{visionBadgeLabel}</span>
		                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-600 mb-4">ProyecciÃ³n automÃ¡tica de posiciÃ³n, subbloque, subsubbloque y MTE delante para la unidad seleccionada.</p>
	                            <div className="text-[11px] text-slate-700 font-bold mb-4 rotation-wrap">{visionHelperText}</div>
	                            {!canUseSearchedVision && generalVisionMode === 'dne' && (
		                                <div className="text-[10px] text-amber-700 font-bold mb-4">Busca un DNE valido para activar esa vista.</div>
	                            )}
		                            <div className="rotation-vision-grid">
                                {Array.from({ length: config.proyeccionAnos || 15 }).map((_, stepOffset) => {
                                    const pos = sequence[stepOffset % 13];
                                    const contentForStep = getRotationBlockContent(stepOffset);
	                                    const flatOrder = contentForStep.flatMap(g => g.subs.map(num => `${g.label}${num}`));
	                                    const internalIdx = flatOrder.indexOf(visionUnitId);
	                                    const selectedGroupLabel = visionUnitId.charAt(0);
	                                    const selectedSubNum = parseInt(visionUnitId.slice(1), 10);
                                    const subBlockPos = contentForStep.findIndex(g => g.label === selectedGroupLabel) + 1;
                                    const selectedGroupData = subBlockPos > 0 ? contentForStep[subBlockPos - 1] : null;
                                    const subSubInGroupPos = selectedGroupData ? (selectedGroupData.subs.indexOf(selectedSubNum) + 1) : 0;
                                    const subSubGlobalPos = internalIdx + 1;
                                    const mPerBlock = globalMTE / 13;
                                    const mPerSub = mPerBlock / 12;
                                    const mteDelanteStep = Math.round(((pos - 1) * mPerBlock) + (internalIdx * mPerSub) + (mPerSub / 2));
                                    return (
		                                        <div key={stepOffset} className={`p-3 rounded-xl border-2 flex flex-col items-center justify-between min-h-[148px] relative overflow-hidden bg-white transition-transform cursor-default ${visionScheme.b}`}>
	                                            <div className={`absolute top-0 w-full h-1.5 ${visionScheme.p}`}></div>
                                            <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">AÃ±o {stepOffset + 1}</span>
	                                            <span className={`text-sm md:text-base font-black mb-1 ${visionScheme.t}`}>PosiciÃ³n {pos}</span>
                                            <div className="text-[8px] text-gray-600 font-bold mb-2 text-center leading-tight">
    <div>Subbloque {subBlockPos}/3</div>
    <div>Subsubbloque {subSubInGroupPos}/4 ({subSubGlobalPos}/12)</div>
</div>
	                                            <div className={`rounded px-2 py-1 text-center w-full shadow-inner ${visionScheme.l}`}>
                                                <span className="block text-[8px] text-gray-500 uppercase font-black tracking-wider">MTE Delante</span>
	                                                <span className={`text-xs font-black ${visionScheme.t}`}>{mteDelanteStep}</span>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    );
                                })}

                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
}

function SimuladorAnalisis({ config, onBack, onOpenScenario }) {
    const [year, setYear] = useState(2027);
    const [rmStatus, setRmStatus] = useState('fuera');
    const [calendarFilter, setCalendarFilter] = useState('todos');
    const [expandedGroups, setExpandedGroups] = useState(() => new Set());
    const [detailSortByGroup, setDetailSortByGroup] = useState({});
    const [periodAnalysisOpen, setPeriodAnalysisOpen] = useState(false);
    const autoLibranzasA = REQUIRED_LAB_DAYS_A;
    const totalMTE = Math.max(0, Number(config?.globalMTE ?? 2100));
    const mtePerGroup = totalMTE / 4;

    const allRows = useMemo(() => {
        const rows = [];
        const annualTargets = getAnnualTargets(rmStatus);

        VACATION_DATA.forEach((vac) => {
            vac.pfa.forEach((pfa, pfaIndex) => {
                for (let group = 0; group < 4; group++) {
                    const ranges = getVacationRangesForScenario(year, vac, pfa, group);
                    const rmDate = getAdjustedRmDateForScenario(year, vac, pfa, group, isBaseRestForGroup);
                    const scenarioTargetDays = annualTargets.workDays;
                    const rmBaseDate = getRmDateForScenario(year, vac, pfa);
                    if (rmBaseDate) rmBaseDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
                    const rmDayId = rmDate ? `${rmDate.getMonth()}-${rmDate.getDate()}` : null;
                    const pfaOriginalStart = new Date(year, pfa.start.m, pfa.start.d);
                    pfaOriginalStart.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
                    const pfaAdjustedStart = new Date(ranges.pfaStart);
                    pfaAdjustedStart.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
                    const pfaStartShiftDays = Math.round((pfaAdjustedStart.getTime() - pfaOriginalStart.getTime()) / MS_PER_DAY);
                    const rmShiftDays = (rmDate && rmBaseDate) ? Math.round((rmDate.getTime() - rmBaseDate.getTime()) / MS_PER_DAY) : 0;
                    const commonScenarioInfo = {
                        rmDayTs: rmDate ? rmDate.getTime() : null,
                        rmBaseDayTs: rmBaseDate ? rmBaseDate.getTime() : null,
                        rmShiftDays,
                        pfaStartOriginalTs: pfaOriginalStart.getTime(),
                        pfaStartAdjustedTs: pfaAdjustedStart.getTime(),
                        pfaStartShifted: pfaStartShiftDays !== 0,
                        pfaStartShiftDays
                    };
                    const scenarioMTEBase = mtePerGroup * (Number(pfa.weight) || 0);
                    const scenarioPeriodMTE = scenarioMTEBase * 4;
                    const libranzasA = buildCCRFixedDaysSet(year, group, ranges, autoLibranzasA, rmDate, rmStatus === 'dentro');
                    const statsA = computeAnnualBalance({
                        year,
                        groupShift: group,
                        targetDays: scenarioTargetDays,
                        vacationRanges: ranges,
                        specificRestSet: libranzasA,
                        workRule: 'rest_and_specific_only',
                        includeVacationOnWork: true,
                        rmDate,
                        rmInside: rmStatus === 'dentro'
                    });
                    rows.push({
                        id: `A-${vac.id}-${pfaIndex}-${group}`,
                        calendario: 'A',
                        grupo: `G${group + 1}`,
                        subgrupo: '-',
                        ccr: '-',
                        periodoC: '-',
                        vacaciones: vac.label,
                        pfa: pfa.label,
                        compatible: true,
                        overlapDays: 0,
                        scenarioMTE: scenarioMTEBase,
                        scenarioPeriodMTE,
                        scenarioVacId: vac.id,
                        scenarioPfaIdx: pfaIndex,
                        scenarioGroupShift: group,
                        scenarioSubGroupIdx: 0,
                        rmCoincideDescanso: !!(rmDayId && rmDate && (isBaseRestForGroup(rmDate, group) || libranzasA.has(rmDayId))),
                        ...commonScenarioInfo,
                        ...statsA
                    });

                    for (let sub = 0; sub < 6; sub++) {
                        const redSet = buildRedDaysSetBForScenario(year, group, sub);
                        const statsB = computeAnnualBalance({
                            year,
                            groupShift: group,
                            targetDays: scenarioTargetDays,
                            vacationRanges: ranges,
                            specificRestSet: redSet,
                            workRule: 'rest_and_specific_only',
                            includeVacationOnWork: true,
                            rmDate,
                            rmInside: rmStatus === 'dentro'
                        });
                        rows.push({
                            id: `B-${vac.id}-${pfaIndex}-${group}-${sub}`,
                            calendario: 'B',
                            grupo: `G${group + 1}`,
                            subgrupo: `S${sub + 1}`,
                            ccr: '-',
                            periodoC: '-',
                            vacaciones: vac.label,
                            pfa: pfa.label,
                            compatible: true,
                            overlapDays: 0,
                            scenarioMTE: scenarioMTEBase / 6,
                            scenarioPeriodMTE,
                            scenarioVacId: vac.id,
                            scenarioPfaIdx: pfaIndex,
                            scenarioGroupShift: group,
                            scenarioSubGroupIdx: sub,
                            rmCoincideDescanso: !!(rmDayId && rmDate && (isBaseRestForGroup(rmDate, group) || redSet.has(rmDayId))),
                            ...commonScenarioInfo,
                            ...statsB
                        });
                    }

                    const ccrFixedSet = buildCCRFixedDaysSet(year, group, ranges, 10, rmDate, rmStatus === 'dentro');
                    const statsC = computeAnnualBalance({
                        year,
                        groupShift: group,
                        targetDays: scenarioTargetDays,
                        vacationRanges: ranges,
                        specificRestSet: ccrFixedSet,
                        workRule: 'rest_and_specific_only',
                        includeVacationOnWork: true,
                        rmDate,
                        rmInside: rmStatus === 'dentro'
                    });
                    rows.push({
                        id: `C-${vac.id}-${pfaIndex}-${group}`,
                        calendario: 'C',
                        grupo: `G${group + 1}`,
                        subgrupo: '-',
                        ccr: '-',
                        periodoC: '-',
                        vacaciones: vac.label,
                        pfa: pfa.label,
                        compatible: true,
                        overlapDays: 0,
                        scenarioMTE: scenarioMTEBase,
                        scenarioPeriodMTE,
                        scenarioVacId: vac.id,
                        scenarioPfaIdx: pfaIndex,
                        scenarioGroupShift: group,
                        scenarioSubGroupIdx: 0,
                        rmCoincideDescanso: !!(rmDayId && rmDate && (isBaseRestForGroup(rmDate, group) || ccrFixedSet.has(rmDayId))),
                        ...commonScenarioInfo,
                        ...statsC
                    });
                }
            });
        });

        return rows;
    }, [year, autoLibranzasA, mtePerGroup, rmStatus]);

    const rows = useMemo(() => {
        if (calendarFilter === 'todos') return allRows;
        return allRows.filter(r => r.calendario === calendarFilter);
    }, [allRows, calendarFilter]);

    useEffect(() => {
        setExpandedGroups(new Set());
        setDetailSortByGroup({});
        setPeriodAnalysisOpen(false);
    }, [year, rmStatus, calendarFilter]);

    const groupedRows = useMemo(() => {
        const grouped = new Map();
        rows.forEach((r) => {
            const tipo = r.debitDays > 0 ? 'debito' : (r.creditDays > 0 ? 'credito' : 'equilibrio');
            const valor = tipo === 'debito' ? r.debitDays : (tipo === 'credito' ? r.creditDays : 0);
            const key = `${r.calendario}-${tipo}-${valor}`;
            if (!grouped.has(key)) {
                grouped.set(key, {
                    key,
                    calendario: r.calendario,
                    tipo,
                    valor,
                    items: []
                });
            }
            grouped.get(key).items.push(r);
        });

        const typeOrder = { debito: 0, credito: 1, equilibrio: 2 };
        return Array.from(grouped.values())
            .map(g => ({ ...g, coincidencias: g.items.length }))
            .sort((a, b) => {
                if (a.calendario !== b.calendario) return a.calendario.localeCompare(b.calendario);
                if (typeOrder[a.tipo] !== typeOrder[b.tipo]) return typeOrder[a.tipo] - typeOrder[b.tipo];
                if (a.tipo === 'equilibrio') return 0;
                return b.valor - a.valor;
            });
    }, [rows]);

    const toggleGroup = useCallback((groupKey) => {
        setExpandedGroups(prev => {
            const next = new Set(prev);
            if (next.has(groupKey)) next.delete(groupKey);
            else next.add(groupKey);
            return next;
        });
    }, []);

    const getGroupSortMode = useCallback((group) => {
        if (detailSortByGroup[group.key]) return detailSortByGroup[group.key];
        return 'grupo_asc';
    }, [detailSortByGroup]);

    const getSortedGroupItems = useCallback((group) => {
        const mode = getGroupSortMode(group);
        const sorted = [...group.items];
        sorted.sort((a, b) => {
            if (mode === 'subgrupo_asc') {
                return String(a.subgrupo).localeCompare(String(b.subgrupo), 'es', { numeric: true });
            }
            if (mode === 'vacaciones_asc') {
                return String(a.vacaciones).localeCompare(String(b.vacaciones), 'es', { numeric: true });
            }
            if (mode === 'pfa_asc') {
                return String(a.pfa).localeCompare(String(b.pfa), 'es', { numeric: true });
            }
            return String(a.grupo).localeCompare(String(b.grupo), 'es', { numeric: true });
        });
        return sorted;
    }, [getGroupSortMode]);
    const handleOpenFromDetail = useCallback((r) => {
        if (typeof onOpenScenario !== 'function') return;
        onOpenScenario({
            token: `${Date.now()}-${r.id}`,
            tipo: r.calendario,
            year,
            groupShift: r.scenarioGroupShift,
            subGroupIdx: r.calendario === 'B' ? r.scenarioSubGroupIdx : 0,
            vacationRowId: r.scenarioVacId,
            pfaIdx: r.scenarioPfaIdx,
            rmStatus
        });
    }, [onOpenScenario, year, rmStatus]);

    const resumen = useMemo(() => {
        const byCal = {
            A: { escenarios: 0, credito: 0, debito: 0, posiblesCredito: 0, posiblesDebito: 0, posiblesEquilibrio: 0, posiblesMteCredito: 0, posiblesMteDebito: 0, weightedCredito: 0, weightedDebito: 0, weightedGeneral: 0, totalMteEscenarios: 0, mediaCreditoEscenario: 0, mediaDebitoEscenario: 0, mediaGeneralEscenario: 0, mediaCreditoMte: 0, mediaDebitoMte: 0, mediaGeneralMte: 0 },
            B: { escenarios: 0, credito: 0, debito: 0, posiblesCredito: 0, posiblesDebito: 0, posiblesEquilibrio: 0, posiblesMteCredito: 0, posiblesMteDebito: 0, weightedCredito: 0, weightedDebito: 0, weightedGeneral: 0, totalMteEscenarios: 0, mediaCreditoEscenario: 0, mediaDebitoEscenario: 0, mediaGeneralEscenario: 0, mediaCreditoMte: 0, mediaDebitoMte: 0, mediaGeneralMte: 0 },
            C: { escenarios: 0, credito: 0, debito: 0, posiblesCredito: 0, posiblesDebito: 0, posiblesEquilibrio: 0, posiblesMteCredito: 0, posiblesMteDebito: 0, weightedCredito: 0, weightedDebito: 0, weightedGeneral: 0, totalMteEscenarios: 0, mediaCreditoEscenario: 0, mediaDebitoEscenario: 0, mediaGeneralEscenario: 0, mediaCreditoMte: 0, mediaDebitoMte: 0, mediaGeneralMte: 0 }
        };
        allRows.forEach(r => {
            const scenarioMTE = r.scenarioMTE || 0;
            const totalDias = (r.creditDays || 0) + (r.debitDays || 0);
            byCal[r.calendario].escenarios += 1;
            byCal[r.calendario].credito += r.creditDays;
            byCal[r.calendario].debito += r.debitDays;
            byCal[r.calendario].totalMteEscenarios += scenarioMTE;
            byCal[r.calendario].weightedGeneral += totalDias * scenarioMTE;
            if (r.creditDays > 0) {
                byCal[r.calendario].posiblesCredito += 1;
                byCal[r.calendario].posiblesMteCredito += scenarioMTE;
                byCal[r.calendario].weightedCredito += (r.creditDays || 0) * scenarioMTE;
            }
            if (r.debitDays > 0) {
                byCal[r.calendario].posiblesDebito += 1;
                byCal[r.calendario].posiblesMteDebito += scenarioMTE;
                byCal[r.calendario].weightedDebito += (r.debitDays || 0) * scenarioMTE;
            }
            if (r.creditDays === 0 && r.debitDays === 0) {
                byCal[r.calendario].posiblesEquilibrio += 1;
            }
        });
        Object.values(byCal).forEach(c => {
            c.mediaCreditoEscenario = c.escenarios > 0 ? (c.credito / c.escenarios) : 0;
            c.mediaDebitoEscenario = c.escenarios > 0 ? (c.debito / c.escenarios) : 0;
            c.mediaGeneralEscenario = c.escenarios > 0 ? ((c.credito + c.debito) / c.escenarios) : 0;
            c.mediaCreditoMte = c.posiblesMteCredito > 0 ? (c.weightedCredito / c.posiblesMteCredito) : 0;
            c.mediaDebitoMte = c.posiblesMteDebito > 0 ? (c.weightedDebito / c.posiblesMteDebito) : 0;
            c.mediaGeneralMte = c.totalMteEscenarios > 0 ? (c.weightedGeneral / c.totalMteEscenarios) : 0;
        });
        return byCal;
    }, [allRows]);

    const donutStyleFor = useCallback((cal) => {
        const total = Math.max(1, cal.escenarios || 0);
        const pCred = (cal.posiblesCredito / total) * 100;
        const pDeb = (cal.posiblesDebito / total) * 100;
        const pEq = Math.max(0, 100 - pCred - pDeb);
        return {
            background: `conic-gradient(#16a34a 0 ${pCred}%, #dc2626 ${pCred}% ${pCred + pDeb}%, #9ca3af ${pCred + pDeb}% 100%)`,
            pCred,
            pDeb,
            pEq
        };
    }, []);
    const periodMteRows = useMemo(() => {
        const byPeriod = new Map();
        rows.forEach(r => {
            const key = `${r.calendario}|${r.scenarioVacId}|${r.scenarioPfaIdx}`;
            if (byPeriod.has(key)) return;
            byPeriod.set(key, {
                key,
                calendario: r.calendario,
                vacaciones: r.vacaciones,
                pfa: r.pfa,
                mtePeriodo: Number(r.scenarioPeriodMTE) || 0
            });
        });
        return Array.from(byPeriod.values()).sort((a, b) => {
            if (a.calendario !== b.calendario) return a.calendario.localeCompare(b.calendario);
            const byVac = String(a.vacaciones).localeCompare(String(b.vacaciones), 'es', { numeric: true });
            if (byVac !== 0) return byVac;
            return String(a.pfa).localeCompare(String(b.pfa), 'es', { numeric: true });
        });
    }, [rows]);
    const formatDayMonth = (ts) => {
        if (ts == null) return '-';
        return new Date(ts).toLocaleDateString('es-ES', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit' });
    };
    const formatShiftDays = (days) => `${days > 0 ? '+' : ''}${days}d`;

    return (
        <div className="min-h-screen p-4 md:p-6 flex flex-col relative z-10 w-full max-w-[1800px] mx-auto">
            <div className="panel p-4 flex flex-col lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between gap-3 mb-4 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <button onClick={onBack} className="p-2 bg-blue-100 hover:bg-blue-200 text-blue-800 rounded-full transition-colors">
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-6 w-6" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18" /></svg>
                    </button>
                    <h1 className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-black text-blue-900">Analisis</h1>
                </div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-2 w-full lg:w-auto">
                    <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 px-3 py-2">
                        <label className="block text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase mb-1">Ano</label>
                        <select className="custom-select" value={year} onChange={e => setYear(Number(e.target.value))}>
                            {Array.from({ length: 14 }, (_, i) => 2026 + i).map(y => <option key={y} value={y}>{y}</option>)}
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 px-3 py-2">
                        <label className="block text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase mb-1">RM</label>
                        <select className="custom-select" value={rmStatus} onChange={e => setRmStatus(e.target.value)}>
                            <option value="dentro">Dentro (202/36/127)</option>
                            <option value="fuera">Fuera (201/37/127)</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 px-3 py-2">
                        <label className="block text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase mb-1">Calendario</label>
                        <select className="custom-select" value={calendarFilter} onChange={e => setCalendarFilter(e.target.value)}>
                            <option value="todos">Todos</option>
                            <option value="A">A</option>
                            <option value="B">B</option>
                            <option value="C">C</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3 mb-4">
                <div className="panel p-3 bg-white/60 border border-white/70">
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                        <div className="min-w-0">
                            <div className="text-[11px] font-bold uppercase text-gray-600">Resumen A</div>
                            <div className="text-sm font-black text-blue-900">Escenarios: {resumen.A.escenarios}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-green-700 font-bold">Escenarios con credito: {resumen.A.posiblesCredito}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-red-700 font-bold">Escenarios con debito: {resumen.A.posiblesDebito}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-gray-700 font-bold">Escenarios en equilibrio: {resumen.A.posiblesEquilibrio}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-green-700 font-bold">Posible MTE con credito (plantilla): {Math.round(resumen.A.posiblesMteCredito)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-red-700 font-bold">Posible MTE con debito (plantilla): {Math.round(resumen.A.posiblesMteDebito)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-blue-700 font-bold">Media credito por escenario: {resumen.A.mediaCreditoEscenario.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-blue-700 font-bold">Media debito por escenario: {resumen.A.mediaDebitoEscenario.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-cyan-700 font-bold">Media general (cr+db) por escenario: {resumen.A.mediaGeneralEscenario.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-indigo-700 font-bold">Media credito por MTE: {resumen.A.mediaCreditoMte.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-indigo-700 font-bold">Media debito por MTE: {resumen.A.mediaDebitoMte.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-violet-700 font-bold">Media general (cr+db) por MTE: {resumen.A.mediaGeneralMte.toFixed(2)}</div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="shrink-0 text-right">
                            <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full border border-gray-300 ml-auto" style={{ background: donutStyleFor(resumen.A).background }}></div>
                            <div className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-700 mt-2 space-y-0.5">
                                <div><span className="text-green-700">Credito</span>: {donutStyleFor(resumen.A).pCred.toFixed(1)}%</div>
                                <div><span className="text-red-700">Debito</span>: {donutStyleFor(resumen.A).pDeb.toFixed(1)}%</div>
                                <div><span className="text-gray-600">Equilibrio</span>: {donutStyleFor(resumen.A).pEq.toFixed(1)}%</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div className="panel p-3 bg-white/60 border border-white/70">
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                        <div className="min-w-0">
                            <div className="text-[11px] font-bold uppercase text-gray-600">Resumen B</div>
                            <div className="text-sm font-black text-blue-900">Escenarios: {resumen.B.escenarios}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-green-700 font-bold">Escenarios con credito: {resumen.B.posiblesCredito}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-red-700 font-bold">Escenarios con debito: {resumen.B.posiblesDebito}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-gray-700 font-bold">Escenarios en equilibrio: {resumen.B.posiblesEquilibrio}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-green-700 font-bold">Posible MTE con credito (plantilla): {Math.round(resumen.B.posiblesMteCredito)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-red-700 font-bold">Posible MTE con debito (plantilla): {Math.round(resumen.B.posiblesMteDebito)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-blue-700 font-bold">Media credito por escenario: {resumen.B.mediaCreditoEscenario.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-blue-700 font-bold">Media debito por escenario: {resumen.B.mediaDebitoEscenario.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-cyan-700 font-bold">Media general (cr+db) por escenario: {resumen.B.mediaGeneralEscenario.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-indigo-700 font-bold">Media credito por MTE: {resumen.B.mediaCreditoMte.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-indigo-700 font-bold">Media debito por MTE: {resumen.B.mediaDebitoMte.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-violet-700 font-bold">Media general (cr+db) por MTE: {resumen.B.mediaGeneralMte.toFixed(2)}</div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="shrink-0 text-right">
                            <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full border border-gray-300 ml-auto" style={{ background: donutStyleFor(resumen.B).background }}></div>
                            <div className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-700 mt-2 space-y-0.5">
                                <div><span className="text-green-700">Credito</span>: {donutStyleFor(resumen.B).pCred.toFixed(1)}%</div>
                                <div><span className="text-red-700">Debito</span>: {donutStyleFor(resumen.B).pDeb.toFixed(1)}%</div>
                                <div><span className="text-gray-600">Equilibrio</span>: {donutStyleFor(resumen.B).pEq.toFixed(1)}%</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div className="panel p-3 bg-white/60 border border-white/70">
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                        <div className="min-w-0">
                            <div className="text-[11px] font-bold uppercase text-gray-600">Resumen C</div>
                            <div className="text-sm font-black text-blue-900">Escenarios: {resumen.C.escenarios}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-green-700 font-bold">Escenarios con credito: {resumen.C.posiblesCredito}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-red-700 font-bold">Escenarios con debito: {resumen.C.posiblesDebito}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-gray-700 font-bold">Escenarios en equilibrio: {resumen.C.posiblesEquilibrio}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-green-700 font-bold">Posible MTE con credito (plantilla): {Math.round(resumen.C.posiblesMteCredito)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-red-700 font-bold">Posible MTE con debito (plantilla): {Math.round(resumen.C.posiblesMteDebito)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-blue-700 font-bold">Media credito por escenario: {resumen.C.mediaCreditoEscenario.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-blue-700 font-bold">Media debito por escenario: {resumen.C.mediaDebitoEscenario.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-cyan-700 font-bold">Media general (cr+db) por escenario: {resumen.C.mediaGeneralEscenario.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-indigo-700 font-bold">Media credito por MTE: {resumen.C.mediaCreditoMte.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-indigo-700 font-bold">Media debito por MTE: {resumen.C.mediaDebitoMte.toFixed(2)}</div>
                            <div className="text-[11px] text-violet-700 font-bold">Media general (cr+db) por MTE: {resumen.C.mediaGeneralMte.toFixed(2)}</div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="shrink-0 text-right">
                            <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full border border-gray-300 ml-auto" style={{ background: donutStyleFor(resumen.C).background }}></div>
                            <div className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-700 mt-2 space-y-0.5">
                                <div><span className="text-green-700">Credito</span>: {donutStyleFor(resumen.C).pCred.toFixed(1)}%</div>
                                <div><span className="text-red-700">Debito</span>: {donutStyleFor(resumen.C).pDeb.toFixed(1)}%</div>
                                <div><span className="text-gray-600">Equilibrio</span>: {donutStyleFor(resumen.C).pEq.toFixed(1)}%</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div className="panel p-3 bg-white/60 border border-white/70 mb-4">
                <div className="text-[11px] font-bold uppercase text-gray-600 mb-2">Posibles MTE con creditos o debitos por calendario</div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                    <div className="bg-white/85 rounded border border-red-200 p-3 text-center">
                        <div className="text-[11px] text-gray-600 uppercase font-bold">Calendario A</div>
                        <div className="text-[10px] text-green-700 uppercase font-bold mb-1">Credito</div>
                        <div className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-black text-green-700 leading-none mb-2">{Math.round(resumen.A.posiblesMteCredito)}</div>
                        <div className="text-[10px] text-red-700 uppercase font-bold mb-1">Debito</div>
                        <div className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-black text-red-700 leading-none">{Math.round(resumen.A.posiblesMteDebito)}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-white/85 rounded border border-red-200 p-3 text-center">
                        <div className="text-[11px] text-gray-600 uppercase font-bold">Calendario B</div>
                        <div className="text-[10px] text-green-700 uppercase font-bold mb-1">Credito</div>
                        <div className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-black text-green-700 leading-none mb-2">{Math.round(resumen.B.posiblesMteCredito)}</div>
                        <div className="text-[10px] text-red-700 uppercase font-bold mb-1">Debito</div>
                        <div className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-black text-red-700 leading-none">{Math.round(resumen.B.posiblesMteDebito)}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="bg-white/85 rounded border border-red-200 p-3 text-center">
                        <div className="text-[11px] text-gray-600 uppercase font-bold">Calendario C</div>
                        <div className="text-[10px] text-green-700 uppercase font-bold mb-1">Credito</div>
                        <div className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-black text-green-700 leading-none mb-2">{Math.round(resumen.C.posiblesMteCredito)}</div>
                        <div className="text-[10px] text-red-700 uppercase font-bold mb-1">Debito</div>
                        <div className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-black text-red-700 leading-none">{Math.round(resumen.C.posiblesMteDebito)}</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div className="panel p-3 bg-white/60 border border-white/70 mb-4">
                <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setPeriodAnalysisOpen(prev => !prev)}
                    className="w-full text-left flex items-center justify-between gap-3 hover:bg-white/40 rounded px-1 py-1 transition-colors"
                >
                    <div className="text-[11px] font-bold uppercase text-gray-600">
                        MTE por periodo Vacaciones/PFA (independiente del grupo)
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-700">
                        {periodMteRows.length} periodos {periodAnalysisOpen ? '[-]' : '[+]'}
                    </div>
                </button>
                {periodAnalysisOpen && (
                    <div className="overflow-auto mt-2">
                        <table className="w-full text-left text-[11px] border-collapse min-w-[720px]">
                            <thead className="bg-gray-100">
                                <tr className="uppercase text-gray-600">
                                    <th className="p-2">Calendario</th>
                                    <th className="p-2">Vacaciones</th>
                                    <th className="p-2">PFA</th>
                                    <th className="p-2 text-right">MTE periodo</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                {periodMteRows.map((r, idx) => (
                                    <tr key={r.key} className={idx % 2 === 0 ? 'bg-white' : 'bg-gray-50'}>
                                        <td className="p-2 font-semibold">{r.calendario}</td>
                                        <td className="p-2">{r.vacaciones}</td>
                                        <td className="p-2">{r.pfa}</td>
                                        <td className="p-2 text-right font-black text-blue-800">{Math.round(r.mtePeriodo)}</td>
                                    </tr>
                                ))}
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                )}
                {!periodAnalysisOpen && (
                    <div className="text-[11px] text-gray-500 mt-2">
                        Pulsa para desplegar el detalle de periodos.
                    </div>
                )}
                <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-2">
                    El valor mostrado es total por periodo, sin separar por grupo/subgrupo.
                </div>
            </div>

            <div className="panel p-3 bg-white/70 border border-white/80 flex-1 min-h-0">
                <div className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-600 mb-2 uppercase tracking-wider">
                    Agrupado por debito/credito ({groupedRows.length} grupos)
                </div>
                <div className="text-[11px] text-gray-500 mb-3">
                    Clic en cada grupo para ver grupos/subgrupos + vacaciones/PFA que generan ese resultado.
                </div>
                <div className="text-[11px] text-blue-700 mb-3 font-bold">
                    En el detalle abierto, haz clic en cualquier fila para abrir ese escenario en su calendario.
                </div>
                <div className="text-[11px] text-indigo-700 mb-3 font-bold">
                    MTE periodo: total de MTE asociado al periodo Vacaciones+PFA, independiente del grupo/subgrupo.
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-2 overflow-auto max-h-[70vh] pr-1">
                    {groupedRows.length === 0 && (
                        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-3 text-sm text-gray-600">
                            No hay datos para el filtro seleccionado.
                        </div>
                    )}

                    {groupedRows.map((group) => {
                        const isOpen = expandedGroups.has(group.key);
                        const toneClass = group.tipo === 'debito'
                            ? 'border-red-200 bg-red-50/70'
                            : (group.tipo === 'credito' ? 'border-green-200 bg-green-50/70' : 'border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/70');
                        const title = group.tipo === 'debito'
                            ? `Calendario ${group.calendario}: Debito ${group.valor}`
                            : (group.tipo === 'credito'
                                ? `Calendario ${group.calendario}: Credito ${group.valor}`
                                : `Calendario ${group.calendario}: Equilibrio (0 credito / 0 debito)`);

                        return (
                            <div key={group.key} className={`rounded-lg border ${toneClass} overflow-hidden`}>
                                <button
                                    type="button"
                                    onClick={() => toggleGroup(group.key)}
                                    className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 flex items-center justify-between hover:bg-white/40 transition-colors"
                                >
                                    <div className="text-sm font-black text-blue-900">{title}</div>
                                    <div className="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-700">
                                        {group.coincidencias} coincidencia{group.coincidencias === 1 ? '' : 's'} {isOpen ? '[-]' : '[+]'}
                                    </div>
                                </button>

                                {isOpen && (
                                    <div className="border-t border-white/70 bg-white/80">
                                        <div className="flex justify-end px-3 py-2 border-b border-gray-200">
                                            <div className="w-full sm:w-64">
                                                <label className="block text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase mb-1">Ordenar por</label>
                                                <select
                                                    className="custom-select"
                                                    value={getGroupSortMode(group)}
                                                    onChange={e => setDetailSortByGroup(prev => ({ ...prev, [group.key]: e.target.value }))}
                                                >
                                                    <option value="grupo_asc">Grupo</option>
                                                    <option value="subgrupo_asc">Subgrupo</option>
                                                    <option value="vacaciones_asc">Vacaciones</option>
                                                    <option value="pfa_asc">PFA</option>
                                                </select>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="overflow-auto">
                                            <table className="w-full text-left text-[11px] border-collapse min-w-[1420px]">
                                                <thead className="bg-gray-100">
                                                    <tr className="uppercase text-gray-600">
                                                        <th className="p-2">Grupo</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2">Subgrupo</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2">Vacaciones</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2">PFA</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2">RM</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2">RM en descanso</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2">Inicio PFA</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2">PFA desplazado</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2 text-right">MTE</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2 text-right">MTE periodo</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2 text-right">Trabajo</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2 text-right">Descanso</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2 text-right">Vac/PFA laboral</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2 text-right text-green-700">Credito</th>
                                                        <th className="p-2 text-right text-red-700">Debito</th>
                                                    </tr>
                                                </thead>
                                                <tbody>
                                                    {getSortedGroupItems(group).map((r, idx) => (
                                                        <tr key={r.id} onClick={() => handleOpenFromDetail(r)} className={`${idx % 2 === 0 ? 'bg-white' : 'bg-gray-50'} hover:bg-blue-50/70 cursor-pointer`}>
                                                            <td className="p-2 font-semibold">{r.grupo}</td>
                                                            <td className="p-2">{r.subgrupo}</td>
                                                            <td className="p-2">{r.vacaciones}</td>
                                                            <td className="p-2">{r.pfa}</td>
                                                            <td className="p-2">
                                                                {formatDayMonth(r.rmDayTs)}
                                                                {r.rmDayTs != null && r.rmBaseDayTs != null && r.rmShiftDays !== 0 && (
                                                                    <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 ml-1">({formatDayMonth(r.rmBaseDayTs)}â†’{formatDayMonth(r.rmDayTs)}, {formatShiftDays(r.rmShiftDays)})</span>
                                                                )}
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td className="p-2">
                                                                {r.rmDayTs == null ? '-' : (
                                                                    <span className={`font-bold ${r.rmCoincideDescanso ? 'text-red-700' : 'text-green-700'}`}>
                                                                        {r.rmCoincideDescanso ? 'Si' : 'No'}
                                                                    </span>
                                                                )}
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td className="p-2">{formatDayMonth(r.pfaStartAdjustedTs)}</td>
                                                            <td className="p-2">
                                                                <span className={`font-bold ${r.pfaStartShifted ? 'text-amber-700' : 'text-gray-700'}`}>
                                                                    {r.pfaStartShifted ? `Si (${formatShiftDays(r.pfaStartShiftDays)})` : 'No'}
                                                                </span>
                                                                {r.pfaStartShifted && (
                                                                    <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 ml-1">
                                                                        ({formatDayMonth(r.pfaStartOriginalTs)}â†’{formatDayMonth(r.pfaStartAdjustedTs)})
                                                                    </span>
                                                                )}
                                                            </td>
                                                            <td className="p-2 text-right">{Math.round(r.scenarioMTE || 0)}</td>
                                                            <td className="p-2 text-right font-bold text-blue-800">{Math.round(r.scenarioPeriodMTE || 0)}</td>
                                                            <td className="p-2 text-right">{r.workDays}</td>
                                                            <td className="p-2 text-right">{(r.baseRests || 0) + (r.extraRests || 0)}</td>
                                                            <td className="p-2 text-right">{r.vacOnWorkDays}</td>
                                                            <td className="p-2 text-right font-black text-green-700">{r.creditDays}</td>
                                                            <td className="p-2 text-right font-black text-red-700">{r.debitDays}</td>
                                                        </tr>
                                                    ))}
                                                </tbody>
                                            </table>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                            </div>
                        );
                    })}
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
}

// ==========================================
// ROUTER PRINCIPAL (HOME Y ESTADOS GLOBALES)
// ==========================================
function AppRouter() {
    const [view, setView] = useState('rotacion');
    const [pendingScenario, setPendingScenario] = useState(null);
    
    // ESTADO GLOBAL COMPLETO (Se inyecta en todo el motor)
    const defaultConfig = {
        globalMTE: 2100, maxSolapamiento: 3,
        // Pesos Calendario C
        pesoC_0: 800, pesoC_1: 100, pesoC_2: 1500, pesoC_3: 1500,
        pesoC_4: 400, pesoC_5: 3000, pesoC_6: 10000, pesoC_7: 10000,
        pesoC_8: 3000, pesoC_9: 100, pesoC_10: 100, pesoC_11: 800,
        // Perfil simplificado Calendario A
        multAInvierno: 3, multABaja: 1, multAMedia: 1.8, multAVerano: 3, multAPico: 5,
        // Mult Calendario A
        multA_0: 3, multA_1: 1, multA_2: 2, multA_3: 2,
        multA_4: 1.5, multA_5: 3, multA_6: 5, multA_7: 5,
        multA_8: 3, multA_9: 1, multA_10: 1, multA_11: 3,
        // PresiÃ³n Base
        presionLab: 5, presionSD: 1.5, presionFes: 18, presionAltaLab: 24, presionAltaSD: 25,
        presionInviernoLab: 18, presionInviernoSD: 15,
        presionSemanaSanta: 18,
        presionPuentes: 15, presionViernes: 10, presionMartes: 7.5,
        creditosAutoA: DEFAULT_FLEX_DAYS_A,
        rotationDneList: [],
        rotationDneFileName: '',
        rotationUnitSequence: DEFAULT_ROTATION_ASSIGNMENT_UNIT_SEQUENCE,
        // Cupos FÃ­sicos de Tabla
        c_0_0: 0, c_0_1: 0, c_0_2: 0, c_1_0: 155, c_1_1: 18, c_1_2: 171,
        c_2_0: 155, c_2_1: 18, c_2_2: 171, c_3_0: 147, c_3_1: 15, c_3_2: 168,
        c_4_0: 147, c_4_1: 15, c_4_2: 168, 
        c_5q1_0: 138, c_5q1_1: 15, c_5q1_2: 165, c_5q2_0: 86, c_5q2_1: 10, c_5q2_2: 128,
        c_6_0: 82, c_6_1: 10, c_6_2: 100, c_7_0: 80, c_7_1: 10, c_7_2: 94,
        c_8_0: 84, c_8_1: 10, c_8_2: 108, c_9_0: 138, c_9_1: 15, c_9_2: 165,
        c_10_0: 120, c_10_1: 10, c_10_2: 160, c_11_0: 88, c_11_1: 10, c_11_2: 123,
        customHolidays: ["4-15", "10-9"],
        proyeccionAnos: 15,
        maxPAPGlobal: 11,
        autoAssignPAP: false,
        prioridadPAP: 500,
        pap_invierno_lab: CUPOS_PAP.invierno.lab,
        pap_invierno_sab: CUPOS_PAP.invierno.sab,
        pap_invierno_dom: CUPOS_PAP.invierno.dom,
        pap_junioQ2_lab: CUPOS_PAP.junioQ2.lab,
        pap_junioQ2_sab: CUPOS_PAP.junioQ2.sab,
        pap_junioQ2_dom: CUPOS_PAP.junioQ2.dom,
        pap_julio_lab: CUPOS_PAP.julio.lab,
        pap_julio_sab: CUPOS_PAP.julio.sab,
        pap_julio_dom: CUPOS_PAP.julio.dom,
        pap_agosto_lab: CUPOS_PAP.agosto.lab,
        pap_agosto_sab: CUPOS_PAP.agosto.sab,
        pap_agosto_dom: CUPOS_PAP.agosto.dom,
        pap_septiembre_lab: CUPOS_PAP.septiembre.lab,
        pap_septiembre_sab: CUPOS_PAP.septiembre.sab,
        pap_septiembre_dom: CUPOS_PAP.septiembre.dom
    };
    const [config, setConfig] = useState(() => {
        try {
            const saved = localStorage.getItem(CONFIG_STORAGE_KEY);
            if (!saved) return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(defaultConfig);
            const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
            if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(defaultConfig);
            const normalizedParsed = { ...parsed };
            if (normalizedParsed.presionSemanaSanta == null) {
                const oldLab = Number(normalizedParsed.presionSemanaSantaLab);
                const oldSD = Number(normalizedParsed.presionSemanaSantaSD);
                const labValid = Number.isFinite(oldLab);
                const sdValid = Number.isFinite(oldSD);
                if (labValid && sdValid) normalizedParsed.presionSemanaSanta = Math.round(((oldLab + oldSD) / 2) * 100) / 100;
                else if (labValid) normalizedParsed.presionSemanaSanta = oldLab;
                else if (sdValid) normalizedParsed.presionSemanaSanta = oldSD;
            }
            return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(lockJanuaryQuotaA({ ...defaultConfig, ...normalizedParsed }));
        } catch (_) {
            return normalizeAutoAMultipliers(defaultConfig);
        }
    });
    useEffect(() => {
        if ((config.c_0_0 || 0) !== 0 || (config.c_0_1 || 0) !== 0 || (config.c_0_2 || 0) !== 0) {
            setConfig(prev => lockJanuaryQuotaA(prev));
        }
    }, [config.c_0_0, config.c_0_1, config.c_0_2]);
    const saveConfig = useCallback((cfg) => {
        try {
            const normalizedConfig = normalizeAutoAMultipliers(lockJanuaryQuotaA({ ...defaultConfig, ...(cfg || {}) }));
            localStorage.setItem(CONFIG_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(normalizedConfig));
            return true;
        } catch (_) {
            return false;
        }
    }, [defaultConfig]);
    const handleOpenScenarioFromAnalisis = useCallback((scenario) => {
        if (!scenario || !scenario.tipo) return;
        const nextView = scenario.tipo === 'A' ? 'calA' : (scenario.tipo === 'B' ? 'calB' : 'calC');
        setPendingScenario(scenario);
        setView(nextView);
    }, []);
    const handleScenarioApplied = useCallback((token) => {
        if (!token) return;
        setPendingScenario(prev => (prev && prev.token === token ? null : prev));
    }, []);

    return (
        <div className="relative z-10 w-full h-full no-print">
            { view === 'calA' && <SimuladorEngine tipo="A" config={config} setConfig={setConfig} onBack={() => setView('home')} onGoAnalysis={() => setView('analisis')} initialScenario={pendingScenario} onInitialScenarioApplied={handleScenarioApplied} /> }
            { view === 'calB' && <SimuladorEngine tipo="B" config={config} setConfig={setConfig} onBack={() => setView('home')} onGoAnalysis={() => setView('analisis')} initialScenario={pendingScenario} onInitialScenarioApplied={handleScenarioApplied} /> }
            { view === 'calC' && <SimuladorEngine tipo="C" config={config} setConfig={setConfig} onBack={() => setView('home')} onGoAnalysis={() => setView('analisis')} initialScenario={pendingScenario} onInitialScenarioApplied={handleScenarioApplied} /> }
            { view === 'rotacion' && <SimuladorRotacion globalMTE={config.globalMTE} config={config} onBack={() => setView('home')} /> }
            { view === 'analisis' && <SimuladorAnalisis config={config} onBack={() => setView('home')} onOpenScenario={handleOpenScenarioFromAnalisis} /> }
            { view === 'ajustes' && <Ajustes config={config} setConfig={setConfig} onBack={() => setView('home')} onSaveConfig={saveConfig} /> }
            
            { view === 'home' && (
                <div className="min-h-screen bg-transparent flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 md:p-8 w-full h-full relative overflow-hidden">
                    <div className="text-center mb-8 mt-8 md:mt-0 relative z-10 flex flex-col items-center">
                        <div className="w-20 h-20 mb-6 flex items-center justify-center rounded-2xl panel p-2 logo-home"><div className="logo-img w-full h-full"></div></div>
                        <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-extrabold text-blue-800 tracking-tight mb-3 drop-shadow-sm">Portal SCMM de Simuladores</h1>
                        <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm md:text-lg max-w-2xl mx-auto font-medium">Calendarios y RotaciÃ³n</p>
                    </div>
                    
                    {/* ACCESO RÃPIDO A PLANTILLA GLOBAL EN HOME */}
                    <div className="bg-white/60 p-4 rounded-xl shadow-md border border-white/80 w-full max-w-sm mb-8 text-center mx-auto relative z-10 backdrop-blur-md">
                        <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-blue-900 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Plantilla MTE Total</label>
                        <input type="number" value={config.globalMTE} onChange={e => setConfig(prev => ({...prev, globalMTE: Number(e.target.value)}))} className="w-full text-center text-2xl font-black text-blue-700 bg-white border border-blue-200 rounded-lg py-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 shadow-inner" />
                    </div>

                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-4 md:gap-6 max-w-7xl w-full pb-10 relative z-10">
                        <div onClick={() => setView('calA')} className="panel rounded-2xl p-5 md:p-6 flex flex-col items-center text-center cursor-pointer border-t-8 border-t-blue-500 transform hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg">
                            <div className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-4">ðŸ“…</div><h2 className="text-lg md:text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-2">Calendario A</h2><p className="text-xs text-gray-600 font-medium flex-1">Simulador de dÃ­as sueltos y crÃ©ditos con desgaste dinÃ¡mico por MTE precedente.</p><button className="mt-4 bg-blue-50/80 text-blue-700 font-bold py-2 w-full rounded-xl text-sm border border-blue-300/50 hover:bg-blue-100/80 transition-colors">Acceder</button>
                        </div>
                        <div onClick={() => setView('calB')} className="panel rounded-2xl p-5 md:p-6 flex flex-col items-center text-center cursor-pointer border-t-8 border-t-green-500 transform hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg">
                            <div className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-4">ðŸ“†</div><h2 className="text-lg md:text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-2">Calendario B</h2><p className="text-xs text-gray-600 font-medium flex-1">Secuencia de licencias fijas (L-M, X, J-V) garantizadas matemÃ¡ticamente.</p><button className="mt-4 bg-green-50/80 text-green-700 font-bold py-2 w-full rounded-xl text-sm border border-green-300/50 hover:bg-green-100/80 transition-colors">Acceder</button>
                        </div>
                        <div onClick={() => setView('calC')} className="panel rounded-2xl p-5 md:p-6 flex flex-col items-center text-center cursor-pointer border-t-8 border-t-purple-500 transform hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg">
                            <div className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-4">ðŸ—“ï¸</div><h2 className="text-lg md:text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-2">Calendario C</h2><p className="text-xs text-gray-600 font-medium flex-1">ElecciÃ³n de quincenas con asignaciÃ³n en cascada y filtro de incompatibilidad.</p><button className="mt-4 bg-purple-50/80 text-purple-700 font-bold py-2 w-full rounded-xl text-sm border border-purple-300/50 hover:bg-purple-100/80 transition-colors">Acceder</button>
                        </div>
                        <div onClick={() => setView('rotacion')} className="panel rounded-2xl p-5 md:p-6 flex flex-col items-center text-center cursor-pointer border-t-8 border-t-indigo-500 transform hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg">
                            <div className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-4">ðŸ”„</div><h2 className="text-lg md:text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-2">RotaciÃ³n</h2><p className="text-xs text-gray-600 font-medium flex-1">Simulador predictivo a largo plazo con visiÃ³n de trayectoria a 15 aÃ±os vista.</p><button className="mt-4 bg-indigo-50/80 text-indigo-700 font-bold py-2 w-full rounded-xl text-sm border border-indigo-300/50 hover:bg-indigo-100/80 transition-colors">Acceder</button>
                        </div>
                        <div onClick={() => setView('analisis')} className="panel rounded-2xl p-5 md:p-6 flex flex-col items-center text-center cursor-pointer border-t-8 border-t-amber-500 transform hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg">
                            <div className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-4">ðŸ”Ž</div><h2 className="text-lg md:text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-2">Analisis</h2><p className="text-xs text-gray-600 font-medium flex-1">Analisis cruzado de credito/debito para A, B y C por grupos, subgrupos y escenarios de vacaciones/PFA.</p><button className="mt-4 bg-amber-50/80 text-amber-700 font-bold py-2 w-full rounded-xl text-sm border border-amber-300/50 hover:bg-amber-100/80 transition-colors">Acceder</button>
                        </div>
                        <div onClick={() => setView('ajustes')} className="panel rounded-2xl p-5 md:p-6 flex flex-col items-center text-center cursor-pointer border-t-8 border-t-gray-600 transform hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg bg-white/70">
                            <div className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-4">âš™ï¸</div><h2 className="text-lg md:text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-2">Ajustes</h2><p className="text-xs text-gray-600 font-medium flex-1">Personaliza el motor base, cupos fÃ­sicos y la presiÃ³n de MTE por meses.</p><button className="mt-4 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 font-bold py-2 w-full rounded-xl text-sm border border-gray-300/50 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors">Configurar</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}
        </div>
    );
}

const root = ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root'));
root.render(<AppRouter />);
</script>




</body></html>
